Our 2022 Midterm Elections have come and gone, and we have a brand new freshman class of Republican warriors who will fight for our shared conservative values. I desperately need to hear your opinion on our platform.

You were one of TEN conservative patriots from your area chosen to take this audit.

subject: Sign now to protect access to abortion medication:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
A Trump judge just banned a key abortion pill nationwide -- even in states where access to abortion is still legal. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvoGoyAUpF7WqxCFTok_0zr-Xt9Ts5cvxesAgPHzxPKGuGsnx4IxS8lSn3jXlbZfCiFgv14aMJ_AhNUBPG3uuaQYkxvrYYl38aIxB-0-FOQg1KsYmTjNwm2RxVbiP6v1gpskW9o2TP97XE7Vif1RyzzqmUXRs2yF12YQAjuCcb0cp3HZdKos97xYuKJcce_K_-PKGS3rVM_bYI82aw_b01WA/3v6/0FDwWUpETNKnJ8p5Lry6pg/h0/0ceRAPIrCrh5cQG2qa0xjOOaVqzInLRdjN1SDzfTEhA)
---
Friend, **A Trump-appointed judge in Texas just suspended the FDA's approval of one of the key drugs used for medication abortion (mifepristone). The judge's decision means that as soon as next Friday, this abortion pill could be banned nationwide -- even in states where access to abortion is still legal.** Mifepristone has been approved by the FDA and used safely in the U.S. for the past 20 years. In fact, “medication abortion,” or abortion using pills, is now the most common type of abortion in the U.S. Abortion pills (typically a combination of mifepristone and misoprostol) are not only used to safely and effectively end early pregnancies, but they are also prescribed to ease miscarriages. We must urgently protect people’s access to these medications. [**Please sign now to tell the FDA: Use all available emergency powers to protect access to the abortion pill mifepristone ASAP!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmAOj1ZVa8DSdlAVicBfHcEMZGI97WGzIzKylsn3skkiGtDvvLszAgqf9-Ep7aK1v85XmyCOuO0jfRZtoG2pAcvFPQHAwyjBVZcbuBTnlBwBTMeWD277Bu-HFMBZN8fdLbs4NNjf9dH4vKTqKk7li1W0gichCZE2-l315XwvDcYzGJ6qpZDO-vQNRJ-PlXAb9JspsP1ePSrPt0ugIl4FZ5HtnxSQhhloMxJsP9zA0YWI1ScE8lFccqwiGQWqp8eoK8GShFEfXkpcidhZqVagC5U0RKuZfS9m6k0TOycIAj-zcBzyRqRk2ErdqDZekswpPBBoxgkrj1D0kOLCaDAf7rkvlImfg0_-dcZkhNuKgMzXGmhWYuSvQilZM4glV_HI_FjKRgXO2MY8rmFsZleWnfNAiTnFt93y3Wnr1JcAafGWbHOdPZwB9E2Z0Dc_NCMrSIymJ4HtsvezPEWUrFZxIC9L_hs6Mvp578O7la83X9vY7-5qfI4aTaazTtriqLMBUSt5BVPnG6kX-L4JR53YVDcw5Vsi9kBqE2F1YuFOIlkRtqokaBOjCi6Vv65wIPIjgw/3v6/0FDwWUpETNKnJ8p5Lry6pg/h1/Nr22sBBb2miXAy4VdNqVx-dC34v9In5kZzQcmrPRm-U) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmAOj1ZVa8DSdlAVicBfHcEMZGI97WGzIzKylsn3skkiGtDvvLszAgqf9-Ep7aK1v85XmyCOuO0jfRZtoG2pAcvFPQHAwyjBVZcbuBTnlBwBTMeWD277Bu-HFMBZN8fdLbs4NNjf9dH4vKTqKk7li1W0gichCZE2-l315XwvDcYzGJ6qpZDO-vQNRJ-PlXAb9JspsP1ePSrPt0ugIl4FZ5HtnxSQhhloMxJsP9zA0YWI1ScE8lFccqwiGQWqp8eoK8GShFEfXkpcidhZqVagC5U0RKuZfS9m6k0TOycIAj-zcBzyRqRk2ErdqDZekswpPAU0HB_Coi5dHJARkSLj_m79ax_VXp6TcT3aR-GroF6ntMrHQmrBtPFnh-uUgxIik2Mx37NuTDCx9Z4qfqXgiqZy00FEjeEE0V7oQHJxQH2bV9khfVc6LcIHS72_oXu-1cPW1QweyQEz76PNrPrWqn7-wDv4CWJhr8hTPA5ocTiBW7NuFOOTjrSh-icBDC01EMghTLdDSZn5NES682UlR8rA8Ou2bKRSsAhoOWVd76GGM23NWZ5F8GVFUHuReyeysI/3v6/0FDwWUpETNKnJ8p5Lry6pg/h2/hIM_ALMJnxZFcSfv-9H5JDj4iUHxBnLGOUl5ieolu3Y)

The suspension of mifepristone is part of the right-wing’s decades-long plan to ban and criminalize our reproductive rights.
Even while _Roe v. Wade_ was in place, people were not guaranteed access to abortions. States have been making it harder and harder to access abortion care, and for decades the racist Hyde Amendment has been in place -- blocking abortion access for low-income people, Native communities, and gender non-conforming people (who rely on federally funded healthcare).
I’ve been working to not only restore _Roe v. Wade’s_ protections, but to expand access to abortions and reproductive justice. That includes founding the Mamas’ Caucus in Congress in partnership with Mothering Justice to center and advocate for mothers of color and their families.
I promise to keep fighting for our bodily sovereignty (our right to make choices about our own bodies) and for the right to access abortion care.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: A Trump judge just banned a key abortion pill nationwide -- even in states where access to abortion is still legal. | | | Friend, A Trump-appointed judge in Texas just suspended the FDA's approval of one of the key drugs used for medication abortion (mifepristone). The judge's decision means that as soon as next Friday, this abortion pill could be banned nationwide -- even in states where access to abortion is still legal. Mifepristone has been approved by the FDA and used safely in the U.S. for the past 20 years. In fact, “medication abortion,” or abortion using pills, is now the most common type of abortion in the U.S. Abortion pills (typically a combination of mifepristone and misoprostol) are not only used to safely and effectively end early pregnancies, but they are also prescribed to ease miscarriages. We must urgently protect people’s access to these medications. | The suspension of mifepristone is part of the right-wing’s decades-long plan to ban and criminalize our reproductive rights. Even while Roe v. Wade was in place, people were not guaranteed access to abortions. States have been making it harder and harder to access abortion care, and for decades the racist Hyde Amendment has been in place -- blocking abortion access for low-income people, Native communities, and gender non-conforming people (who rely on federally funded healthcare). I’ve been working to not only restore Roe v. Wade’s protections, but to expand access to abortions and reproductive justice. That includes founding the Mamas’ Caucus in Congress in partnership with Mothering Justice to center and advocate for mothers of color and their families. I promise to keep fighting for our bodily sovereignty (our right to make choices about our own bodies) and for the right to access abortion care. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | | I am devastated by this news. **Just moments ago, a Trump-appointed judge in Texas revoked FDA approval for the most widely used abortion pill in the country, mifepristone.** _Important_ : This ruling doesn’t take effect for seven days, and even if it’s upheld, FDA has expansive authority to allow its use and availability according to the best scientific and medical evidence. **But let's be clear: This ruling will make it harder to access abortion care.** Even in advance of this ruling, the national pharmacy chain Walgreens decided to stop providing mifepristone to patients, in a craven act of pure cowardice. This is yet another attack by right-wing extremists to curtail abortion access and undermine our basic freedoms. I stand with millions of Americans in support of abortion rights. **[Join our movement today and stand with us as we fight to protect human rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61471758/400178746/-2122444374?refcode=2023-04-07-mifepristone&recurring=0&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=38a4c177-a1d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGE0YzE3Ny1hMWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4zcOxpEOd66_a2GHyEYy159QxOE3b4wJvAARBiD9F4A=)** It is up to Congress to stop the courts from destroying our rights. clean_body: | | | | I am devastated by this news. Just moments ago, a Trump-appointed judge in Texas revoked FDA approval for the most widely used abortion pill in the country, mifepristone. Important : This ruling doesn’t take effect for seven days, and even if it’s upheld, FDA has expansive authority to allow its use and availability according to the best scientific and medical evidence. But let's be clear: This ruling will make it harder to access abortion care. Even in advance of this ruling, the national pharmacy chain Walgreens decided to stop providing mifepristone to patients, in a craven act of pure cowardice. This is yet another attack by right-wing extremists to curtail abortion access and undermine our basic freedoms. I stand with millions of Americans in support of abortion rights. = It is up to Congress to stop the courts from destroying our rights. We need to elect a pro-choice Congress who will fight for us. When you join our movement you make it possible to elect pro-choice candidates and grow our movement. = Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: BREAKING: "Texas judge suspends FDA approval of abortion pill mifepristone"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Ohio Democrats will always stand alongside the majority of Americans and Ohioans who firmly believe that access to reproductive health care is a fundamental right.
| **"Texas judge suspends FDA approval of abortion pill mifepristone"**
_— The Washington Post_ Team, this is devastating. A Trump-appointed judge in Texas just issued a ruling demanding mifepristone — an abortion pill — be pulled off the market.

Mifepristone was approved by the FDA more than 20 years ago and has been used by more than **5 million women** in the United States. Now, it could take **years** to restart the approval process, effectively ending our right to safe, non-surgical abortions if the Texas judge's ruling goes into effect.

Ohio Democrats will _always_ stand alongside the majority of Americans and Ohioans who firmly believe that access to reproductive health care is a fundamental right. That's why we proudly endorsed a commonsense reproductive rights ballot initiative that could enshrine the right to reproductive freedom into our state constitution.

**Team, now more than ever, it's crucial that we do all we can to defend access to reproductive care in Ohio.[If you can afford it, please chip in $5 right away to fuel our signature-gathering efforts to put reproductive rights on the ballot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61471781/400181016/-205309248?refcode=em23_230407_abpll_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230407_abpll_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1b41d463-a2d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjQxZDQ2My1hMmQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPzVwZjjHKm23vUWIoAUEDFo3wZr0SqVjibIeevuZTI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $5→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61471782/400181017/-205309248?refcode=em23_230407_abpll_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230407_abpll_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1b41d463-a2d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjQxZDQ2My1hMmQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPzVwZjjHKm23vUWIoAUEDFo3wZr0SqVjibIeevuZTI=)

body:
Mifepristone is safe & effective.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61471895/400186199/823540626?refcode=ea.8d3c9576-a4d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8d3c9576-a4d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDNjOTU3Ni1hNGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3OV6eoWHgVX2J5nfb3eXhv_H2rpvGBvt9ptkMQxmqs=&emci=9460723b-9fd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8d3c9576-a4d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — A federal judge in Texas just made the unprecedented and outrageous decision to order the Food & Drug Administration to suspend approval of mifepristone, the first of two medications used in most abortion care in the US. **This is unacceptable.** Today’s decision removes access to a safe, effective medication that has been used by more than 5 million people since the FDA approved it, EVEN IF IT’S USED IN COMPLIANCE WITH RESTRICTIVE STATE LAWS! Unbelievable. This is an extremist, political attempt to take away women’s freedom to make their own private medical decisions. It not only threatens women’s health — but also the FDA approval process and patient access to other medications. **I will do everything in my power to secure abortion access in North Carolina. Like the majority of Americans and North Carolinians, I believe that reproductive choice is a fundamental right. I believe that we must never go back.** But Peter, North Carolina Republicans have made it clear that banning abortion _is_ their plan for our state. We can’t know what dangerous legislation they may push through in coming months — but we can start preparing NOW to hold them accountable. **[I am asking every one of my supporters to donate whatever you can tonight. name: Christina Reynolds, EMILYs List
subject: BREAKING: A federal judge just attempted to ban an essential abortion medication *nationwide*
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | They won't stop at this, Peter.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61471923/400188507/-505727010?sourceid=1048878&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmFjODUyMC1hNWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tY5GYGrDb8JO3yqNIQej784LpsrFFCx7igKdMUE6RhE=&emci=e90fb696-80b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1fac8520-a5d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **BREAKING NEWS: A federal judge just ordered the FDA to reverse its approval of a safe and essential abortion medication in _all 50 states._** Mifepristone, a key drug used in medication abortion, was approved by the FDA in 2000, and has since been used by millions to safely terminate pregnancy and treat miscarriage. In fact, it's used in _more than half_ of all abortions in the United States.

Today, after a baseless lawsuit filed by an anti-choice hate group, a Trump-appointed judge in Texas has ordered the FDA to suspend its approval for mifepristone in seven days. That's right — after more than _two decades_ of approval, the FDA is now being ordered to change its stance.

This ruling is an attempt to ban the use of mifepristone in all 50 states.

We knew that conservative extremists wouldn't stop once they'd overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , and they won't stop at banning mifepristone, either. This ruling is absolutely devastating for women and families across the country, but it's _not_ the end of these attacks.

The truth is that anti-choice Republicans won't stop until they've banned every type of abortion in every state, county, and town in America — **or until we stop _them_**. ****Here at EMILYs List, we work hard to elect women at _every level of government_ and in _every corner of the country_ who are as committed as we are to defending the right to choose. Donate now to help our candidates protect and restore reproductive freedom everywhere:**

clean_body: | | | They won't stop at this, Peter. BREAKING NEWS: A federal judge just ordered the FDA to reverse its approval of a safe and essential abortion medication in all 50 states. Mifepristone, a key drug used in medication abortion, was approved by the FDA in 2000, and has since been used by millions to safely terminate pregnancy and treat miscarriage. In fact, it's used in more than half of all abortions in the United States. Today, after a baseless lawsuit filed by an anti-choice hate group, a Trump-appointed judge in Texas has ordered the FDA to suspend its approval for mifepristone in seven days. That's right — after more than two decades of approval, the FDA is now being ordered to change its stance. This ruling is an attempt to ban the use of mifepristone in all 50 states. We knew that conservative extremists wouldn't stop once they'd overturned Roe v. Wade , and they won't stop at banning mifepristone, either. This ruling is absolutely devastating for women and families across the country, but it's not the end of these attacks. The truth is that anti-choice Republicans won't stop until they've banned every type of abortion in every state, county, and town in America — or until we stop them. **Here at EMILYs List, we work hard to elect women at every level of government and in every corner of the country who are as committed as we are to defending the right to choose. name: Ron Wyden
subject: What you need to know about today's court decision on abortion medication
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61472029/400196355/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzhhZjk2Yy1hOGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1EB2tMgCxDvXo01aJ3fxoJiNNcPJTqIrp9bB9rckoc8=&emci=a131598b-9ad5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=678af96c-a8d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **As you might have already heard, late this afternoon, a right-wing judge in Texas issued a nationwide ban on access to the abortion medication mifepristone, which will go into effect in seven days, unless the 5th Circuit acts.** This ruling will **ban the most common method of abortion in ALL 50 states**. The consequences this ban will have on women cannot be overstated. **That's** **exactly why I'm calling on the Biden administration to ignore this illegitimate ruling and keep mifepristone on the market and accessible to everyone that needs it.** But in the meantime, other abortion medications are still available. And if you're in Oregon and need help, you can call the Oregon Attorney General's new Reproductive Rights Hotline at (503) 431-6460, where legal questions will be answered on a pro bono (cost-free) basis by attorneys in participating law firms. **This case is yet another example of conservatives' grotesque obsession with controlling women's bodies and infringing on Americans' privacy and reproductive freedom.** I held the first Congressional hearing on protecting access to mifepristone back in 1990. Over 30 years later and I am still fighting with everything I've got to protect access to reproductive care. I'm in this fight all the way. More soon, _Ron_ |
---|---|---

clean_body: | | | | As you might have already heard, late this afternoon, a right-wing judge in Texas issued a nationwide ban on access to the abortion medication mifepristone, which will go into effect in seven days, unless the 5th Circuit acts. This ruling will ban the most common method of abortion in ALL 50 states. The consequences this ban will have on women cannot be overstated. That's exactly why I'm calling on the Biden administration to ignore this illegitimate ruling and keep mifepristone on the market and accessible to everyone that needs it. But in the meantime, other abortion medications are still available. And if you're in Oregon and need help, you can call the Oregon Attorney General's new Reproductive Rights Hotline at (503) 431-6460, where legal questions will be answered on a pro bono (cost-free) basis by attorneys in participating law firms. This case is yet another example of conservatives' grotesque obsession with controlling women's bodies and infringing on Americans' privacy and reproductive freedom. I held the first Congressional hearing on protecting access to mifepristone back in 1990. Over 30 years later and I am still fighting with everything I've got to protect access to reproductive care. I'm in this fight all the way. More soon, Ron | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. | | | Fellow Patriot,

When Joe Biden and Anthony Fauci tried to shove COVID nonsense down our throats, I was proud to lead the charge against them on behalf of Mississippi.
_**We banned vaccine mandates in Mississippi, and now, we’re finding out that we were right all along.**_
New studies show that vaccine mandates were completely ineffective - and only served to keep businesses closed and our economy down.
In Mississippi, YOU choose what to put into your body - not the government.****

name: Letitia James
subject: BREAKING NEWS update on abortion access
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | **BREAKING NEWS:
Texas judge strikes down the FDA approval of a key abortion pill – a move that will limit abortion access ACROSS the nation.**
---

Peter, just as we feared, Republicans have wasted no time in turning the lack of abortion protection into a restriction for _millions_.

**Moments ago, a Texas federal judge handed down a decision that could take one of the most popular abortion pills in the _nation_ off the market. This move will affect 40 MILLION Americans across the nation. Thankfully, the decision does not effect immediately, and the federal government has seven days to appeal.**

To say I’m angry is an understatement. Because we _knew_ Republicans weren’t going to stop at Roe v. Wade. We _knew_ they were going to use the new lack of protection for reproductive rights as an invitation to strip these rights away from as many people as possible. And we _know_ that the GOP’s crusade against reproductive rights is far from over.

That’s why I vow to never relent in my fight for reproductive freedom. I vow to do everything in my power to ensure that New York _remains_ a safe haven for all those seeking abortion. And I vow to use my position as New York’s attorney general to support and defend people struggling with abortion restrictions in other states.

**But, Peter, we’re only stronger together. That’s why I’m counting on _you_****to contribute to my emergency fundraiser ASAP so I can continue to fight for reproductive freedom.**

**[So I’m humbly asking: Will you donate whatever you can spare right now to power my fight against archaic abortion restrictions? Defending reproductive rights is going to require all of us working together. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61472326/400205466/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1011-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmZiYWI5Mi1hZGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3fI7mrkZob6EL25_qeUOLGrxd77kR27c3o5fvsuqC6k=)**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61472327/400205467/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1011-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmZiYWI5Mi1hZGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3fI7mrkZob6EL25_qeUOLGrxd77kR27c3o5fvsuqC6k=)

subject: The GOP has chosen to abuse their power
body:
|
#
---

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Can we REALLY trust Colorado elections?
body:
Episode #3 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter, _**Was the election stolen?**_ Oh... the infamous question that every liberal media outlet asked me relentlessly on the campaign trail. I'd answer the question and pivot to the issues Coloradans cared about - crime, kids, and the cost of living... over and over. The Democrat-funded media in Colorado had a job to do - drive Democrat outrage over Trump, abortion, and the election question. They desperately tied conservative candidates to those issues and drove election distrust with Republican voters so that they wouldn't bother to vote. About 75% of Republicans in Colorado voted? We can't win here with numbers like that. Polis and Dems know that. **That was exactly what they wanted.** On this week's NEW episode of Unleashed, we're diving deep into all the truths and lies behind election integrity with guest experts Shawn Smith ([Cause of America](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-y/)) and Ned Jones ([Election Integrity Network](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-j/)).
### **Episode #3 - WAS THE ELECTION STOLEN?**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-t/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-i/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-d/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-h/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-k/)_
## **ICYMI: A weekly recap of some lies exposed and truths UNLEASHED...**
### **1\. Dana Perino and The Five think Jared Polis should be a first thought for a democratic (or libertarian?) 2024 Presidential candidate.**
Based on the comment section of [this post on Instagram](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-b/), you all strongly disagree. And so does the Libertarian Party of Colorado -- who jumped into the conversation [via Twitter](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-n/) with a 25-part thread detailing all of the reasons why Jared Polis is NOT a libertarian. I invited Dana Perino to come on Unleashed to discuss. I think she needs to know the LIES about her buddy Jared Polis. And the TRUTH about how he's destroyed her home state of Colorado... we'll see if she bites on the invitation. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-p/)
### **2\. Fox News Digital releases an article on the secrets being kept from Colorado parents regarding their kids' "in-school social transitions".**
Does this warrant an "I told you so"? There's so much that schools are hiding from parents. From dangers like unreported crimes and assaults, to our children's well-being and identity... Check out my [reel on Instagram](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-x/) for some highlights from the article, or read the [full article here](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-m/). [Episodes 1 & 2 of Unleashed](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-c/) go into more detail on how they're hiding this info from you and what parents like Erin Lee, John & Maria Castillo, and Max Schachter are doing to fight for transparency. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-q/)
### **3\. Max Schachter shares the impressive wholesale changes they've made in the state of Florida to ALL K-12 public schools following the Parkland shooting.**
This is what CONSISTENCY, ACTION and great LEADERSHIP look like when it comes to school safety. [On last week's episode of Unleashed](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-a/), Max shared the wholesale changes they've made in the state of Florida to ALL K-12 public schools. These changes were the result of FIVE YEARS of the Marjory Stone Douglas School Safety Committee meeting and offering recommendations. All of this can be replicated and modeled in other states. 🔘 Armed School Safety Officer on EVERY K-12 campus (4,000 public schools)
🔘 Guardians (non-officer/school personnel with conceal carry, rigorous training by Sheriff's office)
🔘 Threat Assessment teams in every school
🔘 Panic Apps in every school
🔘 Anonymous Threat Reporting System (we have this here in CO)
🔘 School Safety Dashboard (parents, schools, legislators, and law enforcement can see incidents of violence/drugs inside K-12 public schools)He talks about all of this and more during our interview which I've clipped for convenience, now live on my [YouTube](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-f/) and [Rumble](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-z/). Make sure to check out the dashboard he's built plus all of the amazing work Max is doing for school safety at [safeschoolsforalex.org](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-v/). [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-e/) I hope you've enjoyed _Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl_ so far. If you feel inclined, we'd love for you to rate and review the show! This is a huge (but easy) way you can help the show grow. You should be able to do this easily from any platform you listen on. See you next week!Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-s/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-g/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-w/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-yd/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-yh/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-yk/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-qurkhty-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-yu) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-u-qurkhty-ttjjilthht-jl/)
---

| _** Special Announcement! **_**The Ultimate Water Filtration System is BACK!**[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**NASHVILLE, TN** – You've been calling, emailing and leaving Facebook messages. And now there's a "flood" of good news to share...[**YES! The Ultimate Water Filtration System is BACK**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while.In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. Now we've just got a fresh batch in. And you're among the first to find out and get yours.Because you know that drinking plenty of water is essential to your health. But drinking safer, cleaner water is even more important.**_This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!_** It's no wonder you've been eager to get your hands on one or more Ultimate Water Filtration Systems!This table-top unit targets 200+ contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals and more.**Its advanced filtration technology makes it almost unfair to even be on the market!** And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out.Right now, you can get your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems on a convenient, no-credit-check payment plan. We know you're good for it.[**Make sure to grab the "Best Deal" option so you can get this special bundle of 9 FREE bonuses:**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-g1xhgkLed8zGFYd13RWQ)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
* Two (2) Patriot Pure Personal Water Filters
* Patriot Power Cell
* 72-Hour Survival Food Kit
* The Water Survival Digital Guide
* What's in your Tap Water Digital Guide
* $25 OFF Your Next Order
* FREE Shipping and Handling
* FREE Lifetime Technical Support

**But hurry – we have limited stock, and these Ultimate Water Fitration Systems are first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.** The best part is...You'll have the **peace of mind** knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come.[**Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-tO1w) To your survival,Frank Bates
Patriot HeadquartersP.S. Derrick loves the convenience of his Ultimate Water Filtration System:
> _"It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water."_
**More Raving Reviews From 4Patriots Customers!**| | **Cyndi L.** No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others.
---|---
| **Michael B.** Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time.
---|---
| **Faith P.** Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water.
---|---
| **Carol B.** Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious.
---|---
| **Rick O.** Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you.
---|---
| **Thomas P.** Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day.
---|---
[**Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._FXEheqK0zFXp6w)
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDk4LWY0MDdhMzZiMGViNTRkZTM5MzEwYzlhYTAxMGVlNzUyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/B1YBjcMTKegmlYhifg6_mA) to unsubscribe.

This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. name: Mike Lee
subject: Here’s how we can wipe out socialism in our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6tf4ddm3g1kjftumfv5t2vdfuqn6io5no38adqg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)
Friend,

Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide, and our children are being influenced to adopt radical beliefs that could destroy our culture and our Republic.

Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that could help turn the tide, educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism, and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhb1qkj6l7l9gmv4gm0t1oh6prat6kil6nne46qg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)
Connor helped me get elected back in 2010. Since then, he founded the Libertas Institute, a free market think tank headquartered in our home state, Utah. Connor was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins series when he was unable to find a way to teach his own kids about the ideas of freedom.

So far, Connor has distributed over 4 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. **Connor is leading the fight against socialist indoctrination in our schools, creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. **

[**Here is how Connor and the Libertas Institute plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3ubpf9h269mh5jjurpnpedmqintu3apg55fqf2o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)
1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history will receive copies for education at home.
2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.
3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [**It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdobfh84pa79ghmf70a5hhsa2lk3dpcle83g77so_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)

**The reality is neither Rand Paul, Ted Cruz, nor myself can defeat socialism alone ... we need a new generation of young conservatives willing to stand up for the Constitution and our freedoms.**

You and I can help save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with the Tuttle Twins books!

**I spoke with Connor Boyack, the President of the Libertas Institute and author of the books, and gave him my word I would help him raise $20,000 to fund the distribution of the Tuttle Twins books to homeschool children, parents, and kids in public schools.** [**Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu8c39e83m1c9rfuasmej1l21lgdmlq7s2f78kd8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)

***PLEASE NOTE: All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute 's biggest supporters, John P. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift.***

[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 >>>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbfphc1s5m28b3q4h3vdfg9m78c2dg7chf73kf4o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)
[**Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 >>>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgmct4kakesuce0n0g9tfe77ve6ehrrj4vrvgq18_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)
[**Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 >>>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqdtp5l9anjeagqfo43siiijb0e0n3rm1rme6e3o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)
[**Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 >>>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmkrdrk81ibemffbcg8mmjtta6pnl944g4ioiet8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)
[**Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 >>>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z24ofdh1ro22kld1n9i7gfu92eshrthecvvrg8o0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)
[**Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 >>>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlqvdok348532o0ahvbnal4or4huf0js3cht6nc8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)
[**Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 >>>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu1u29c7lprtin0sbuuio0tpfpi8i83qlu7mf640_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za64ga9m1ehggcsoncrpmbqc8l2gebov91135h0g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)

The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them.

Parents aren't forcing their kids to read them. They are written for children to enjoy and learn at the same time.

**This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. You and I can create a new generation of young conservatives to preserve our Republic. **

As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine, and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and one of our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools.

[**Please help me raise $20,000 in the next 48 hours by clicking here to make a donation and distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to thousands of kids across the country!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztvmk7njs45p1j3e0s5egqq3eab1cdupjk51gm7g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)

I suspect you get a dozen emails asking you to donate every week.

This is much different.

This isn't for some campaign or candidate that needs money.

This is a cause I am passionate about and believe can reverse the influence of socialism in our society. We just need to distribute these books and begin teaching our nation's youth about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history.

It seems like you love our country, the ideas of liberty, and the Constitution as much as I do.

Which is why I am emailing you.

Please consider making the most generous donation you can and help me restore our Republic.

Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me.

[**Here is the link to donate again.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7buplmqtavfc2r5vp1n9tkno1thr32n859m6dgg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o34cdh2bs)

Senator Mike Lee

Paid for by Libertas Institute

Pro Life Update
---

name: Your America
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.

| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy. ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15531%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3U1ymSu4RqrmtZ9o9EOUVA&sysid=1) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on ... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15532%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QenUxApsNj5Z8%2fzxXO50rQ&sysid=1) [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15533%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PE6wTOD50KzCSZxGVXf3hQ&sysid=1)

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Are you paying attention?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
One of the most critical deadlines of 2023 is here.

| |
---
| | | I'll be blunt.

One of the **_most critical_** deadlines of 2023 is here. If we miss this goal, you can say goodbye to our America First agenda and hello to 2 more years of Biden and Schumer's destructive plans.

**Here 's where we stand:**
\- Our border remains wide open.
\- Crime is rampant.
\- Inflation is devastating hard-working Americans.
\- Big Tech continues to censor our voices.
\- Democrats continue to assault election integrity voter laws.
\- Indoctrination in our education system remains unchecked.
\- and Pelosi just took Hakeem Jeffries on a national fundraising tour with the biggest liberal, megadonors in their elitist circles to __**DOUBLE DOWN**__ on their destructive agenda!

Are you paying attention? The cards are stacked against us, and our majority in the house is on thin ice. If Democrats keep fundraising at this pace, 2024 is already set in stone. We must fight back, and we must start NOW. **[Please rush $15 by midnight to help us crush our deadline!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9d51c7g14m7eurfudrirlirli16i03sedrsf7g8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o32cph2bs "Please rush $15 by midnight to help us crushthis deadline!")**

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7ikgpua40c98qs0bft15hh30rh46cmfakniuad0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o33c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zunq58kecbi0jq8bobooieopgd5a9av2k82c2648_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o33c9h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zurivecf4p1reup5hujrff3m6pjktk36jnr812vg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o33c9h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl19n71hmrle3eflhnk3db8hlhcq6uj8m1j98ufg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshg61o34sdi648d245p25oh4cdge0p71c3g66oj24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsssf480abk5cluu848rhspt9j4tuigpusjks2k8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm1o33c9h2bs)_

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: “136 YEARS IN PRISON, maximum sentence”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Our country is dying, but we will save it!

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuc0b5hel5k2m1or3dmv1qbjvoe7j1katcf1dhao_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm9o76clh2bs)
---
Friend,
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved - to hear that I could face **136 YEARS IN PRISON** for having committed **NO CRIME**.
But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself.
I felt sorry for our country - because this is _NOT_ America.
Let me assure you - I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_**These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election.**_
Winning in 2024 is about more than just an election. It’s about the survival of our Free Republic.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I have never been more determined than I am right now.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkd9bku22gofdcp5n3n1ssgv5eagdr3jij1grj9g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjgm9o71c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.

---
Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA. | Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about. In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy. Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission. They spied on my campaign. They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier. And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice. They have crossed one line after another. They have no shame. They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense. Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it. EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt. These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated. Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought. We will be one country again. Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom. Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:

We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**

# Celebrating Easter Sunday
# Christ has Risen
---
| | |
---|---
|
Dear Peter,

As we approach Easter also known as Resurrection Sunday, I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a very happy and blessed Easter!

For Christians around the world, Easter is one of the most important holidays of the year, and it holds deep significance for our faith.

At the heart of Easter is the story of Jesus Christ and his resurrection.
It is a time to remember the sacrifice that Jesus made for us and to celebrate his victory over death and sin. Through his resurrection, Jesus showed us that there is hope beyond despair, and that the promise of new life is available to
all who believe.

One of my favorite scripture verses about Easter is from the book of 1
Peter, chapter 1, verse 3: "Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ!

According to His great mercy, He has caused us to be born again to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead." This verse speaks to the incredible hope and new life that we are given through Jesus' resurrection and reminds us of the great love and mercy of God.

Easter is also a time of renewal, as we celebrate the coming of spring and the promise of new beginnings. It is a time to reflect on the blessings in our lives and to renew our faith in God and in each other. It is a time to come together as a community and to share in the joy and hope that this holiday brings.

As we celebrate Easter this year, I pray that it will be a time of joy, renewal, and hope for you and your loved ones. May the blessings of Easter fill your heart and bring you peace and happiness.

Warmest wishes for a happy Easter,
|

name: Faith Journeys (via SFA Fund, Inc.)
subject: Holy Week is about a personal walk with God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA Fund, Inc
body:
Our culture needs more stories like thisstory...
| | | During Holy Week, Christians unite their lives to the journey of Christ to Calvary. Everyone's walk with God is personal, but more and more, talking about faith in American culture has become viewed as "taboo," "offensive," or "judgmental."

With church attendance and religion at record lows in our country, sharing stories of faith has never been more important to restoring our common cause for a good and moral society.

This week, we wanted to highlight a leader who, through sharing her personal walk with God, has inspired so many Americans. That leader is 2024 Presidential candidate Nikki Haley.
| _**Nikki Haley's Personal Faith Journey**_ As the daughter of Indian immigrants, Nikki was born into a Sikh family. Her parents are very serious about their Sikh faith and taught their children to respect everyone's personal relationship with God.

When Nikki's parents first arrived in Bamberg, South Carolina, the town worked hard to convert them, and they accepted invitations to visit various congregations.

From childhood, Nikki was exposed to many different faiths and converted to Christianity because the teachings of Christ in the Gospels spoke to her in a way that she understood.

She knows that she was free to choose her faith because of her parents' choice to raise their children in the United States. And she doesn't take it for granted.

Freedom and faith must be fought for if we're going to restore conservative, Christian values in America. Now, Nikki is running for president to defend freedom and religious liberty in America. **[**DEFEND FAITH AND FREEDOM**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534204:6n7E3eGKN:m:1:3331421248:4689F487D37A640059AD47836C6250D0:r)**
---

We are blessed to live in a country where we have the freedom to choose and live out our faith.

That is the very essence of the American Dream that Nikki Haley's parents pursued, but it is quickly being eroded by Biden and the radical Left.

[**If you share Nikki Haley 's vision of an America where freedom and faith are protected, chip in to support her fight here.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534204:6n7E3eGKN:m:1:3331421248:4689F487D37A640059AD47836C6250D0:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534205:6n7E3eGKN:m:1:3331421248:4689F487D37A640059AD47836C6250D0:r) **[**CLAIM YOUR SPOT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534205:6n7E3eGKN:m:1:3331421248:4689F487D37A640059AD47836C6250D0:r)** |
Not everyone can say they were on Team Haley from the very beginning, and we want YOU to be part of Nikki's journey to the White House every step of the way!

We're only adding new names to our Team Haley Founding Members Club until midnight tonight so secure your spot NOW.

As a member of Team Haley, you'll get exclusive updates from the campaign trail and be FIRST to know about upcoming events and announcements. While Nikki is on the road, you'll be right alongside for the ride with a front-row view of all the action!

[**Just make a donation before midnight to unlock your access!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534205:6n7E3eGKN:m:1:3331421248:4689F487D37A640059AD47836C6250D0:r)

I can't believe how fast I became public enemy #1 of the Radical Democrats.

Joe Biden's Treasury Department is **STONEWALLING** our oversight investigations... Hunter Biden **LAWYERED UP** when I mentioned the word "subpoena"... The Liberal Media is **SMEARING** my name across the airwaves... Pete Buttigieg just **ATTACKED** me on social media when I discussed a probe into his agency...

_**[After all the corruption, scandals, and cover-ups by Radical Democrats that we're exposing, I won't let them intimidate me into silence. But I need your help to fight back. So I'm personally asking everyone getting this email to stand with House Republicans by chipping in JUST five bucks a piece.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkmgtvjeujbqdvg4l9rei59s667u35t23jrpi408_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimcob4cdh2bs "After all the corruption, scandals, and cover-ups by Radical Democrats that we’ve begun exposing, I won’t let them intimidate me into silence. But I need your help to fight back. So I’m personally asking everyone getting this email to stand with House Republicans by chipping in JUST five bucks a piece.")**_

It's no surprise they're desperate to stop our important work...

They've been let off the hook for YEARS with Nancy Pelosi in charge of accountability. Biden and the Radical Democrats were NEVER forced to answer for anything.

No one held them accountable... and they took full advantage.

**As the GOP 's lead investigator, I promise you they will now. **

But going up against the Liberal powers at be is a monumental undertaking. They've tried trashing my reputation, jamming up my investigations, and threatening our House Majority. The only thing that can stop them is the power of our ENTIRE grassroots standing up and fighting back.

_**[Are you with me? I'm counting on it.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmrfc2b6v3g5i7lr9eja7u1d7umel59tt0j12dn0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimcob4cdh2bs "Are you with me? I’m counting on it.")**_

name: Ready for Ron
subject: Our bottom line is we do not surrender to the woke mob
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534191:JHmW3eGYN:m:1:3365131770:E622CCDAE04D319016A2354E9A7F92E7:r)
---
| | Fellow American. "Our bottom line is we do not surrender to the woke mob. Florida is where woke goes to die." Those were the words of Governor Ron DeSantis made in a recent speech in Michigan. The differences between Florida and Michigan could not be more stark. Michigan is a state that was rebounding from the recession until Democrats took over, repealed Right-To-Work, increased taxes, and sent their economy into a freefall. Meanwhile, Florida, under the leadership of Ron DeSantis has seen an enormous economic boom all while passing policies to protect families, business owners, and taxpayers. What do you want our nation to look more like, Michigan or Florida? A state on the brink of disaster or a state that is prospering? The only way to take the Florida Blueprint nationwide is to elect Ron DeSantis as our 47th President in November of 2024. And that's exactly what we intend to do. [**If you agree, I 'm asking you to make a donation of any amount today to help us build the grassroots team that Ron DeSantis needs the second he announces his campaign for President.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534191:JHmW3eGYN:m:1:3365131770:E622CCDAE04D319016A2354E9A7F92E7:r) Ready for Ron has already gathering signatures from nearly 250,000 individuals calling for Ron DeSantis to run for President. And we're not slowing down. In fact, we're gearing up to run even more digital and TV ads, hire more grassroots organizers, and connect with millions more voters. But we can't do that with your help. [**So please, if you think that America needs Ron DeSantis and the Florida Blueprint in the Oval Office, make a donation of any amount to Ready for Ron today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534191:JHmW3eGYN:m:1:3365131770:E622CCDAE04D319016A2354E9A7F92E7:r)
---
| | [**DONATE $50 NOW**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534191:JHmW3eGYN:m:1:3365131770:E622CCDAE04D319016A2354E9A7F92E7:r)
---
| | Governor DeSantis has boldly taken on dangerous woke ideology in Florida. Now, we need Governor DeSantis to take on and destroy wokeness from coast to coast. It's up to us to build a massive wave of grassroots support so if - and when - he announces he's in, he'll have the grassroots army to lead to victory. And we can only do that with your help.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American. "Our bottom line is we do not surrender to the woke mob. Florida is where woke goes to die." Those were the words of Governor Ron DeSantis made in a recent speech in Michigan. The differences between Florida and Michigan could not be more stark. Michigan is a state that was rebounding from the recession until Democrats took over, repealed Right-To-Work, increased taxes, and sent their economy into a freefall. Meanwhile, Florida, under the leadership of Ron DeSantis has seen an enormous economic boom all while passing policies to protect families, business owners, and taxpayers. What do you want our nation to look more like, Michigan or Florida? A state on the brink of disaster or a state that is prospering? The only way to take the Florida Blueprint nationwide is to elect Ron DeSantis as our 47th President in November of 2024. And that's exactly what we intend to do. Ready for Ron has already gathering signatures from nearly 250,000 individuals calling for Ron DeSantis to run for President. And we're not slowing down. In fact, we're gearing up to run even more digital and TV ads, hire more grassroots organizers, and connect with millions more voters. body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zumqoqpn8f9ihm4sfh8u4g1n775l753qs27h4lrg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimcob4c3h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeqo60ii7i68fd3tf4t9ahnj2hq1lpsf8781t9tg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimcob4c3h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3ob2g1i5nc1anig0u17vekiasl2fvkmpicgenao_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimcob4c3h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Support the January 6th Families**

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1q2hhe7e85oug3cejofv0rqllnii4ulpr4nfejg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimcob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhet163l61mmbelogjb16lp1gntuahj4hirm8dv0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimcob4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6cdeja0rj40s6e9jh01mjs395g2kj9tl39u8u28_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimcob4c3h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z733nf1nldc0rbb1njpob3s9vqphrinu9l9m3f3o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimcob4c3h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbqftbdhvjls77tlcv7av953hh2mg36hhbkvess0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimcob4c3h2bs)

Kash Patel

body:
Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House -

| |

invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we’re going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we’re going to need you with us.**

---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It’s the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I have never been more determined than I am right now.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhr0a6t8hsbenn9eshfe5eujlu78p8700kpeh59o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimaoj1cph2bs)
---
Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi1nlpqdje1kav85j77q7eluoiljrjuobcjd8ok8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimaoj1cph2bs)**
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z97986omoqk9p7qf5h0v27pn66ma6uo0tk07gbpg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimaoj1cph2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zni7ek4hoqc1e2el0dsgstggm8knpplcq45d5k2o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimaoj1cph2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z91m7veqvpa8mjt8r6sdcnse20p68jljbcde4900_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimaoj1cph2bs)
---
Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z64aq2t96143jd4jp1let9kmm1hu3lpqi879mc6g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimaoj1cph2bs)
---
Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj822kng5002ecc4nioi5tel52agpubkmilgu89o_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimeo32cjh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpqtq8dq9vtl4543v090pcrr3mkmkqkdbkj56t08_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimeo32cjh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1lc8enanaqibpnq619s124g893o0a2pfrdq1290_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjimeo32cjh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

name: Tom Fitton
