body:
| |
---
| | | **State of the Union 2023: Biden re-ups amnesty call for illegal immigrants, GOP reps yell 'secure the border'**
**_FOX NEWS_**
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534124:JgqSMeGwN:m:1:3391001263:8ED09A58CD14A5F586A2429004BC8D7F:r)

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534124:JgqSMeGwN:m:1:3391001263:8ED09A58CD14A5F586A2429004BC8D7F:r "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | **" That's why this is the moment to make sure that, when the Judge examines your life, you have placed your faith in Jesus Christ's death and resurrection for the forgiveness of your sins."**
In light of Trump's arrest, the great Rev. Franklin Graham just spoke out on what will guide us through any trying time.
Because at this moment, America needs God more than ever.
**Faith in God in America is already at an all-time low.**
**Democrats have just pledged $45 million to wipe out Christian Republicans.**
**And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.**
Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Republicans will never show up to the polls again. Then they'll have free reign to trample our religious liberties.
[**So today we 're PLEADING for every faithful Christian conservative reading this message to add their name and stand with us against the WORST political Witch Hunt in American history.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534306:JVcJzeGEN:m:1:3331421248:ABF6673F73FD242CEC34DD8A0B9C892B:r)

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c696fcfc35144788ad35c0edd388569b&_e=GeqEnoUL149tfMu9KKJUyl0n1Y35XxbGV3Fba6RRkWdEi7lMuY0PCxPbmKTMkgj1g12b75aro6-oq8N5fAI6HSyu2eJ23D8MVHQkdGSgv8wfOpLeUQ1sGuJhNTj85J3oJ4IWJoIq2yiDB8Vie-X-xj3FEqplVDaBrBs6q-kZoRQtsoc_xAodgl32bFM_ByNN2CIKW4g5gb09_zl80aYtKYifsuRqcmP6VNbI4DdX_MERChx7hNdsom4Gg65gQcxUQ4PPg5LbS-l43J9AGtK22w%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c696fcfc35144788ad35c0edd388569b&_e=GeqEnoUL149tfMu9KKJUyl0n1Y35XxbGV3Fba6RRkWdEi7lMuY0PCxPbmKTMkgj1g12b75aro6-oq8N5fAI6HSyu2eJ23D8MVHQkdGSgv8wfOpLeUQ1sGuJhNTj85J3o9Ua6Iu-cMpP2xEnbeeQv90uLicxhpZd939X95vx3-_sf44N8cmy98kr8yOEHPHNTF5HsKerWVzNSF-wcVA4exqBSIfQGPwCzfwruTB7HmCOD05CiMduF4pnZVmPQOtVuxY1wBZC5xeFNEpeWxj1yFA%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c696fcfc35144788ad35c0edd388569b&_e=GeqEnoUL149tfMu9KKJUyl0n1Y35XxbGV3Fba6RRkWdEi7lMuY0PCxPbmKTMkgj1g12b75aro6-oq8N5fAI6HSyu2eJ23D8MVHQkdGSgv8wfOpLeUQ1sGuJhNTj85J3oh_L7ueLnaV5asaEoS-PNQLzrENTT3SmAHOaCAst6Bk75MfVYBXzg-J1Bui36s5Gi4zuDrL1pcz9hwKeifG9KgxvLnVFiqE7DMWkYp1iHUjH48dG2GUThgk0JzH2SOqkSg9JJ5nVj3QUi2TmUQoBA7A%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c696fcfc35144788ad35c0edd388569b&_e=GeqEnoUL149tfMu9KKJUyl0n1Y35XxbGV3Fba6RRkWdEi7lMuY0PCxPbmKTMkgj1g12b75aro6-oq8N5fAI6HSyu2eJ23D8MVHQkdGSgv8wfOpLeUQ1sGuJhNTj85J3opTJnQN__Jg7pvD-Vb1-bWwAD-lR3bOvcc937woawh5OWxQ1JwA2H7rNDhIi56vsCu1QXjHh-pVrbxhUW6sXeND81ebaifaLwAFG53SMXyCipj8xUZgIsCXulrk38hFndMA2FzqLw_Y6D6k243Lu-vA%3D%3D)

name: Allen West
subject: Wolves at our door
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534262:6z05zeGN7:m:1:3365131770:E6DE4445517E75188C254D9CEDB80987:r)
---
| | Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject? It's time to decide. Because there is a well-funded, well-organized and growing movement to take away the single most important Constitutional Freedom that keeps us free ... The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ... It's your Right to KEEP AND BEAR ARMS -- and it's the one you're in imminent danger of losing if we, the people, don't stand up to protect it. [**Will you take a stand for your Second Amendment Rights today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534262:6z05zeGN7:m:1:3365131770:E6DE4445517E75188C254D9CEDB80987:r) My friend, there's reason I was issued a rifle when I joined the Army ... It's because when all else fails, a firearm is ultimately what determines who's in charge. I know it... You know it ... **That's why Joe Biden and his friends on the Radical Left want you dis-armed.** They'd much rather RULE over SUBJECTS than ANSWER to CITIZENS! There are a lot of groups out there "pledging" to protect your Second Amendment Rights. You've probably got a drawer full of their folding knives ... A few of their duffle bags ... Maybe even a vest or a membership card in your wallet. BUT HERE'S THE THING ... After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been? But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute. The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ... [**Will you join the growing membership of the Second Amendment Institute through a donation today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534262:6z05zeGN7:m:1:3365131770:E6DE4445517E75188C254D9CEDB80987:r) Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us:
---
* Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ... * Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses * Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators * Our National Conferences and Online Community
---
You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!! But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! [**Can you spare a donation to join the Second Amendment Institute and save your Second Amendment Right to bear arms **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534262:6z05zeGN7:m:1:3365131770:E6DE4445517E75188C254D9CEDB80987:r)**_today?_** If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different! But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms. Now let's get to work together. God bless you and God Bless America,
---
---
Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret) Member, 112th US Congress
---
P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost. That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if [**everyone I write to today could spare a gift, that should just about cover what they have planned in the months ahead, and even allow them to grow their outreach **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534262:6z05zeGN7:m:1:3365131770:E6DE4445517E75188C254D9CEDB80987:r)**_efforts._**
---

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Bank Accounts: Frozen!
body:
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. In 2022, it hit closer to home -- in Canada. The government used its 1988 Emergency Act to freeze the bank accounts of hundreds of striking truckers. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. |
---
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.
See front page is right here _a_
It gives the Fed the power to track and potentially even control your checking account.
Not just the money you have in your account at the moment ...
But also, every single check, withdrawal, deposit~~,~~ and transaction.
Practically everything you do with your money!

clean_body: The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan. | | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. In 2022, it hit closer to home -- in Canada. The government used its 1988 Emergency Act to freeze the bank accounts of hundreds of striking truckers. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. | The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan. See front page is right here a It gives the Fed the power to track and potentially even control your checking account. Not just the money you have in your account at the moment ... But also, every single check, withdrawal, deposit~~,~~ and transaction. Practically everything you do with your money! Be sure to do so with urgency. A pilot program is already underway. The next step is to roll it out to nearly every bank in America. . Good luck and God bless! Martin D. Weiss, PhD Weiss Ratings Founder P.S. This is not about a digital currency. It's very different. 11780 US Highway 1 Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33408-3080 Copyright (C) 2023 Weiss Ratings. All rights reserved. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

| | Rep. Jack Bergman used a line of rhetorical questioning in a recent hearing to join GOP colleagues in their accusation that diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) in the armed forces creates division, harms recruitment, and damages the command structure.
Since Truman's executive order ended segregation in the US military, our armed forces have focused on diversity, equity, and inclusion. The term DEI might be new, but the efforts are not. For over 75 years, the US has had the most diverse military force in the world, and by nearly every measure, it's been positive. Bergman, who doesn't believe in the worth of DEI, asked DoD, Army, Navy, and Air Force panel members if DEI's impact on various personnel issues — readiness, recruitment, and command — has been positive or negative. They responded one by one. "Positive. Positive. Positive. Definitely positive."
Their expert answers may have disappointed our Representative, but not American military families. Our Representative implied that the advancement of DEI initiatives causes the DoD's recruitment crisis. DEI is a solution, not the problem. Bergman's opposition to diversity, equity, and inclusion in the armed forces devalues the abilities of hundreds of thousands of current and future service members. DEI has intrinsic value beyond metrics. We have so many defense roles to fill. Rep. Bergman only reiterated combat 'fighting' roles. Yet, over 80% of our DoD jobs are non-combat. In any modern workplace, it's beneficial to celebrate everyone's diversity, promote fairness and justice in their treatment, and provide everyone with a sense of belonging, especially in service to their country. Bergman joins a panel of GOP colleagues who hammered the DoD's DEI efforts as "wokeness." He said his questioning intended to tee up next year's hearing by "reviewing the numbers to show that DEI is positive... and not just posturing." Anyone who devalues to abilities of our service members doesn't belong in Congress and it's one of the many reasons I'm running to de-elect Jack Bergman. We all deserve someone significantly more in touch with the American people. To join my fight to replace Bergman, [donate now.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/efOTWK4fS/c?w=02VDE4Brk_1t5geR_7gQrA_H47KMqXrlENqyIR_sHyo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjNmYWZiZDg1LWNhZmQtNGRjYy1hNDljLTAxZGQ2Yzg0MTc3OSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)

Bergman's claim that diversity in military is harmful "posturing" | | The implication that DEI is to blame for a lull in recruitment is intellectually dishonest. getting to Congress to challenge this absurdity. | | | | If we want a Representative who believes, understands, and supports all Americans and modern data-driven solutions to defense, I'm asking constituents to in de-electing Jack Bergman. Ensure all members of the military are treated with respect. | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Rep. Jack Bergman used a line of rhetorical questioning in a recent hearing to join GOP colleagues in their accusation that diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) in the armed forces creates division, harms recruitment, and damages the command structure. Since Truman's executive order ended segregation in the US military, our armed forces have focused on diversity, equity, and inclusion. The term DEI might be new, but the efforts are not. For over 75 years, the US has had the most diverse military force in the world, and by nearly every measure, it's been positive. Bergman, who doesn't believe in the worth of DEI, asked DoD, Army, Navy, and Air Force panel members if DEI's impact on various personnel issues — readiness, recruitment, and command — has been positive or negative. They responded one by one. "Positive. Positive. Positive. Definitely positive." Their expert answers may have disappointed our Representative, but not American military families. Our Representative implied that the advancement of DEI initiatives causes the DoD's recruitment crisis. DEI is a solution, not the problem. Bergman's opposition to diversity, equity, and inclusion in the armed forces devalues the abilities of hundreds of thousands of current and future service members. DEI has intrinsic value beyond metrics. We have so many defense roles to fill. Rep. Bergman only reiterated combat 'fighting' roles. Yet, over 80% of our DoD jobs are non-combat. In any modern workplace, it's beneficial to celebrate everyone's diversity, promote fairness and justice in their treatment, and provide everyone with a sense of belonging, especially in service to their country. Bergman joins a panel of GOP colleagues who hammered the DoD's DEI efforts as "wokeness." He said his questioning intended to tee up next year's hearing by "reviewing the numbers to show that DEI is positive... and not just posturing." Anyone who devalues to abilities of our service members doesn't belong in Congress and it's one of the many reasons I'm running to de-elect Jack Bergman. We all deserve someone significantly more in touch with the American people. Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Factory farms hurt people and animals
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1712676?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop the USDA from supporting greedy corporations that hurt people, animals, and the planet!** You might have grown up being fed fairy-tale images of farms. Green rolling pastures where cows roam, mud pits where pigs joyfully slide around, and seed-littered dirt that chickens peck at for food. While this may be true of small, local, and sustainable farms, the reality is that most meat and dairy products come from inhumane, filthy, large-scale factory farms. Pregnant mother pigs are often kept in metal cages, unable to turn around. Chickens are wedged into cages so small they can’t even spread their wings. This is only some of what mega meat corporations don’t want you to know about their factory-farming practices. **These filthy factory farms can be breeding grounds for viruses that spread like wildfire. Already in the U.S., the bird flu has killed more than 70 million birds since 2020.** Some infectious disease experts even believe **the next pandemic could originate from these crowded, unsanitary factory farms. ** **[Please, Friend, demand the USDA stop funding factory farms and prioritize public health over corporate profits by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1712677?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1712678?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
To make matters worse, factory farms generate _**HARMFUL CONTAMINANTS**_ that **pollute the air, soil and water of nearby** communities. And these risks are especially heightened for rural, Black, Brown, Indigenous, and low-income communities.
The corporate meat and dairy industries are endangering public health, degrading the environment, and abusing helpless animals. Worse, instead of being held accountable for these transgressions, these companies **_RECEIVE taxpayer SUPPORT FROM THE USDA!_** **Friend, we need at least 1 of every 7 people reading this email to take action to help us reach our goal.** **[Protect people, the environment, and animals from factory farm greed!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1712679?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1712678?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kari Hamerschlag
Deputy director of food and agriculture,
Friends of the Earth**
|

| | When CBS News gave Marjorie Taylor Greene the spotlight on _60 Minutes,_ they gave her the opportunity to apologize for her dangerous and inflammatory rhetoric – from encouraging social media posts that called for Nancy Pelosi’s execution to harassing survivors of the Parkland school shooting, which she called a “false flag operation.”

**_Marjorie Taylor Greene is a disgrace to her office, she is unfit to represent Georgians, and it’s horrifying that the GOP continues to uplift her as the face of their party._**

We at the Democratic Party of Georgia are working every day to counter her extreme MAGA agenda and conspiracy theories, and we’re doing everything we can to flip the House next year and remove her from power.

We at the Democratic Party of Georgia are working every day to counter her extreme MAGA agenda and conspiracy theories, and we’re doing everything we can to flip the House next year and remove her from power. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = She refuses to apologize for her dangerous conspiracy theories, and we need to hold her accountable. = We need your help to remove MTG. She’s a danger to our democracy, and she’s unfit to hold office. – GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsS_pkDD4N

Hillsdale College

I'm sure you've seen
it in the national news, but I'd like to reiterate: There is
serious hostility towards the founding principles of liberty on
too many college campuses.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osS_pkDD4N

Please
see a special message from our sponsor:

Fellow American,

I'm sure you've seen it in the national news, but
I'd like to reiterate: There is serious hostility towards the
founding principles of liberty on too many college campuses.

Many college students are not taught the true
meaning of terms like "Freedom" and "Equality." They are
accepting false promises of free college and health care and
voting for candidates who wish to embrace that fantasy. This is
evidenced by recent polling data, which shows that 70% of
Millennials say they are likely to vote socialist.

Worst of all, many students on college campuses
refuse to engage with those whom they disagree-instead, they
resort to intimidation, threats, and rioting in a manner that
incites violence.

I'm curious to know what you think about the state
of higher education in America. If you have a few minutes, I'd
love to ask you a few questions about America's education system,
and whether the damage to it can be repaired.

Take the survey now >>
https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/

Take the Survey

Warm Regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

Hillsdale
College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Nikki Haley Alert
subject: Kiss the debate stage goodbye
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA Fund, Inc
body:
The establishment is giddy about this
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534586:JTy5teGiN:m:1:3331421248:A362EE44E6A6F52D49C97A4E9AC9C4A9:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534586:JTy5teGiN:m:1:3331421248:A362EE44E6A6F52D49C97A4E9AC9C4A9:r) January 27, 2023
The RNC may require presidential candidates to reach a grassroots donor benchmark to participate in debates! That means without YOUR support, Nikki Haley could be disqualified.

Make no mistake, the Washington establishment would love nothing more than to knock her down from this key campaign platform. And if Nikki is silenced, the Washington establishment wins. Don't let that happen! [**With your donation, you can help her qualify.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534586:JTy5teGiN:m:1:3331421248:A362EE44E6A6F52D49C97A4E9AC9C4A9:r)
**[**HELP NIKKI HERE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534586:JTy5teGiN:m:1:3331421248:A362EE44E6A6F52D49C97A4E9AC9C4A9:r)**
Nikki has a STRONG base of supporters, but unless Team Haley puts some skin in the game, she could be kept off the stage!

[**Can Nikki count on you to chip in before 11:59 pm?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534586:JTy5teGiN:m:1:3331421248:A362EE44E6A6F52D49C97A4E9AC9C4A9:r)
**[**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534586:JTy5teGiN:m:1:3331421248:A362EE44E6A6F52D49C97A4E9AC9C4A9:r)**

Not everyone can say they were on Team Haley from the very beginning, and we want YOU to be part of Nikki's journey to the White House every step of the way!

We're only adding new names to our Team Haley Founding Members Club until midnight tonight so secure your spot NOW.

As a member of Team Haley, you'll get exclusive updates from the campaign trail and be FIRST to know about upcoming events and announcements. While Nikki is on the road, you'll be right alongside for the ride with a front-row view of all the action!

[**Just make a gift before midnight to unlock your access!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534585:JTy5teGiN:m:1:3331421248:A362EE44E6A6F52D49C97A4E9AC9C4A9:r)

name: Faith Journeys (via SFA Fund, Inc.)
subject: Americans are turning away from faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA Fund, Inc
body:
Our culture needs more stories like thisstory...
| | | During Holy Week, Christians unite their lives to the journey of Christ to Calvary. Everyone's walk with God is personal, but more and more, talking about faith in American culture has become viewed as "taboo," "offensive," or "judgmental."

With church attendance and religion at record lows in our country, sharing stories of faith has never been more important to restoring our common cause for a good and moral society.

This week, we wanted to highlight a leader who, through sharing her personal walk with God, has inspired so many Americans. That leader is 2024 Presidential candidate Nikki Haley.
| _**Nikki Haley's Personal Faith Journey**_ As the daughter of Indian immigrants, Nikki was born into a Sikh family. Her parents are very serious about their Sikh faith and taught their children to respect everyone's personal relationship with God.

When Nikki's parents first arrived in Bamberg, South Carolina, the town worked hard to convert them, and they accepted invitations to visit various congregations.

From childhood, Nikki was exposed to many different faiths and converted to Christianity because the teachings of Christ in the Gospels spoke to her in a way that she understood.

She knows that she was free to choose her faith because of her parents' choice to raise their children in the United States. And she doesn't take it for granted.

Freedom and faith must be fought for if we're going to restore conservative, Christian values in America. Now, Nikki is running for president to defend freedom and religious liberty in America. **[**DEFEND FAITH AND FREEDOM**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534832:JeCCXeGAN:m:1:3365131770:835BFC155EBA477CF9A907D9879126B0:r)**
---

We are blessed to live in a country where we have the freedom to choose and live out our faith.

That is the very essence of the American Dream that Nikki Haley's parents pursued, but it is quickly being eroded by Biden and the radical Left.

[**If you share Nikki Haley 's vision of an America where freedom and faith are protected, chip in to support her fight here.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534832:JeCCXeGAN:m:1:3365131770:835BFC155EBA477CF9A907D9879126B0:r)

Not everyone can say they were on Team Haley from the very beginning, and we want YOU to be part of Nikki's journey to the White House every step of the way!

We're only adding new names to our Team Haley Founding Members Club until midnight tonight so secure your spot NOW.

As a member of Team Haley, you'll get exclusive updates from the campaign trail and be FIRST to know about upcoming events and announcements. While Nikki is on the road, you'll be right alongside for the ride with a front-row view of all the action!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Why I love living in America – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132964?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
A recent arrival to the United States, I am often asked what I like most about living in America? Here are some of my outsider’s impressions about America and a few of the many reasons I love living in the United States: 1. Mississippi is great: I might be British by birth, but I’m Mississippi by choice – and I cannot think of any place I would rather live than right here in the Magnolia state. The climate is delightful – even in July and August. There’s more sunshine most mornings in Mississippi than you’d expect to see in a month in London. It’s not just the climate that is warm and sunny, but the people. It is often impossible to go and buy gas or groceries without falling into cheerful conversation with a total stranger. 2. American energy & enthusiasm: It is easy to overlook things that seem familiar to us. We all take for granted what we know. But take it from me when I tell you that Americans are full of infectious enthusiasm. Almost everyone you meet is upbeat about something. Folk harbor real pride in their community, university, high school, military, work, state and, yes, country. There’s far less of that cynicism-masquerading-as-sophistication in America compared with what you find elsewhere. I suspect that this enthusiasm is one of the secrets of America’s success. It helps explain why people in the United States are so entrepreneurial. Enthusiasm confers on Americans, especially younger Americans, a can-do attitude that drives them to do things and to innovate. 3. Civic-minded: When tornados devastated several towns in the Delta the other week, I was struck by how ordinary Mississippians I know responded. They didn’t talk about what the government should do to help, but did itthemselves. Churches rallied round. Rotary clubs and others sent supplies to those impacted. One gentleman I was talking to down in Pascagoula this week went to one of the areas affected and took it upon himself to rebuild the home of someone that he met there. When Fox News’ Douglas Murray came to speak in Jackson a while ago, he explained why he was optimistic about America’s future. Americans, he said, don’t sit around waiting for the cavalry to arrive. They realise that they are the cavalry – and act. I can see what he means. 4. Football: Raised playing rugby and cricket, I never saw a football game until two years ago. Now there’s nowhere I’d rather be on a Friday night than watching the local high school game. Football is not just a game – it’s the entire school or university putting on a spectacular performance full of infectious pride. Come to think of it, football is a perfect fusion of American enthusiasm and civic-mindedness, which is maybe why I like it so much .... “So is there anything you miss about England?” I am occasionally asked. America is awesome and there’s not much I would want to change about this amazing country. But if there were two things I would do differently, it would be hot tea and roundabouts. No matter how much I love sweet tea, I sometimes struggle to find hot tea served the way it is supposed to be. As for roundabouts, they seem to me to be the perfect libertarian way of managing the traffic. No need for any government-run traffic lights, but an entirely self-regulating flow of trafficinstead. Those are two minor imperfections I am more than happy to live with. Have a wonderful Easter weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1ebc0e2962&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---

As Mayor, my top priority is to make sure every Philadelphian is safe and feels safe. My community safety agenda will not only ensure a swift and effective response to violence when it occurs; it will invest in solutions to stop violence from happening in the first place. **That’s the message at the heart of our first TV ad, and I want you to see it if you haven't already.[Please click here to see the commercial we just launched, and consider chipping in to keep it on air »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61475222/400215211/-963477393?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230408_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJmMzkyYi0wYmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4imh3cukQRk3SMRZ-hARRmuam_o05POybznOTo6sDq4=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61475223/400215212/-963477393?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230408_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJmMzkyYi0wYmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4imh3cukQRk3SMRZ-hARRmuam_o05POybznOTo6sDq4=) | [DONATE TODAY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61475224/400215213/-963477393?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230408_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJmMzkyYi0wYmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4imh3cukQRk3SMRZ-hARRmuam_o05POybznOTo6sDq4=)

Other candidates in this race have spent millions of dollars on ads to tell voters how they’ll _manage violent crime_. We are the only campaign willing to talk about investing in our youth and in solutions that _end the public safety crisis_.
For 30 years, I’ve been fighting to make our communities safer by keeping people in their homes, creating good jobs with family-sustaining wages, investing in education, and creating school safety zones.
As Mayor, I’ll align all city departments, agencies, and community partners around an all-hands-on-deck approach that treats the gun violence crisis like the emergency that it is. We will fix our 911 system, expand mental health support, overhaul victim's services, stabilize our young people, and reclaim our neighborhoods for neighbors.
**We can build a safer and more vibrant Philadelphia, but first, we need to win this race on May 16th. With ten other candidates and millions of dollars spent on ads, it’ll take a huge grassroots fundraising push.**
**So what do you say: Will you chip in any amount to help keep my first ad on TV? Our vision for community safety is proven and popular, and if enough voters know about it, we will win.**

clean_body: I wanted to make sure that you saw our first TV ad, team. | = As Mayor, my top priority is to make sure every Philadelphian is safe and feels safe. My community safety agenda will not only ensure a swift and effective response to violence when it occurs; it will invest in solutions to stop violence from happening in the first place. That’s the message at the heart of our first TV ad, and I want you to see it if you haven't already.= = | = Other candidates in this race have spent millions of dollars on ads to tell voters how they’ll manage violent crime. We are the only campaign willing to talk about investing in our youth and in solutions that end the public safety crisis. For 30 years, I’ve been fighting to make our communities safer by keeping people in their homes, creating good jobs with family-sustaining wages, investing in education, and creating school safety zones. As Mayor, I’ll align all city departments, agencies, and community partners around an all-hands-on-deck approach that treats the gun violence crisis like the emergency that it is. We will fix our 911 system, expand mental health support, overhaul victim's services, stabilize our young people, and reclaim our neighborhoods for neighbors. We can build a safer and more vibrant Philadelphia, but first, we need to win this race on May 16th. With ten other candidates and millions of dollars spent on ads, it’ll take a huge grassroots fundraising push. So what do you say: Will you chip in any amount to help keep my first ad on TV? Our vision for community safety is proven and popular, and if enough voters know about it, we will win. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for everything you do to support our movement. I could not do this without you. — Helen Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here: | = Friends of Helen Gym PO Box 11766 Philadelphia, PA 19101 United States | mailto:info@helengym.com Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m personally asking you to join my reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Can I explain something, folks?
I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — as a farmer .
Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.
I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.
The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.
And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.
That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $15 between Seth Moulton and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thank you so much for sticking by me. I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course).
— Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

Our teachers deserve better.
They are the backbone of our country. Every day they're doing an exceptional job in improving the lives of our kids.
But educators today are forced to deal with large class sizes, low wages, a lack of classroom resources, safety concerns, and tense public scrutiny — leading to extreme levels of stress and burnout.
The pandemic caused nearly 300,000 public school educators and staff to leave their jobs. Now, we are facing a shortage of around 200,000 public school teachers across the country.
It's time that we show our teachers the respect and appreciation they deserve. _**That means paying public school teachers a living wage.**_
But we want to hear directly from you: Do you agree with President Biden that public school teachers deserve a raise?
**[YES →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61475951/400216646/1818634985?refcode=em_UTC_PET_Teacherraisepoll_040623_RS_y2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzMzFlZjQ0LTBkZDYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LyNVdv7t2KnZ8hrjow1equQHWC5tNOjaO12OyZNCqxw=&emci=8a25857b-b3d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8331ef44-0dd6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=16951753)** | **[NO →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61475954/400216677/1818634985?refcode=em_UTC_PET_Teacherraisepoll_040623_RS_n2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzMzFlZjQ0LTBkZDYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LyNVdv7t2KnZ8hrjow1equQHWC5tNOjaO12OyZNCqxw=&emci=8a25857b-b3d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8331ef44-0dd6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=16951753)**

Friend,
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved - to hear that I could face **136 YEARS IN PRISON** for having committed **NO CRIME**.
But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself.
I felt sorry for our country - because this is _NOT_ America.
Let me assure you - I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_**These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election.**_
Winning in 2024 is about more than just an election. It's about the survival of our Free Republic.

clean_body: Our country is dying, but we will save it! | | | Friend, I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved - to hear that I could face 136 YEARS IN PRISON for having committed NO CRIME. But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself. I felt sorry for our country - because this is NOT America. Let me assure you - I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. Winning in 2024 is about more than just an election. It's about the survival of our Free Republic. | Thank you, | Donald J. [ Kansas is banning transgender athletes from girls’ and women’s sports, from kindergarten through college. The Republican-controlled Kansas Legislature on Wednesday overrode Democratic Gov. Laura Kelly’s third veto in three years of a bill that applies a ban to school teams and the club sports sponsored by K-12 schools and colleges. Nineteen other states have imposed such bans, most recently Wyoming, but also Arizona, Florida, Texas and West Virginia. The ban is the first of what could be several new Kansas laws restricting the rights of transgender people, and came a day after lawmaker passed a broad bathroom bill. ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/27ShHcQOVI2e-KGnKDuZOg~~/AARclAA~/RgRmFA_uP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvdHJhbnNnZW5kZXItYXRobGV0ZXMtYmFuLWthbnNhcy0wODYwNGM2NjM1MThmYjI1Mzg1NjVmM2UxYWMzZDRiYVcDc3BjQgpkIYxpMWTsPMMBUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

His goal is to put President Trump behind bars, sabotage his presidential campaign, and give Democrats tyrannical control over our whole country. Alvin Bragg belongs in a jail cell - NOT President Trump. We're PLEADING with every patriot reading this message to join us right now. And all we're asking for is an answer to this question: | | We need 1,000,000 responses before the end of the day. name: Becca Balint
subject: Kicking off a weekend of celebrations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Ultimately, Passover is a story of liberation, of freedom from slavery, and resilience against oppression.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61482892/400229224/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZhNzIyYi0xMWQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o8kX88znXdTbLxMKNG0guOmLfwEoifVxtmNe2gXxnoc=&emci=56cd926d-79d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=046a722b-11d6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Today kicks off a weekend of celebration, with millions of Americans recognizing the Passover, Ramadan, and Easter holidays this month. My Jewish heritage is extremely important to me, and I’m excited to be celebrating Passover this weekend with my family – but you don’t have to be Jewish to find meaning in this holiday. **Ultimately, Passover is a story of liberation, of freedom from slavery, and resilience against oppression. My wife and I focus our family Passover celebration on freeing ourselves from ideas, values, and actions that don't serve us. ** _Are we pursuing money and status rather than how to make life better for those around us? Are our insecurities or our egos preventing us from fully connecting with our neighbors and our community? Are we examining ourselves honestly to root out any prejudice? Are we meeting the world with open hearts? _ No matter what holidays you may or may not be celebrating, everyone can benefit from reflecting on these questions, and working to make our communities kinder, more welcoming, and more equitable places for all. Wishing you peace this holiday season, Becca Balint

name: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen Action
subject: Want to stop the next Willow Project?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Sign an official public comment before midnight.
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-biden-you-have-power-to-account-for-climate/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&t=2&akid=13310%2E53494%2EDaJYgr)
---
Friend, I want to make sure you don't miss this advocacy opportunity.
**If we act now, we can help the Biden administration stop future fossil fuel projects like Willow.**
Right now, the Council on Environmental Quality (CEQ) is accepting public comments on greenhouse gas pollution guidance that can help the Biden administration better implement the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA) and choose a safer climate future.
**A strong "climate test" could stop the next Willow—but we only have until midnight to push for it.**
[_**All you have to do is sign your name, and we'll take care of the rest. Signing on only takes a few seconds.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-biden-you-have-power-to-account-for-climate/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&t=3&akid=13310%2E53494%2EDaJYgr)
[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-biden-you-have-power-to-account-for-climate/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&t=4&akid=13310%2E53494%2EDaJYgr)
---
For more details, check out my email below.
Thanks,
Mattea Mrkusic
Policy Lead, Evergreen Action
\------ Forwarded message ------
From: **Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen Action**
Date: Thu, Mar 30, 2023
Subject: Here's a no-brainer,
Friend,
Massive fossil fuel projects have no place in our clean energy transition. Yet, earlier this month, the Biden administration approved ConocoPhillips' Willow Project, citing legal concerns as the primary justification.
Well, we can give President Biden a tool to help stop the next Willow—and every other climate pollution mega-project that needs federal environmental review. **It's called the climate test, and it would give government agencies a clear red flag if a major energy infrastructure project is incompatible with a 1.5 degree Celsius climate future.**
Right now, the Council on Environmental Quality (CEQ) has an opportunity to embed a climate test into federal agencies' environmental review processes. **The only problem? CEQ's guidance isn't strong enough to meet the urgency of the climate crisis.** [_**We have less than two weeks to urge CEQ to include the strongest possible version of a climate test. Send a pre-filled comment right now to ensure a safer climate future!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-biden-you-have-power-to-account-for-climate/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&t=5&akid=13310%2E53494%2EDaJYgr)
[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-biden-you-have-power-to-account-for-climate/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&t=6&akid=13310%2E53494%2EDaJYgr)
---
A strong climate test will mean that all federal agencies will be encouraged to use the same science-based standard and keep us on track to meet our climate and policy commitments. Your input can mean the difference between the status quo or a future where the Biden administration is better equipped and empowered to reject fossil fuel projects.
**It's a no-brainer—the energy infrastructure we build should support our climate goals, not undermine them.[_Thank you for using your voice to ensure the cost of our future energy projects takes into account the cost to our climate._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-biden-you-have-power-to-account-for-climate/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&t=7&akid=13310%2E53494%2EDaJYgr)**
[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-biden-you-have-power-to-account-for-climate/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&source=ema_2023-04-08_CEQ_comment_climate_test_kicker_&t=8&akid=13310%2E53494%2EDaJYgr)
---
Onward,
Mattea Mrkusic
Policy Lead, Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=13310%2E53494%2EDaJYgr). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

name: A. Klobuchar
subject: the American dream in action.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I want to tell you a little bit about why fighting for American families in the U.S. Senate is so important to me. **[_My work is made possible by this grassroots team so, if you’re able, I hope you split a contribution of any amount between myself and Kirsten Gillibrand to help me keep going._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61503988/400284286/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4052-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDE4YmFhYy0zM2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jz9G8YPQBNnHXCFesilepxMCIS3E1I46fiukA7IG3dc=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61503989/400284287/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4052-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDE4YmFhYy0zM2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jz9G8YPQBNnHXCFesilepxMCIS3E1I46fiukA7IG3dc=)
Every day, I’m reminded of the fact that I stand on the shoulders of those before me. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61503990/400284288/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4052-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDE4YmFhYy0zM2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jz9G8YPQBNnHXCFesilepxMCIS3E1I46fiukA7IG3dc=)
**But thanks to supporters like you, our grassroots movement beat the odds, and I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Minnesota.___That’s the American dream in action._**

Every day since then I’ve been fighting for progress. And I want you to know:

**I will never stop fighting to build a nation that works for working families.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61503991/400284289/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4052-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDE4YmFhYy0zM2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jz9G8YPQBNnHXCFesilepxMCIS3E1I46fiukA7IG3dc=)
**[_But I can’t do it alone, friend. That's why I'm so thankful to have grassroots supporters like you by my side. If you can, I’m asking you to split a quick donation between me and Kirsten Gillibrand today to help me continue this fight._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61503992/400284290/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4052-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDE4YmFhYy0zM2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jz9G8YPQBNnHXCFesilepxMCIS3E1I46fiukA7IG3dc=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Amy Klobuchar and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61503993/400284291/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk4052-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDE4YmFhYy0zM2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jz9G8YPQBNnHXCFesilepxMCIS3E1I46fiukA7IG3dc=)

Thank you so much -- this team has never let me down.

\-- Amy
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61503997/400284295/1276288577?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4052-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDE4YmFhYy0zM2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jz9G8YPQBNnHXCFesilepxMCIS3E1I46fiukA7IG3dc=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61503998/400284296/-845680267?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4052-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDE4YmFhYy0zM2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jz9G8YPQBNnHXCFesilepxMCIS3E1I46fiukA7IG3dc=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61503999/400284297/-845680267?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4052-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDE4YmFhYy0zM2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jz9G8YPQBNnHXCFesilepxMCIS3E1I46fiukA7IG3dc=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joseph?=
subject: Let's Finish What We Started
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/lets-finish-what-we-started?e=16d812e81c)
---
|
---
|
---
**We received over 40% of the vote on less than 500 contributions.**

There were many races overlooked in 2022. Michigan's 4th Congressional deserved a candidate that was willing to put in some long hours and meet people where they are.
Our campaign pushed back against the establishment politics and decided we had the audacity to run.
We are tired of being told to wait. We are tired of having candidates forced in front of us who just want a paycheck, are yes people, and prop up bad policy.
Our kids deserve to live a long life, without fear of going to school.
Old and young deserve to retire with dignity. And we should not fear if our water quality is up for debate.
Time we elect someone who is here for the people. We are asking to donate what you can now, so we can reach over 50% of the people in the community.
\- Joseph Alfonso, Democratic Candidate for Congress
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | We received over 40% of the vote on less than 500 contributions. There were many races overlooked in 2022. Michigan's 4th Congressional deserved a candidate that was willing to put in some long hours and meet people where they are. Our campaign pushed back against the establishment politics and decided we had the audacity to run. We are tired of being told to wait. We are tired of having candidates forced in front of us who just want a paycheck, are yes people, and prop up bad policy. Our kids deserve to live a long life, without fear of going to school. Old and young deserve to retire with dignity. And we should not fear if our water quality is up for debate. Time we elect someone who is here for the people. We are asking to donate what you can now, so we can reach over 50% of the people in the community. \- Joseph Alfonso, Democratic Candidate for Congress | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | | Copyright (C) |2023| |Alfonso For Congress|. All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Alfonso For Congress P.O BOX 1375 Holland, MI 49422 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

body:
We must elect leaders who will seriously address our health care needs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61484982/400234889/-520124032?refcode=EM_PET_230408ACA_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTUyNDQ4ZS0xM2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7D7eM_X6Gaijs9iFvyEtwAKrw5Tk7tnxZLzc3FRj5Y=) This is a major blow to the U.S. health care system, Peter. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61484983/400234890/-520124032?refcode=EM_PET_230408ACA_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_TESTB_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTUyNDQ4ZS0xM2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7D7eM_X6Gaijs9iFvyEtwAKrw5Tk7tnxZLzc3FRj5Y=) In a recent ruling, the requirement for insurers to fully cover preventative care has been struck down. This comes from the same Texas federal judge who ruled the Affordable Care Act as unconstitutional before the Supreme Court upheld it.

This new ruling means **more than 160 million Americans are at risk** of losing coverage for everyday needs like mammograms to ensure expecting mothers don’t have breast cancer and HIV prevention medicine that reduces contraction rates by 99 percent.

The GOP has undermined our health care system for years with no alternative solutions on hand. That’s why we need grassroots supporters like you to help elect leaders who will seriously address our health care needs.

name: Candace Owens
subject: A bigger plague than COVID
body:
There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aa1755c1db1d49bd91333fd07822542f&_e=ltbdaW33shrIcjbCxTlQ06WkCMoeQBqIYzxbRJI1_6qdqmGxi_2nMDAYuaPL7FhjZtr4LjBdZZbgTG5Qnw_c6ZQmVg1Z6x1jARk0VwVM9PCgk7OUJHBh4ioBgcP9KYNIwCk8ENDtExcshyuRsjDFcWeC8e7TumkazMUusjaI9DNxFAETVpdTgC4u2IRfxwwW_F-bL8j52JJCZFqMsW6mT0XZmZSwhApLHo0bgf29KNUSJIHT_x8e6ZwhLHqvZTzYYzKcsqIfrJxcHkCa0h-N4PkCqnd2n4-i77yIwQo0unA%3D)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aa1755c1db1d49bd91333fd07822542f&_e=ltbdaW33shrIcjbCxTlQ06WkCMoeQBqIYzxbRJI1_6qdqmGxi_2nMDAYuaPL7FhjZtr4LjBdZZbgTG5Qnw_c6ZQmVg1Z6x1jARk0VwVM9PCgk7OUJHBh4ioBgcP9KYNIwCk8ENDtExcshyuRsjDFcdcOEML5XrmooL0JVVvqp10KIuws1_e9SpVJxrTG1LBmNxFcSTIVHpefK_nnxBqAKbd2cTCJq6I8LdjsJhplHypuDKES13vT5tR51GDC03k0PakwqvQd5wSM11av-hpFepmdE-fmUMZRK22bjmERZow%3D)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. _

_**" My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aa1755c1db1d49bd91333fd07822542f&_e=ltbdaW33shrIcjbCxTlQ06WkCMoeQBqIYzxbRJI1_6qdqmGxi_2nMDAYuaPL7FhjZtr4LjBdZZbgTG5Qnw_c6ZQmVg1Z6x1jARk0VwVM9PCgk7OUJHBh4ioBgcP9KYNIwCk8ENDtExcshyuRsjDFcXzDmhJXuZCaqHVE6l7SDjgm7f8D4tUMgef5_p0VazuQUdKby5_-rIH9IUxBXB5-JiJEetwqzrk9irnJ_Z8JHbNFkPoxj1QQk0LkqX73jhFo7Xj6pO84HXf1kidWcMZty7OpIRLHmi95GHXyCwprS9g%3D)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aa1755c1db1d49bd91333fd07822542f&_e=ltbdaW33shrIcjbCxTlQ06WkCMoeQBqIYzxbRJI1_6qdqmGxi_2nMDAYuaPL7FhjZtr4LjBdZZbgTG5Qnw_c6ZQmVg1Z6x1jARk0VwVM9PCgk7OUJHBh4ioBgcP9KYNIwdTjgv4hdGC57gKYXeI8Fdh7FD-BP0j28A4OwYdnqnaXmEX6BgDP5oZhnwoUhDmCASIq1YvHUkQU8A-QdYV6coAs0jvxWORejCzeyyV5I-YzoGqii2f9x3nEz8CNkNpn4s1htUjzNdxtZWm7j6M800qWH1GGOM0zfvwYIrZGWrA%3D)

clean_body: There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. Friend, There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor. The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare. My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities. I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. It taught me never to be a victim again. My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media. As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. Then one night, the KKK showed up. My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds. But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. " My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back! I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me. I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same. Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities: We put together BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back. This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation. In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities. Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events. We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality. Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. | Conservatives Gives 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: It's been a long time since this country experienced assault after assault on democracy & abortion rights we saw the past week.
body:
“Semi-fascism in Tennessee, and more, in today’s Blue Letter
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T594bed7b-6512-446d-accb-82c4bf86649c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, It's been a long time since this country experienced assault after assault on democracy & abortion rights we saw the past week. In the coming days we'll share more; fundraisers, petitions, more updates like this on what is taking place all over our country. There is so much going on we'll call this Blue Letter 1. Blue Letter 2 will come tomorrow with a lot more state by state information. For now here are a few key stories from the past week. **_First, good news!_** 🔥🔥Vice President Kamala Harris met with the "Tennessee 3" yesterday. [I have an explainer on the "semi-fascism," as President Biden puts it,](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc1125731-8c38-4d60-b8a1-a37822ae9a30/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that just took place in TN. [PLEASE WATCH](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63460c20-579d-44e8-a46a-caa4e0e28a5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): [bit.ly/400gOJq](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bd48de3-00e9-4ec2-9c8c-41adab5b8225/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) 🔥🔥[Awesome Michigan Governor, Gretchen Whitmer, "slayed a zombie," as she put it](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e220008-5748-4b83-9c2f-54acb32e5b50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), this week. Killing a series of 100 yr old anti-abortion laws. [T](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75c3a2d3-e5a9-45ac-8311-94601c896722/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[he story here!:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19affc4e-45f3-42b4-b6e4-5c3e429daaea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [bit.ly/3UiMLLI](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19e11f62-ff03-4d10-a6e1-297d46e003f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) *👍🔥Blue Amp Action's expanding! Sponsors, newsletters, petitions, fundraisers! [Would you consider supporting us with a donation to continue providing the best damn community possible?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f93e2c2-19b7-42c3-92a8-ac48b79d747b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks! ******************* **👍 ****👍 ****Have you [v](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba46c804-6639-468b-9f96-08e1fb558b12/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[**isited our sponsor, Dissent Pins?** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12f87115-5e90-4cc6-a72d-a68d2ec55167/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**Need a **["Mazel Tough" t-shirt or "No One's Treading On You, Sweetie?" pin?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a5def06-d219-418a-a26b-9d976623e015/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** ** **You can find it all & more [at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21fc4cd6-6e54-48f0-8877-ef1f56e3c0a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!** ******************* **_One More All-Important Story_** *🔥🔥[How The Devastating Trump Indictment is much worse for him, and the GOP](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29cbe5e4-2d40-418f-a185-9c0c584b642f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) than they thought. [Find out more here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b0251fb-e25a-4fb3-aa27-21f5162358ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): [bit.ly/3GmogY6](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8fd42119-c7b3-4b39-8da2-f488acfa126c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Have a great Saturday! We'll be back with even more information tomorrow. Thanks, as always, for being a part of this vibrant community! Cliff PS: 👍🔥Blue Amp Action's expanding! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee8f7114-eaa9-40ad-bf33-c235589f3f15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Will you help us build the nation's largest left-leaning local news network?
body:
We cut through the noise.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=825%2E120351%2EMPMT__)
Peter,
From right-wing online disinformation to mainstream media who care more about profits than serving the public good, it’s no wonder that _185 million Americans don’t trust the news._
**At Courier Newsroom, we’re doing something to fix that.**
As the nation's largest left-leaning local news network, we run newsrooms in eight key battleground states (and counting) where disinformation is spreading the fastest. Every day, our talented journalists deliver factual news stories to readers who live in areas where honest, local news is hard to find (if it even exists). We take the responsibility of delivering good, factual information seriously and will never compromise the truth or our values in our work.
**We fight disinformation by providing trustworthy local news to those who need it most.**
You can power our work by investing in Courier Newsroom with a donation today. [**Will you become a founding donor to Courier so we can expand our network of left-leaning local newsrooms****?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3595?refcode=em-20230408&t=2&akid=825%2E120351%2EMPMT__)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3595?refcode=em-20230408&t=3&akid=825%2E120351%2EMPMT__)**
**Your support couldn’t come at a more critical time.** Local newsrooms are disappearing, and right-wing misinformation and disinformation have taken their place. This pattern has become so pervasive that millions of Americans now believe in dangerous conspiracies about our democracy.
**We’re fighting back with an innovative local news model that attacks right-wing propaganda and misinformation at its source. At Courier Newsroom:**
* We focus on audiences without access to quality reporting who are susceptible to misleading or false information.

* We don’t chase profit, and we don’t use jargon or paywalls. We create meaningful, factual content that matters to the lives and communities of our readers.

* We target our news to the spaces where real people spend their time — on social media newsfeeds, across inboxes, and in search engines where people look for information online.

In other words, we’re doing something radically different to fight the spread of bad information. And the best part? Our research shows we’ve already started to increase civic participation among our audiences. We know our model works.
**Right now, we’re mobilizing a community of founding donors who want to help fight disinformation in their local communities, and we’re hoping you’ll join us.** Together, we can beat the right-wing propaganda machines, reclaim our voices in our local communities, and strengthen our democracy for good.
[**Please, chip in any amount that is meaningful to you and become a founding donor today. With your help, we can grow our network of left-leaning local newsrooms and fight back against dangerous lies and disinformation.**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3595?refcode=em-20230408&t=4&akid=825%2E120351%2EMPMT__)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3595?refcode=em-20230408&t=5&akid=825%2E120351%2EMPMT__)**
Together,
The Courier Newsroom Team

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=825_120351_MPMT__&akid=825%2E120351%2EMPMT__)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=825%2E120351%2EMPMT__)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032
