---
Peter,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

name: Sara Rodriguez
subject: Abortion is health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Rodriguez for Wisconsin
body:
| Hi Peter — it's Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez. As a nurse, mother, and public health professional — I know the stakes of abortion rights for our country. Let me be clear: reproductive health care is health care. Period. [**Chip in now to protect abortion rights >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61488298/400247337/-62798514?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWNjZTE3NC0xN2Q2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fb88iMvddq747zXymYAagaeNjV7eJOHzChL3ukVgYeo=) Because of your support, we started this week strong with a decisive Supreme Court election win in Wisconsin. Sadly, the week ended with a Trump-appointed judge in Texas revoking FDA approval for the most widely used abortion pill in the country. _Make no mistake, reproductive freedom is under attack in legislatures and courtrooms across the country._ **That's why I've joined with 21 other Lieutenant Governors to form the Reproductive Freedom Coaliton. We're standing with patients and providers as a firewall against extremist attacks — but we cannot stand alone.**

subject: President Trump Approval Poll: Do YOU still support him?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537027:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r) Peter, As you may be aware, President Trump has announced his plans to run for president a third time in 2024. Given the constant attack he faces from the Democrats and the Left-Wing Media, it is so important, now more than ever, to know where you stand and whether President Trump has your support. To that end, we are conducting a survey to gauge the support for President Trump from Republican Patriots like you. **[We encourage you to RESPOND NOW and let us know where you stand.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537028:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r)** **[PLEASE CONFIRM YOUR INFORMATION BELOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537029:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r)** PLEASE CONFIRM YOUR INFORMATION BELOW: [[Not Found]](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537030:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r) [[Email Protected]](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537031:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r) | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537032:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r)
---
_PLEASE SIGN NOW >> _
President Trump accomplished a great deal during his time in office. Some of his most notable accomplishments include:
* The [Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537033:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r), which cut taxes for individuals and businesses and led to a record-low unemployment rate and strong economic growth.
* [The US-Mexico-Canada Agreement](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537033:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r), which modernized and improved upon the North American Free Trade Agreement.
* [The relocation of the US Embassy in Israel to Jerusalem](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537033:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r), fulfilling a long-standing promise and recognizing the city as the capital of Israel.
* The implementation of the [First Step Act](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537033:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r), which reformed the criminal justice system and reduced sentences for nonviolent offenders.
* [The withdrawal from the Paris Climate Agreement](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537033:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r), which President Trump argued was unfair to the United States and would have hurt the economy.

These are just a few examples of President Trump's many accomplishments during his time in the White House. He was a strong leader for our country and worked tirelessly to make America great again.
However, we recognize that not everyone may share this view. That is why we are conducting this survey - to get a better understanding of the support for President Trump within our party. **[Your response to this one-question survey will be recorded in your official file at GOP HQ and will help us gauge the level of support for the President within our party.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537028:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r)**
**[We urge you to RESPOND NOW and let us know where you stand. The deadline for responding is 11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537034:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r)**
| [ RESPOND NOW ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62537035:J9-bSeG8N:m:1:3361486117:89224D602F654FE765A637BADCE39C01:r)
---
Thank you for your time and for your support of the Republican Party.

I hope you’ll chip in and then come back to read my story:](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJUD71pFwOcoTMmoY7V15aOlxnKmS5Y-7I-2GSOAj9xaIpswdHeMiZEHz_1TWYq-9blYmlgi0yvjJY2uUgG6iyiY1XA1rLhsW1nWWl9yGW0BnbNRpN_lU7TPymicEBpDwAUBhG3WtwNXN9QfYCmTbO8ZWQpz5DqqazWN_AxrTvhdFxTP6PVqQB2x3sO2ZMxyW8pjaBjfFXyxZ7xc9RyTKpSRq_97RXUnnC8cXbKHXEggPacbrInd4MW2FDT927unX5rhhKlqEB9a7CKIc9Ot2bQKoERaKvvHdmPxCyC16VCIbYpj0cGoaGiITFmcQwRLbbE7WNTXTdHoZY1t8S78Igb7b1aJLgxtPjEYqT4yj-L2M/3v6/o1jkDwEETsS6S_frstHCsA/h0/6sBzfNBUA-akqyhE55_Wi0JwstcDF1WYpsOyD6AfTPU) **February 12, 2019.** I will never forget it. That was the day we launched our first campaign for a U.S. Senate seat in Arizona. Honestly, we had absolutely no idea what to expect. I knew we had friends who would be willing to help, but I also knew one of the biggest challenges would be raising the kind of money we needed to win. But because of this grassroots team, we ran one of the largest people-powered Senate campaigns ever. That helped us fend off attacks from MAGA Republicans and win in 2020 and 2022. **Today.** Now, we have a new mission: delivering for the people of Arizona _and holding the Senate in 2024_. And it’s going to be a tough couple of years. A lot of my fellow senators are up for reelection, and MAGA Republicans are lining up to try to beat them. But I’m ready, and I know that if we work together, Democrats will do what you helped me do in our last campaign: **Win.** It’ll only happen if we’re all in this together, and that starts with reaching our fundraising goals. So, if you’re with me, if you care about holding the Senate and electing Democratic candidates in every ZIP code, and if you’re ready to get back to work, I’m humbly asking: Can you please make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee? name: Mark Warner HQ
subject: A historic confirmation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
and why it’s so important we expand our majority in the Senate

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61489493/400251751/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWFmNGVkOC0xOWQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DZuvrQ9QjrLselqarHiRi42BCtq-__ZrTw5dt5sz1N0=&emci=efe4114f-5ad5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=beaf4ed8-19d6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Let’s talk about judges, Derek, The _Dobbs_ decision last year was a painful reminder of why judges matter. So much gets decided in our federal courts – from issues around civil rights, to election integrity, to reproductive freedom. **Now for some good news:** The Senate recently confirmed Jamar Walker to the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Virginia, after Mark Warner and Tim Kaine recommended his nomination to President Biden. Judge Walker, a native of the Commonwealth, brings significant experience to the bench, and he is the first openly LGBT federal judge for Virginia. **And some more good news:** Since taking office, President Biden has appointed more than 100 judges to the federal bench, including Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson. In addition to being principled, highly-qualified jurists, these nominees are bringing long-overdue diversity to the federal judiciary. **But here's the problem:** During the Trump Presidency, Senate Republicans confirmed **more than 200 judges** to the federal bench. Already, we've seen the consequences of this partisan shift in the judiciary, as Trump-appointed judges have blocked Biden Administration action on climate change, restricted abortion access, and more. That's why now more than ever, Mark is fighting to protect our Senate majority so we can keep confirming principled, experienced judges who will protect the rights we've fought so hard for. _[**Will you join him in this critical work by chipping in just $5 right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61489494/400251752/692460976?refcode=mw_em_230408_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWFmNGVkOC0xOWQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DZuvrQ9QjrLselqarHiRi42BCtq-__ZrTw5dt5sz1N0=)_ In the Senate, Senator Warner and his colleagues are working to confirm more of the highly-qualified judges President Biden has nominated. But if we lose the Senate, we know for a fact that this critical work will grind to a halt. The stakes are just too high to put Senate Republicans back in control of the future of our federal judiciary, potentially including future Supreme Court nominations. _[**So please, can you donate anything you can today to help us keep the Senate blue next year so we can continue our work to confirm smart and fair judges to our federal courts and protect the rights of Virginians and all Americans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61489495/400251753/692460976?refcode=mw_em_230408_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWFmNGVkOC0xOWQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DZuvrQ9QjrLselqarHiRi42BCtq-__ZrTw5dt5sz1N0=)_ Thank you, Team Warner ** ** ** ** ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61489496/400251754/692460976?refcode=mw_em_230408_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWFmNGVkOC0xOWQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DZuvrQ9QjrLselqarHiRi42BCtq-__ZrTw5dt5sz1N0=)**** ** **

name: Lucy McBath
subject: I ran for Congress to keep our communities safe from gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The fight to end gun violence in our country is personal to me
#

Hi there, this is Congresswoman Lucy McBath from Georgia.
I never expected to be in Congress. But I got into this work because I realized our system would not change unless people like you and me stepped up and said ENOUGH.
On Black Friday in 2012, my 17-year-old son Jordan stopped at a gas station with his friends to pick up chewing gum. A man pulled up next to them in the parking lot, claimed their music was too loud, and then pulled out a gun and fired ten rounds at the car. Three hit Jordan.
Losing a child is an agony like no other. No family should have to experience the pain that mine went through due to a senseless act of gun violence. After Jordan was shot, I turned my pain into purpose, just like Gabby.
That day I became an activist in this movement. I promised to do whatever it took to keep our community safe and to work towards a future in our nation free from gun violence. And weeks later, Gabby and Mark founded GIFFORDS.
I am proud of the strides we have made so far to end gun violence, especially through the passage of the historic Bipartisan Safer Communities Act last year. But there’s still far more that we must do.
We still can’t safely go into our public spaces without the fear of gunfire raining down on us. Our children are still getting shot in schools. I won’t rest until we see a better, safer future for our nation.
I’m proud to support GIFFORDS and their work towards ending our nation’s gun violence crisis. Their research and advocacy is so important to enacting real commonsense gun safety solutions that will save lives, as well as helping to elect leaders up and down the ballot with the courage to act.
Gabby and the whole team at GIFFORDS have had my back during my toughest races. Now, I’m hoping you can have theirs.
[**Will you please make a contribution of $3 or any amount you can today to support GIFFORDS PAC?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230408-1-30&t=1&akid=4897%2E3935704%2E-IOzfx)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Tax the Rich. Tax corporations.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This and every tax season is an important reminder that you will likely be paying more in taxes than dozens of major corporations.
#
Peter,
Next Saturday, April 15, is Tax Day — and we want to make sure you have the tools you need to accurately file your taxes this tax season.
Filing taxes can be unnecessarily difficult and expensive — so **I wanted to be sure you knew about the IRS’ Free File program which pairs you with providers who will help you file your taxes for free!**
In order to take advantage of the Free File program, your adjusted gross income must be $73,000 or below in order to qualify.
[**Click here to learn more and find an IRS Free File provider.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41509?t=1&akid=2350%2E420207%2E03X809)
**[Find an IRS Free File Provider](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41509?t=2&akid=2350%2E420207%2E03X809)**
**This and every tax season is also an important reminder that you and many working families will likely be paying more in taxes than DOZENS of major corporations.**
While working families are struggling to afford groceries, health care, and rent as inflation and corporate greed rise, many billionaires and corporations are paying a lower income tax rate than teachers, nurses, janitors, and firefighters. Some corporations aren’t paying any income taxes at all. This is not OK. It cannot go on any longer.
**The solution is simple: Tax the rich. Tax corporations. Invest in our communities.**
Last year, I introduced the Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act with Senator Elizabeth Warren. The bill would narrow the racial wealth gap, help level the economic playing field in this country, and ensure that the wealthiest finally begin to pay their fair share. It’ll do all of this while investing trillions of dollars into our communities.
I won’t stop fighting to fix our broken tax system. We must tax the rich and corporations.
In solidarity,
Pramila
I don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money because I know this is a fight between the people and corporate greed. We can enact bold, transformative change together. [If you can afford to, will you fuel our fight with a $3 donation today? As corporate CEOs send their lobbyists and smear campaigns to block change — we can only fix our broken tax system with a grassroots movement behind us.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41518?refcode=em20230408-2350&t=3&akid=2350%2E420207%2E03X809)**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41518?refcode=em20230408-2350&t=4&akid=2350%2E420207%2E03X809)**
---

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230408-2350-footer&t=5&refcode2=2350_420207_03X809&akid=2350%2E420207%2E03X809)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

subject: Judicial Watch TV Weekend Playback

DID YOU KNOW?

Tate Reeves sits at a whopping 54% unfavorability rating as Mississippi Governor.

* * *
Peter, it's pretty clear that Mississippians are fed up with Tate Reeves.

And for good reason.

It's been nearly four years since Tate took office, and Mississippi is at the bottom of the South for economic growth.

Tate’s repeatedly turned his back on critical funding for Medicaid expansion to keep our struggling rural hospitals open.

He turned his back on the Jackson water crisis.

And let’s not forget Tate is now caught in the middle of the largest public corruption scandal in Mississippi history for misspending tens of millions of our taxpayer dollars on famous people and his personal trainer.

Here’s the good news: Brandon Presley is running against Reeves to turn the page on self-serving leadership and move our state forward. But we want to know where you stand, Peter.

**Do you agree that it's time to fire Reeves?**

| | Peter – We knew the day was coming. **Yesterday afternoon, an anti-choice judge in Texas outlawed mifepristone, the most commonly-used abortion drug in the United States, stripping rights away from every woman in America and putting countless lives at risk.** It's a callous ruling engineered by a tiny group of misogynistic radicals who can't stand the idea that women can think for themselves. Pregnant women deserve medical advice from doctors – not judges, not anti-choice activists or Kevin McCarthy or Ted Cruz or any other extremist bully. **Last November, I defeated my anti-choice opponent and the voters of the 4th district sent me to pass reproductive freedom in the United States Congress. I won't stop until we block any and all national abortion bans and finally codify abortion rights into law.** I will never waver. clean_body: | | | | Peter – We knew the day was coming. Yesterday afternoon, an anti-choice judge in Texas outlawed mifepristone, the most commonly-used abortion drug in the United States, stripping rights away from every woman in America and putting countless lives at risk. It's a callous ruling engineered by a tiny group of misogynistic radicals who can't stand the idea that women can think for themselves. Pregnant women deserve medical advice from doctors – not judges, not anti-choice activists or Kevin McCarthy or Ted Cruz or any other extremist bully. Last November, I defeated my anti-choice opponent and the voters of the 4th district sent me to pass reproductive freedom in the United States Congress. I won't stop until we block any and all national abortion bans and finally codify abortion rights into law. I will never waver. In solidarity, Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. subject: Did you know our next special election is May 16th
body:
And, winning this race would bring us one seat CLOSER to a Democratic majority. | | |
---
| | **Next month we have our next special election in New Hampshire.** New Hampshire House Republicans are in the majority by only FOUR seats, so defending each and every seat must be our top priority. We know special elections often go unnoticed, especially at the state level, but the outcomes of these races affect voters’ day-to-day lives more than other elections. That’s why we’re reaching out today – we can’t lose momentum now! [Can you chip in **$7 today** to elect state Democrats in elections across the country? Every dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing must-win seats like this one. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OGr4lzsYOtO0q2VoBVUNpeoxj2-Irw5hOEpT09A3eM1wj0V0w_fGw1YJ2_eHZBnDi7A0ZcHC9NBcI6Xo89HeGEb36Dgq5-60baZbD5qutFLGisfovR1BOsuxiDHsv_RRn0HioFgi4x_DXmRxXHApoVJxkOCtIWRD7Pc0H_EqDrn6E2RKi1NeNoTIiYNNiFyP5kK672U1JI3YccViHvb7Dhn0dY8mja2ajqZbyxkQlf76lhrBQk04wOmtyF5mhG8kE_P-k4H8yPXtZr8qjp59gceGCpfvVL0EYsu7NH7dxccAJtwbQVDvt211gWQnD9jeWZxrdBzyOL0BRCte51BCwBxumOT6OAM8fNCQ-QDjV1dvZclYFm_iug9nSU8GRYY62D-LoB4hZyWKQ4JzHqZYDGN7N-sa9UdRowTelPK3TMxWYU_yUM12LhQKPkK3whS5ltu_d3YB6iOEHFqWe6wdpQ2jkX4t8ZJvkfppi16fW2erpV6PRtYNsdEDuMo2RNJK7ZAHkPEue7YkhMmbj8nMrb4/3v6/tuTtEQnPT7GDo6PrtAtdWg/h0/gL2OA0GUAnHJDRqcSFytimqlRRwugANnO0tAm8cwauc) **Here’s the truth: We are only four seats away from turning the New Hampshire House from red to blue. And, if we lose this seat, we _might not_ have a fighting chance at flipping this chamber!** The outcome of this race will strongly influence the politics in New Hampshire and is critical going into 2024, so we can’t sit this one out. **Can we count on you today?** [In the last month before Election Day: Can you rush $7 right now to elect state Democrats in New Hampshire and other elections across the country? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OGr4lzsYOtO0q2VoBVUNpeoxj2-Irw5hOEpT09A3eM1wj0V0w_fGw1YJ2_eHZBnDi7A0ZcHC9NBcI6Xo89HeGEb36Dgq5-60baZbD5qutFLGisfovR1BOsuxiDHsv_RRn0HioFgi4x_DXmRxXHApoVIkii1jtc07camAHo7Z0L1qiEg4ovH0aYFIT3UMOyzGRBAS0thxTc-i9H7JMgR_PBL5ORnSW4wDOx7B_mIfE63ayVyfGV8jj2eSz7hC16UBUdrYzYgHpuL3HP_ygZ5k5AAjqEhFutc8f7H9pwRENFzCYs0Km_ohmcwmiH6HMDV7ZmIwEsFU2LFGUZpDXQIwA8ot38WhmzhAU7Idgad-hZx0zbfW6vhraWATaIlvrfTIHfysh3YzUdLlOjU3xD1U7ZvEKPAJuMZ39B5KAgH3rG9pUsj5Clba905hiEQhHNTKku-iQcBSkioQyMSWlwAMloFDPXL5ERA0G9nU28OuGiPc8Q7Agh8teXjXAPyQzo87iEIlu5PZM2V_0ZOeNdOZkhQ/3v6/tuTtEQnPT7GDo6PrtAtdWg/h1/u508GoTM-Ob_YOShY4NQ6bjVV0TWWdbNwqkaca5pRIw) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: And, winning this race would bring us one seat CLOSER to a Democratic majority. | | | | | Next month we have our next special election in New Hampshire. New Hampshire House Republicans are in the majority by only FOUR seats, so defending each and every seat must be our top priority. We know special elections often go unnoticed, especially at the state level, but the outcomes of these races affect voters’ day-to-day lives more than other elections. That’s why we’re reaching out today – we can’t lose momentum now! Here’s the truth: We are only four seats away from turning the New Hampshire House from red to blue. And, if we lose this seat, we might not have a fighting chance at flipping this chamber! The outcome of this race will strongly influence the politics in New Hampshire and is critical going into 2024, so we can’t sit this one out. Can we count on you today? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you! name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Call: Chicago to Philly, building local power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

TOPICS: Election Recaps | Brandon Johnson wins Chicago Mayor | St. Louis
Majority w/ Megan Green | Helen Gym for Philly Mayor | Sarah Innamorato
for Allegheny Co Exec in PGH | ‘Tax the Rich’ Bernie Sticker | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1011&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ][IMG]

Don’t miss our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ]National Organize-to-Win Call focused on building
progressive power in cities nationwide — LIVE this Monday, April 10th at
8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

Coming off major victories in Chicago and St. Louis, we’ll dig into how
progressives are forging coalitions and governing majorities with STL
Board President Megan Green.

Then, we’ll turn to the next big races in Pennsylvania, strategizing with
Helen Gym for Philadelphia Mayor and Sarah Innamarato for Allegheny County
Executive in Pittsburgh!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

BUILD LOCAL POWER

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1014&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ][IMG]

Progressives won big this week, electing new Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson
and shoring up our majority in St. Louis — and we’re just getting started!

“It was a momentous win,” said the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8592?t=1015&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ]Associated Press. “It comes as
groups like Our Revolution, a powerful progressive advocacy organization,
push to win more local and state offices in upcoming mayoral elections in
Philadelphia and elsewhere.”

We also saw our slates in Kansas City MO and Lincoln NE advance to the
general and won a city council seat with Suzanna Ibarra in Joliet IN!

Thanks to the surge of support from Our Revolution members and volunteers,
we made nearly half a million voter contacts for Tuesday’s races.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1016&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ]City by city, our working-class coalition is building power from the
bottom up. Join our organizing call Monday to learn more!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1017&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ][IMG]

Brandon won on a vision of co-governance with the people of Chicago, and
that is precisely the inside-outside strategy we need for change.

“The fact Brandon Johnson could go up against the 'defund the police'
slogan and the police union and win is incredibly heartening for
progressives,” OR Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8593?t=1018&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ]ABC News.

“We don't have to run away on the issues of crime and public safety,” he
said.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1019&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ][IMG]

Tuesday’s victories show that when we organize, we can overpower big money
and reclaim our communities.

“This is the fundamental fault line within the Democratic Party we’re
seeing being played out,” Joseph told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8594?t=1020&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ]Vox. “Brandon’s win shows that a
broader message about safety can resonate, and not just a
lock-up-more-people message.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1021&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ][IMG]

In St. Louis, we held our progressive majority in the city, electing six
to the Board of Alderman to join Board President Megan Green and Mayor
Tishaura Jones.

It was a good night, Green, a former Bernie delegate, told the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8595?t=1022&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ]St.
Louis Post Dispatch. “The future of St. Louis is progressive.”

Local power directly impacts lives. In St. Louis, progressives have
already delivered a basic income pilot program, and next up are tenant's
rights and homelessness initiatives.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1023&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ][IMG]

Next up is Pennsylvania!

In November, we elected US Sen. John Fetterman & US Rep. Summer Lee. Now,
Helen Gym is running for Philly Mayor and Sarah Innamorato is up for
Allegheny Co. Executive in Pittsburgh!

Hear from both of them and St. Louis’ Megan Green on our National
Organize-to-Win Call on Monday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1024&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1025&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ][IMG]

We’re seeing a surge of anti-choice, anti-protest & other terrible bills
because the right wing has seized down-ballot power.

But, thanks to years of organizing, we now have a chance to take that
power back in upcoming races in Houston, Buffalo, Kansas City, Akron,
South Bend, Lincoln & beyond!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1026&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1027&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ][IMG]

Every two weeks, we gather to organize directly with progressive leaders,
activists, and fellow workers. Make sure to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1028&akid=4189%2E5885482%2Ewsfx_n ]RSVP to participate
directly in Zoom and make connections in the chat!

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call TOPICS: Election Recaps | Brandon Johnson wins Chicago Mayor | St. Louis Majority w/ Megan Green | Helen Gym for Philly Mayor | Sarah Innamorato for Allegheny Co Exec in PGH | ‘Tax the Rich’ Bernie Sticker | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Don’t miss our [ ]National Organize-to-Win Call focused on building progressive power in cities nationwide — LIVE this Monday, April 10th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT! Coming off major victories in Chicago and St. Louis, we’ll dig into how progressives are forging coalitions and governing majorities with STL Board President Megan Green. Then, we’ll turn to the next big races in Pennsylvania, strategizing with Helen Gym for Philadelphia Mayor and Sarah Innamarato for Allegheny County Executive in Pittsburgh! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ BUILD LOCAL POWER [ ][IMG] Progressives won big this week, electing new Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson and shoring up our majority in St. Louis — and we’re just getting started! “It was a momentous win,” said the [ ]Associated Press. “It comes as groups like Our Revolution, a powerful progressive advocacy organization, push to win more local and state offices in upcoming mayoral elections in Philadelphia and elsewhere.” We also saw our slates in Kansas City MO and Lincoln NE advance to the general and won a city council seat with Suzanna Ibarra in Joliet IN! Thanks to the surge of support from Our Revolution members and volunteers, we made nearly half a million voter contacts for Tuesday’s races. [ ]City by city, our working-class coalition is building power from the bottom up. Join our organizing call Monday to learn more! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Brandon won on a vision of co-governance with the people of Chicago, and that is precisely the inside-outside strategy we need for change. “The fact Brandon Johnson could go up against the 'defund the police' slogan and the police union and win is incredibly heartening for progressives,” OR Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]ABC News. “We don't have to run away on the issues of crime and public safety,” he said. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Tuesday’s victories show that when we organize, we can overpower big money and reclaim our communities. “This is the fundamental fault line within the Democratic Party we’re seeing being played out,” Joseph told [ ]Vox. “Brandon’s win shows that a broader message about safety can resonate, and not just a lock-up-more-people message.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] In St. Louis, we held our progressive majority in the city, electing six to the Board of Alderman to join Board President Megan Green and Mayor Tishaura Jones. It was a good night, Green, a former Bernie delegate, told the [ ]St. Louis Post Dispatch. “The future of St. Louis is progressive.” Local power directly impacts lives. In St. Louis, progressives have already delivered a basic income pilot program, and next up are tenant's rights and homelessness initiatives. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Next up is Pennsylvania! In November, we elected US Sen. John Fetterman & US Rep. Summer Lee. Now, Helen Gym is running for Philly Mayor and Sarah Innamorato is up for Allegheny Co. Executive in Pittsburgh! Hear from both of them and St. Louis’ Megan Green on our National Organize-to-Win Call on Monday. [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We’re seeing a surge of anti-choice, anti-protest & other terrible bills because the right wing has seized down-ballot power. But, thanks to years of organizing, we now have a chance to take that power back in upcoming races in Houston, Buffalo, Kansas City, Akron, South Bend, Lincoln & beyond! [ ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Every two weeks, we gather to organize directly with progressive leaders, activists, and fellow workers. Make sure to [ ]RSVP to participate directly in Zoom and make connections in the chat! Thousands more watch LIVE on our [ ]Facebook and [ ]Twitter, and you can find more of our video content by subscribing to our [ ]YouTube channel. Help us build the call — share this [ ]link on Twitter and [ ]invite your friends to tune-in with you. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ NEW ‘TAX THE RICH’ STICKER [ ][IMG] NEW STICKER! April is tax season, but we think it’s past time to take a lesson from Bernie and make sure billionaires pay a higher tax rate than school teachers! Billionaires currently pay about 3 percent of their total income in taxes. This isn’t rocket science, we need to tax the rich and invest in our people. Get your sticker with a one-time donation of $10 (only $5 for members!) OR sign-up for a monthly donation of $5 or more. [ ]GET YOUR STICKER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Don’t forget to [ ]RSVP NOW for our LIVE interactive broadcast focused on building local power with St. Louis Board of Alders President Megan Green, Helen Gym for Philly Mayor, and Sarah Innamorato for Allegheny Co. Executive in Pittsburgh. The call kicks off at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT this Monday! [ ]JOIN THE CALL ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

I can't do this without you. My team will update me with the names of those who heed my call to action today. I hope to see your name.

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Responding to attacks on Gaza, the world’s largest open air prison:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Support Palestinian-led organizing today. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvnTZeMSl1LdeFo_UqijWV-6C3k4SpO9J3tRWYeTJtfBwOJ_sZIltAP7WPJuWjo-fcHsqGGnYKbu3kvYbRUAwyuFsdyMShGL-wa913Zlw2YP-g5CNn4WRhR7kT5PScIzFaRdY2eYSrQx5WdiAPHxRjlR4odKB6-ZcA9F5G9HDaVH1ABkv1n90wAcxPs3vVexevCzcvYEY0aZnziKo_oZiN1ZJV6AtZwLY_Sr46nijD1dKNc38TuNb-zF00QKzBZehk/3v6/X3vIxqdaT--aARd5B_-0CQ/h0/iH1Vs1gBNW-ZNGFeg9xlVWOVIbH9aFXPzD9FLEaonJI)
---
Friend, Israel’s military just bombed Gaza, damaging a children’s hospital while patients were inside. This bombing came after the apartheid government of Israel brutally beat worshippers at Al Aqsa mosque, destroying the on-site medical clinic and then blocking medical aid for wounded Palestinians. **We cannot allow the U.S. to keep funding the violent attacks on Palestinians. One of the crucial movement partners I work with to push for changes to U.S. policy in Palestine is the Palestinian-led, U.S.-based Adalah Justice Project.** Adalah Justice Project has been building the U.S. movement for Palestinian rights and expanding solidarity for Palestine. With the latest attacks on Gaza, I want to lift up their campaign “Gaza is Palestine,” which is exposing Israel’s ongoing siege of 2 million refugees who are trapped in the world’s largest open air prison. clean_body: Support Palestinian-led organizing today. | | | Friend, Israel’s military just bombed Gaza, damaging a children’s hospital while patients were inside. This bombing came after the apartheid government of Israel brutally beat worshippers at Al Aqsa mosque, destroying the on-site medical clinic and then blocking medical aid for wounded Palestinians. We cannot allow the U.S. to keep funding the violent attacks on Palestinians. One of the crucial movement partners I work with to push for changes to U.S. policy in Palestine is the Palestinian-led, U.S.-based Adalah Justice Project. Adalah Justice Project has been building the U.S. movement for Palestinian rights and expanding solidarity for Palestine. With the latest attacks on Gaza, I want to lift up their campaign “Gaza is Palestine,” which is exposing Israel’s ongoing siege of 2 million refugees who are trapped in the world’s largest open air prison. | We must urgently stop the oppression committed by Israel’s apartheid government -- and Adalah Justice Project is helping to build a powerful movement to push back against Israel’s racist policies. I am grateful to Adalah Justice Project for their analysis, messaging, and support during my time in Congress on the issues facing the Palestinian people. Adalah Justice Project’s work has been crucial in shifting hearts and minds, while deepening ties between Palestine solidarity and the interlocking network of struggles for justice in the U.S. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Aladah Justice Project | | | | | | | | | I am proud to work alongside you and Adalah Justice Project to build toward true justice for the Palestinian people. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Allen West
subject: Will you just stand there.... or will you fight?
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534196:6VlK5eGhN:m:1:3391001263:5A423BEE755AC473B27BFE2BA12DE6FD:r)
---
| | Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject? It's time to decide. Because there is a well-funded, well-organized and growing movement to take away the single most important Constitutional Freedom that keeps us free ... The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ... It's your Right to KEEP AND BEAR ARMS -- and it's the one you're in imminent danger of losing if we, the people, don't stand up to protect it. [**Will you take a stand for your Second Amendment Rights today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534196:6VlK5eGhN:m:1:3391001263:5A423BEE755AC473B27BFE2BA12DE6FD:r) My friend, there's reason I was issued a rifle when I joined the Army ... It's because when all else fails, a firearm is ultimately what determines who's in charge. I know it... You know it ... **That's why Joe Biden and his friends on the Radical Left want you dis-armed.** They'd much rather RULE over SUBJECTS than ANSWER to CITIZENS! There are a lot of groups out there "pledging" to protect your Second Amendment Rights. You've probably got a drawer full of their folding knives ... A few of their duffle bags ... Maybe even a vest or a membership card in your wallet. BUT HERE'S THE THING ... After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been? But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute. The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ... [**Will you join the growing membership of the Second Amendment Institute through a donation today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534196:6VlK5eGhN:m:1:3391001263:5A423BEE755AC473B27BFE2BA12DE6FD:r) Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us:
---
* Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ... * Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses * Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators * Our National Conferences and Online Community
---
You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!! But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! [**Can you spare a donation to join the Second Amendment Institute and save your Second Amendment Right to bear arms **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534196:6VlK5eGhN:m:1:3391001263:5A423BEE755AC473B27BFE2BA12DE6FD:r)**_today?_** If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different! But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms. Now let's get to work together. God bless you and God Bless America,
---
---
Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret) Member, 112th US Congress
---
P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost. That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if [**everyone I write to today could spare a gift, that should just about cover what they have planned in the months ahead, and even allow them to grow their outreach **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534196:6VlK5eGhN:m:1:3391001263:5A423BEE755AC473B27BFE2BA12DE6FD:r)**_efforts._**
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534196:6VlK5eGhN:m:1:3391001263:5A423BEE755AC473B27BFE2BA12DE6FD:r)
---
|
---
|

My friend, there's reason I was issued a rifle when I joined the Army ... It's because when all else fails, a firearm is ultimately what determines who's in charge. I know it... You know it ... That's why Joe Biden and his friends on the Radical Left want you dis-armed. They'd much rather RULE over SUBJECTS than ANSWER to CITIZENS! There are a lot of groups out there "pledging" to protect your Second Amendment Rights. You've probably got a drawer full of their folding knives ... A few of their duffle bags ... Maybe even a vest or a membership card in your wallet. BUT HERE'S THE THING ... After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been? But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute. The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ... Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us: Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ... Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators Our National Conferences and Online Community You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!! But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! ? If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different! But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms. Now let's get to work together. God bless you and God Bless America, Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret) Member, 112th US Congress P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost. That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if . | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system February 17, 2023. For more information . | mailto:unsub-53382195630-echo7-A42ACB2062A21162EA7F2CE5E468857B@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: =?utf-8?Q?DNC=20Community=20Engagement?=
subject: Reproductive Rights Are Under Attack!
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Yesterday evening, Texas judge Matthew Kacsmaryk issued a ruling that could severely compromise access to mifepristone, which was first approved by the FDA more than 20 years ago and has since been used by more than five million people in the U.S. to safely end their pregnancies. While the judge stayed the decision to give the federal government seven days to appeal, meaning that for now approval of mifepristone remains protected, this is still an unprecedented and deeply harmful move. This is a devastating blow to reproductive rights nationwide and is just another example of how Republicans are fighting to undermine our freedoms.
---
|
---
| In response to this ruling to block access to the abortion pill mifepristone, **DNC Chair Jaime Harrison** released the [following statement](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5518967939&e=d6c5c7d7ec): _“Leading medical organizations, including the American Medical Association and the American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists, have deemed this medication, which has been available for decades, safe and effective. These decisions should be made between a woman and her doctor and guided by science, not conservative officials with an extreme partisan agenda._ _“We knew that MAGA Republicans would not stop at overturning Roe v. Wade, and despite voters overwhelmingly rejecting their extreme anti-choice agenda — including this week in Wisconsin — MAGA Republicans will continue their campaign against women’s reproductive freedom until they achieve their ultimate goal of banning abortion nationwide. Already we’ve seen the MAGA House majority and Republican politicians across the country push anti-abortion legislation, and abortion bans have become the definitive litmus test of the 2024 Republican presidential primary. _ _“Democrats will do everything in our power to fight back to ensure access to safe and legal abortion is protected, and voters will hold every last Republican accountable for an extreme anti-choice agenda that takes away Americans’ freedoms and puts their health at risk.” _
---
|
---
| **Ways to Take Action**
In response to this harmful decision, here are ways from Planned Parenthood that you can stand up and take action to continue to protect reproductive freedom for all Americans:
* **Join in the weekend of action on Saturday, April 15 & Sunday, April 16, 2023.**
* **Pledge to fight abortion bans and restrictions[ here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=908ac3e4a1&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**
* Invite supporters to join an upcoming action call or teach-in with Planned Parenthood Federation of America’s National Volunteer Program [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a1682a0289&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Tell your story about what motivates you to fight for abortion access [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ccab8c0641&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Pledge to talk about abortion with your friends and family [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a48ea0df18&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Share a community care message online about how people can access an abortion using abortionfinder.org [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f7862fcedc&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

---
|
---
| **In the News**
---
|
---
| [@POTUS: Today, a federal district judge in Texas ruled that a prescription medication available for over 22 years, approved by the FDA, and used safely by millions of women should no longer be approved in the U.S.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=75dbca74e5&e=d6c5c7d7ec) [Here's why this matters. And how my Administration is going to fight it. [Click to read full tweet thread.]](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9535dc1e13&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
| [@TheDemocrats: MAGA Republicans aren’t stopping at Roe v. Wade. They will continue pushing their extreme anti-choice agenda to try to ban abortion nationwide. ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=341647eb6a&e=d6c5c7d7ec) [Democrats will do everything in our power to fight back to ensure access to abortion care is protected.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7d069380a4&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
| [@VP: Everyone should have the right to access safe and effective medication that has been approved by the FDA. ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=660d1d2f76&e=d6c5c7d7ec) [Today's unprecedented decision by a federal district court in Texas threatens this right.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ab02cc26a4&e=d6c5c7d7ec) [Read my full statement.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8176062bad&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
| [@harrisonjaime: Mifepristone has been deemed safe and effective by leading medical organizations for decades.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=09f75644a7&e=d6c5c7d7ec) [We knew the MAGA GOP wouldn't stop at overturning Roe v. Wade. Let's be clear: Abortion bans have become the definitive litmus test of the 2024 GOP primary.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7bc13c9ae8&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
| | | _Copyright © 2023 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=b2fd253754) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=b2fd253754).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)

name: Lizzy Thomas, Working Families Party
subject: I have seen my state creep closer and closer to fascism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
The Republican-controlled Tennessee House of Representatives voted on Thursday to expel two young Black lawmakers – Justin Jones and Justin Pearson. | | | Peter, Ten days after a mass-shooting in a Nashville school, and one week after three Tennessee lawmakers led a peaceful protest for gun reform in the legislature, **the Republican-controlled Tennessee House of Representatives voted on Thursday to expel two young Black lawmakers — Justin Jones and Justin Pearson.** 1 It’s worth noting, Peter, that of the three lawmakers who protested, only the two Black lawmakers were expelled. Let us be clear — this was intentional. And harkens back to the Jim Crow era. In the state where Nathan Bedford Forrest founded the Ku Klux Klan, we can’t ignore the racist overtones of this wholly undemocratic action. As a resident of Nashville, I am outraged by this massive violation of our democracy. But I am also filled with hope. Because as lawmakers voted to expel the two youngest Black representatives in the state legislature, hundreds of young people filled the halls of the state capital in protest. These protests were organized and led by Gen Z activists, with many staying for over 12 hours, staging die-ins, dropping banners, and supporting one another as the House voted. **The Tennessee Republican Party may have expelled these two lawmakers, but they can’t expel this movement.** Now that State Reps. Jones and Pearson have been expelled, special elections will be held. Both Jones and Pearson come from the movement, and it will be the movement that re-elects them to the state legislature. **[Will you split a donation between Reps. Justin Pearson and Justin Jones to re-elect them to their rightfully-held seats in the state legislature?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdylBgEUA3Qyiy-9hcy0jvqpj9igQTqONkfMmE-VGU4AERC8PXZ9gxAw-yP8OJXvQgyKXrLriwMUNNgRjACU2p3xCCwyVd-40Nbmin3fCN89CDLJMuf6PJATjbkdc2nujscFHjiB4W01DeUvGv8t0TqVXMNDHU_S9fB6ralsvPIkCgh2G4GjqRdbcB9ytvP-JiYQoXxUulu39jqjAdytRAlUoS0BWyLPdVFcCOK5_-ZC4F10PLFL_ikilIhxQucAZM0vq54YZMKgegJElPzpTwlw75Rov4Hc7368yCjDHzBV5KPEAI-yZokFO7Q_g6jpRnzIG0SrNPwjsmRLh6-m4hDSzxF_IagjPHGvOuCu0bQLN7___x_B7ehuPNhI1-NEKjnDivLWIXYIGjX8f1NIyPaUDob8OfofR7MjC3OOVjPZ8/3v6/KgHJj1giQISffBktTfgPIg/h0/XmkDvRZhuq5ttUx76guFh9z5rtCsPGWrpBiu7JnPhJs)** **[Split a donation »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdylBgEUA3Qyiy-9hcy0jvqpj9igQTqONkfMmE-VGU4AERC8PXZ9gxAw-yP8OJXvQgrLevXnp0dPNgpPh2TE-hDLLI7ssm5yFUJa7K0Vg8eh1ZOlPg1BnS-R5KiXlkGBVHkEhkIlRQtjxpaLQNfDbB1aOYZnBToLksOGY9w4Z9uHM4a4P02htbgF5brBTEeuXCgDZw16iwIiI0D1pU2qLuOEsCvzDjZ5LqjqcbYAEjQ_1I_9M8rKSyk4E35_k8M48OV73q1-E_rxGE8uJ9EqYvnIwoVmSGnxtlhH7-exSa8gFie0lBYJm19IKIE15ciLHEWShvX7Sue-0EHgnNRDoxyIQ-HgwTP5NTuzk6n2gNISZPIAa1nWjqox4kgfSShP-k2huh55LraPZBCTF-vdfCfOhxotucT6auUhnUCQNZ49Y/3v6/KgHJj1giQISffBktTfgPIg/h1/IZemvpEfyrh4xOvLlNdXNdkfU5Zvl___caqTa-GWZ0w)** Thursday’s expulsions didn’t happen in a vacuum. I’ve called Nashville home for seven years, and in that time, I have seen my state creep closer and closer to fascism. We’ve seen abortion banned outright in our state, and we’ve also seen the right-wing try to ban healthcare for trans youth, and weaken our gun control laws. During a speech in the House, Rep. Justin Jones said “what the nation is seeing is that we don’t have a democracy in Tennessee.” **But make no mistake, Tennessee is far from alone.** All around the country, we are seeing the Republican Party violate democratic norms from refusing to accept election results in Arizona, to gerrymandering themselves into supermajorities in Wisconsin, to attempting to nullify local ordinances in blue cities in Texas, and expanding police power in Jackson, Mississippi.2 As Rep. Justin Pearson said Thursday night, “we can never normalize the ending of democracy.” **Which is why we must forcefully fight back against this assault on our democracy by re-electing Reps. Justin Pearson and Justin Jones and commit to fighting anti-democratic forces across the country.** [**Will you split a donation between Reps. Justin Pearson and Justin Jones to re-elect them to their rightfully-held seats in the state legislature?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdylBgEUA3Qyiy-9hcy0jvqpj9igQTqONkfMmE-VGU4AERC8PXZ9gxAw-yP8OJXvQgvVkHPxBCjRSyeaNqnwdt2HzTNan9NhquxVUOeqjpM5xQ0YtplKq__lTpoRvOwJdDgWEJ17UdXTdMbUWAJ0f9OvOF6qNfU9N_YpIplGqMy5BbNaxYQ8HMsW7HzBN4eYzpoVonLhoA4VgsBVBkSakicIlKwh6iVIbYUnD8Eg51scJqkA5I8pjcS5rV7qdM3uiz8p1Zy0nnDzYnLLEp0vM_fNtkqjdgnm0Be-7-1A6voPwXYf1vHZp50_j454vwZ6Zi_B33W53eaQ7tDBkZACZuOWK7l1gjngGxmldMCT8tF_zksIh7iIQ3dPqPuqlptuw3YlEv06VpsP_pQLycf908U7ATV9Y25KGbtvuRLSU0Amo/3v6/KgHJj1giQISffBktTfgPIg/h2/pl2-E61THevuK8cGtqpPtvqtzAnkhN_w0JyTUohSqW8) **[Split a donation »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdylBgEUA3Qyiy-9hcy0jvqpj9igQTqONkfMmE-VGU4AERC8PXZ9gxAw-yP8OJXvQgn3AcyN3PaBfc9ZXPA_lWxDwxLlsDzKB9B_tK4M97eUePmTqdkbCBss-rx26P07J379ufCr_ndM9WIyvlfSbRurN7a45R62qlNVShvzpekpcmXZ--EOb9AilBeUmN80f95B7Jsk9_fFN13JNtC131aJ76XkHq3f62KufkioKR4WN7tUna2OeW30wNUeYFvXF6WVUeorZkSXq6QWP_wGHg-hMV-vnlDQYb3e7J05GhwSWs_SibtZW32_LvLU9-3E0exyPoe2JJXvBA7220Jcvgybimm1OV5MrtuG06CP9SIvHDynOYM9oN1KD4Pziqw7_N9OJ8xKnIOj-N9NWGtO9XsfGVqTokfET0QXCkyVmg428/3v6/KgHJj1giQISffBktTfgPIg/h3/6P2qbHs2UggpY00RWO_5AxsIC20pRNfPm713kMTwSVw)** In solidarity, Lizzy Thomas

clean_body: The Republican-controlled Tennessee House of Representatives voted on Thursday to expel two young Black lawmakers – Justin Jones and Justin Pearson. | | | Peter, Ten days after a mass-shooting in a Nashville school, and one week after three Tennessee lawmakers led a peaceful protest for gun reform in the legislature, the Republican-controlled Tennessee House of Representatives voted on Thursday to expel two young Black lawmakers — Justin Jones and Justin Pearson. 1 It’s worth noting, Peter, that of the three lawmakers who protested, only the two Black lawmakers were expelled. Let us be clear — this was intentional. And harkens back to the Jim Crow era. In the state where Nathan Bedford Forrest founded the Ku Klux Klan, we can’t ignore the racist overtones of this wholly undemocratic action. As a resident of Nashville, I am outraged by this massive violation of our democracy. But I am also filled with hope. Because as lawmakers voted to expel the two youngest Black representatives in the state legislature, hundreds of young people filled the halls of the state capital in protest. These protests were organized and led by Gen Z activists, with many staying for over 12 hours, staging die-ins, dropping banners, and supporting one another as the House voted. The Tennessee Republican Party may have expelled these two lawmakers, but they can’t expel this movement. Now that State Reps. Jones and Pearson have been expelled, special elections will be held. Both Jones and Pearson come from the movement, and it will be the movement that re-elects them to the state legislature. Thursday’s expulsions didn’t happen in a vacuum. I’ve called Nashville home for seven years, and in that time, I have seen my state creep closer and closer to fascism. We’ve seen abortion banned outright in our state, and we’ve also seen the right-wing try to ban healthcare for trans youth, and weaken our gun control laws. During a speech in the House, Rep. Justin Jones said “what the nation is seeing is that we don’t have a democracy in Tennessee.” But make no mistake, Tennessee is far from alone. All around the country, we are seeing the Republican Party violate democratic norms from refusing to accept election results in Arizona, to gerrymandering themselves into supermajorities in Wisconsin, to attempting to nullify local ordinances in blue cities in Texas, and expanding police power in Jackson, Mississippi.2 As Rep. Justin Pearson said Thursday night, “we can never normalize the ending of democracy.” Which is why we must forcefully fight back against this assault on our democracy by re-electing Reps. Justin Pearson and Justin Jones and commit to fighting anti-democratic forces across the country. In solidarity, Lizzy Thomas Digital Organizer Working Families Party Source: 1\. , CNN, Thu April 6, 2023 2\. , The Hill , Fri April 7, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Peter,

Do you have a quick moment?

Republican leaders and our top Senators are convening a MAJOR meeting to set our platform for 2024, _and they need your assistance. _

_**Your opinions, concerns, and interests need to be heard by Republican Party leaders as we formulate our 2024 campaign platform.**_

That's why you have been selected to participate in this historic, touchstone grassroots survey, the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534361:JMAWOeGN9:m:1:3391001263:86F019AF0DD44F457B050F0F4DAAF41D:r)**

2024 is the best chance our Party has to secure a Senate Majority for the next 10 YEARS - an entire decade. That's why we **must accurately grasp what issues and opinions our grassroots supporters care about the most.**

Your response is crucial because it represents your city, and our Nationwide survey cannot be complete without YOUR response.

**[Please submit YOUR RESPONSE to the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to ensure your answers are recorded and set our Platform for 2024.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534361:JMAWOeGN9:m:1:3391001263:86F019AF0DD44F457B050F0F4DAAF41D:r)**

Make no mistake, the **2024 election** will be one of the most consequential political battles of our lifetime, so it's ESSENTIAL we get this right - we only have ONE shot.

Our team wants to present your response FIRST, so you must submit your form before 4/3/2023. Thank you in advance for your support!

**[Take the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey to represent your city and set the Official Republican Platform for 2024!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534361:JMAWOeGN9:m:1:3391001263:86F019AF0DD44F457B050F0F4DAAF41D:r)**

NRSC Team

**A Trump-appointed extremist judge in Texas just ruled against the FDA-approved medication used for abortion care.**

After the Republican-stacked Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ last year, right-wing politicians in states like Texas passed extreme laws outlawing all abortion care. Now, this Republican judge in Texas is trying to end medication abortion NATIONWIDE.

We still have seven days ‘til this ruling takes effect. But if this ruling stands, abortion medication—the most common form of abortion—will be effectively outlawed for all Americans.

**FIRSTNAME, Texas is ground zero in Republicans’ war on abortion rights. Let me explain:**
* 50 years ago Jane Roe sued in her home state of Texas to gain abortion rights – ultimately winning her case in the Supreme Court in _Roe v. Wade_.
* Last year the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ in the disastrous _Dobbs_ decision—ending the guarantee of abortion rights nationwide.
* Immediately after the _Dobbs_ decision, Texas Republicans enforced one of the most extreme abortion bans in the nation.
* And YESTERDAY a Texas judge appointed by Trump ruled against the FDA’s approval of medication used for abortions – a decision which will impact ALL Americans.

We must fight back against the extreme, right-wing assault on abortion rights. That includes ensuring Texans and all Americans have access to abortion medication.
**[If you agree, sign our petition and let us know you stand with the millions of Texans who support abortion rights. clean_body: We just got word, Peter, A Trump-appointed extremist judge in Texas just ruled against the FDA-approved medication used for abortion care. After the Republican-stacked Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year, right-wing politicians in states like Texas passed extreme laws outlawing all abortion care. Now, this Republican judge in Texas is trying to end medication abortion NATIONWIDE. We still have seven days ‘til this ruling takes effect. But if this ruling stands, abortion medication—the most common form of abortion—will be effectively outlawed for all Americans. ** FIRSTNAME, Texas is ground zero in Republicans’ war on abortion rights. Let me explain: 50 years ago Jane Roe sued in her home state of Texas to gain abortion rights – ultimately winning her case in the Supreme Court in Roe v. Wade. Last year the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in the disastrous Dobbs decision—ending the guarantee of abortion rights nationwide. Immediately after the Dobbs decision, Texas Republicans enforced one of the most extreme abortion bans in the nation. And YESTERDAY a Texas judge appointed by Trump ruled against the FDA’s approval of medication used for abortions – a decision which will impact ALL Americans. We must fight back against the extreme, right-wing assault on abortion rights. That includes ensuring Texans and all Americans have access to abortion medication. Thank you, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: People Not Politicians
subject: You can help make Oregon’s elections more fair and balanced
disclaimer_text: Paid for By People Not Politicians IP 14, #22420
body:
Learn more about how IP 14 will help Oregon!
| [](https://links.peoplenotpoliticians-or.com/u/click?_t=26164f4ce0d9427686b56d34ce5753a7&_m=c382750c3ae5453d8b36a154f4d109e4&_e=S777zu1GvK1cqm6fZTP02O-BFQt072nOWiIqzC82iGFHpFeIuvKb2RkkPpLfeoTGCtQAdeNGhXTN2FCHmDGbCYWmiHXvsBn1Px2G1uvCxuDixs_Hk96ruSA--9JmfspNziFnmymzl0UoU8j84xQn-6psKkG0HjO8JnAqnfxVY9tyC3OFDbSVeV_NAiwmhN3A7gOUJ_cfLKD3dfZUmFpqyEeYb6-WJJ9PsKtRZqnzWoEj0gjH5sK30cNShmP703zy9Yzoe6ab1o8janPF0lrFeKlhqDbE2bsPD_soqSaW5zN4SFWwi-65fcQ20to5Y-fXh4Rs2rOxdW2Ib_KWbgzXIQ%3D%3D)
---
**Let’s _End Partisan Gerrymandering_ NOW!**
---

Are you tired of the partisan politics in our elections and in our Legislature?
---
At [People Not Politicians,](https://links.peoplenotpoliticians-or.com/u/click?_t=26164f4ce0d9427686b56d34ce5753a7&_m=c382750c3ae5453d8b36a154f4d109e4&_e=S777zu1GvK1cqm6fZTP02HJFsx6Cx6EU2enBU8_nyWj3lgZO3Nkccme3tuG7AjdLuWBwzh17vdP3Tw6p67NCLuYP7qTEnCjEIzSkU6usVY42J3fXwCoRS4ZqudfkyzZXFMmY-Y4XFl5ebpYK9s1eNTgeS8qSWi-cwjwM-EjZj0lSlfTMIl65cQZ2499vFZNbWwOstwLWO0hw1xep_idnh7DSuQx3BQzCJ7rEIP9OAbs%3D) we’re trying to put a stop to one of the root causes of the partisan divide.....gerrymandering. But we need your help.
---
**Sign the Petition and let’s VOTE on IP 14 for Independent Redistricting!**
---
People and organizations from across the political spectrum want to end partisan gerrymandering and restore balance in fairness to our elections and in our Legislature.
---
• Former Senator and Gubernatorial Candidate Betsy Johnson
• Former Congressman Kurt Schrader
• The Oregon Farm Bureau
• Taxpayers Association of Oregon
• League of Women Voters
• Common Cause....and more!

---
We all agree that it’s time to save our state!
---
**Oregon’s maps got an “F” grade because lawmakers FAILED the fairness test!**
---
Oregon’s maps were drawn to protect incumbent politicians, not represent Oregon voters.
---
• 97.4% of incumbents were re-elected in districts they drew for themselves.
• Most public input was IGNORED.
• Promises of fairness and balance were BROKEN.
• Oregon’s congressional maps received an [F from the Princeton
Gerrymandering Project for partisan fairness.](https://links.peoplenotpoliticians-or.com/u/click?_t=26164f4ce0d9427686b56d34ce5753a7&_m=c382750c3ae5453d8b36a154f4d109e4&_e=S777zu1GvK1cqm6fZTP02CZRF18eUjxrqUVmVh0jpzznxXwhpPVCpBJkvwyk1hefSsnjPfWxK-pzbo4gpQJsMqAwgEA8XJHgSEt9eUZNrvhcIIbrKBalB4pr7u9Mjx1f0cM7HX3Vt4EokJN_8ZxLXh_Xc0RJak6ukYfdsRI33s0rNXPf7nBcI49ii1XTBbpP_vxcyI73XmPvzv62fZ-TdBkiuBjlscb31LFNh9dUm7guqGnRM8cQvqr3-45VKQMjl_pYWkw6dhlK-nokAZTYIA%3D%3D)
---
**We can Fix Oregon’s Gerrymandering Problem with IP14**
---
We need 160,000 signatures to get [Initiative Petition 14](https://links.peoplenotpoliticians-or.com/u/click?_t=26164f4ce0d9427686b56d34ce5753a7&_m=c382750c3ae5453d8b36a154f4d109e4&_e=S777zu1GvK1cqm6fZTP02HJFsx6Cx6EU2enBU8_nyWj3lgZO3Nkccme3tuG7AjdLTMcxX84H8aeyWMedEVca4Wd-hS--ykhQTmUSQoszgfElUXr1MkGtK1NVM5u6H9iOHJtWou_WibSqBnWYbRxhTlujl3t5Nd4rDsoGAQvfUoaj70VOCo0rwTcMON5IbUjU4lZlTN4FZ2YnmCdWEDbf-lQik_pHSGvjGc5WHXeHgx4%3D) on the ballot. _Will you join our efforts by reading, printing, and returning the ballot petition sheet today?_ If voters get to vote on IP 14, we will:
---
✔ Create an 12-member citizen panel to independently draw Oregon’s 90 legislative district, without influence from legislators seeking to protect their own seats for re-election.

✔ Redraw today’s gerrymandered maps with fair districts to better represent Oregonians.

✔ Vote on legislative candidates in NEW DISTRICTS in 2026.
---
Bottom Line: We won’t be stuck with these terrible maps, and can actually make things better before 2031!
---
**Can You Help Our Efforts?**
---
First, we need to collect signatures....lots of them! [Download the petition here](https://links.peoplenotpoliticians-or.com/u/click?_t=26164f4ce0d9427686b56d34ce5753a7&_m=c382750c3ae5453d8b36a154f4d109e4&_e=S777zu1GvK1cqm6fZTP02HJFsx6Cx6EU2enBU8_nyWj3lgZO3Nkccme3tuG7AjdLTMcxX84H8aeyWMedEVca4VLzlcodbF-5d_C3Ui8V36XzFN9UqYwhSOG_O88LXI-jctFCwQfc6XJGsyFg-D4tuz33H4CLULVDFwQ7BDMKA_2MeT3WwAmZ-JxbVf4jRn5Yof85ywrTwd1RzxvoKofPCJfv2Jav1Iv1lbOSNqMNE6Q%3D), sign it, and send it back to the campaign.
---
Next, we need volunteers willing to circulate a petition sheet to friends, family, and co-workers. [Email our campaign](mailto:volunteer@peoplenotpoliticiansoregon.com? subject=Yes%20I%20want%20to%20help!) and we’ll mail you out a volunteer kit.
---
Last, campaigns are expensive and this is critical we get this to the ballot for 2024! **Please consider** [**contributing to the campaign today.**](https://links.peoplenotpoliticians-or.com/u/click?_t=26164f4ce0d9427686b56d34ce5753a7&_m=c382750c3ae5453d8b36a154f4d109e4&_e=S777zu1GvK1cqm6fZTP02EW2f-QU52f1G7u7YVp8Ghpl91ZjolV3hjySFIXn40rJIeUq87aTqyXkm2hYKlcONIZiYNx4guzddyyzHIxONVpwFLnZXGr4d-K_LLAinT-ql9A3Jh4Pjgltbc9tBvlpAXAoOE5jLc2sg0JrN9lUXGXH0t3QIn-GxYLKwSm7Bxa2-Pm5JOUBFpniAmLD1waXW2VH4OuwaJHsd3irgjH8cV_EdRrbz3JG8uJZ3YnZFihC) Every dollar will help collect more signatures to restore fairness and balance in our elections.
---
**We deserve better, and together,_we can make needed change_ happen in Oregon’s elections!**
---

Sincerely,
---
**Norman Turrill**
Chair, People Not Politicians
[ www.PeopleNotPoliticiansOregon.com](https://links.peoplenotpoliticians-or.com/u/click?_t=26164f4ce0d9427686b56d34ce5753a7&_m=c382750c3ae5453d8b36a154f4d109e4&_e=vqMohkZ2wZ019vYk4D-GeqwMUcn65oVHXoSjXmjavJf-eVvwmGGyULfZ2LKRmHFbYpDMXjlN7KnM0MvEilQikg1PX_287At88Wxkdhu51UljErvGTGlcFxiUiSIBroYZLZJDtCcH0tDxqJJ_os_1hUePZOkdCWE7nLkKPn3mIWdwJp2DHlk7xNTtDbP2cm4rW_0Gb05kHWToWEwHMJcLZ-S_31OWUL_aencvLRnAKaA%3D)
---

**PS.** Use your Political Tax Credit for 2023 to get IP 14 to the people for vote! [Contribute $50](https://links.peoplenotpoliticians-or.com/u/click?_t=26164f4ce0d9427686b56d34ce5753a7&_m=c382750c3ae5453d8b36a154f4d109e4&_e=S777zu1GvK1cqm6fZTP02EW2f-QU52f1G7u7YVp8Ghpl91ZjolV3hjySFIXn40rJIeUq87aTqyXkm2hYKlcONIZiYNx4guzddyyzHIxONVrwXUsh1z8G3jFc5oFJdnqit-BnRPTrCbhWtoCqNiy3oMtjntaKT22yyYhxW6xxpafxuyztThBl2B4n0jl8Td-OoUFoB0jHXY_5DAJKpsrZ-Mo6b_Mili-bqz_iqqrt7Fy1hOmGBF5oA8jLn8PEBwi0) ($100 for most couples) today and get that back on your taxes.
---
---
Paid for By People Not Politicians IP 14, #22420.
---
PO Box 2060
Wilsonville, OR 97070
---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not reply to this email as this address is not monitored.
We believe that email is a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters, but you can click [here](https://links.peoplenotpoliticians-or.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=26164f4ce0d9427686b56d34ce5753a7&_s=c382750c3ae5453d8b36a154f4d109e4&_t=Qwb3hXAHSkGiSUxO7wlbZSH8DQIUhfW43AEHfuvh690eEqQBIe-UX6_LmHjsJM1IOltcZ16TQH4HrX9YUeMr__Iu8wxZcQ3zG8hSdWapO1E%3D) if you would like to unsubscribe from these messages.
---

body:
As you have surely heard by now Republicans in Tennessee voted to expel two members of their state legislature for protesting the chamber’s inaction on gun safety.

Friends -
As you have surely heard by now, Republicans in Tennessee voted to expel two members of their state legislature for protesting the chamber’s inaction on gun safety days after a mass shooting at a Nashville elementary school left six dead.
The two state representatives have both raised significant amounts of money and will hopefully get back into office soon.
But today, I want to help the Tennessee Democratic Party continue the fight everywhere across the state.
**If that’s all you need to hear, please split a $5 contribution between the Tennessee Democratic Party and my Campaign for Democracy at this link:**
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/TNDemocrats**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-tndem-split?amount=5&refcode=em230408-1-7&refcode2=1260_4767699_blItF3&akid=1260%2E4767699%2EblItF3)
Otherwise, here’s why I am asking:
$5 to help Tennessee Democrats replace a Republican governor who is obsessed with taking action on drag shows, but refuses to act on gun safety.
$5 to help Tennessee Democrats replace Republicans in the state legislature who voted to expel these two members. There were a lot of very close races last cycle.
And $5 to help the Campaign for Democracy continue taking the fight to Republicans in red states like Tennessee, Texas, Florida and more.
Help send a message to Tennessee Democrats that they are not alone. We are in this together. And together, progress is possible. Everywhere.
[**Can you use this link to split a $5 contribution between the Tennessee Democratic Party and the Campaign for Democracy today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-tndem-split?amount=5&refcode=em230408-1-7&refcode2=1260_4767699_blItF3&akid=1260%2E4767699%2EblItF3)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We don’t have Wall Street funding
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Unlike the DCCC, we will never scare you in an attempt to get you to make
a donation. The sky isn’t falling and there is no reason to kiss all hope
goodbye.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132949?refcode=em20230408-28379&t=1001&akid=28379%2E1203867%2EUbllXS ]Instead, we will politely ask that you contribute $3
right now to support our work to transform Congress into a body that
fights for the working class, communities of color and all marginalized
people. Can you make a contribution today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132949?refcode=em20230408-28379&t=1020&akid=28379%2E1203867%2EUbllXS ]Contribute $3

We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs. And we don’t employ firms
associated with union busting, Big Pharma, or the GOP. Meanwhile,
corporate Democrats take money from Wall Street, Big Oil, Big Pharma,
payday loan companies, and union-busters. AND the Democratic Party has
routinely hired firms that protect the interests of banks, pharmaceutical
companies, and fossil fuel executives.

It’s clear: Justice Democrats will fight for the people, the Democratic
establishment will work for their corporate donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132949?refcode=em20230408-28379&t=1021&akid=28379%2E1203867%2EUbllXS ]Will you donate today to help us find the next slate of progressive
challenger candidates and then win our primaries against the Democratic
establishment and its Wall Street-backed candidates? Together, we can
overcome the odds and grow the Squad in Congress.

Thank you for all that you do to support our work and our primary
candidates.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
