name: Team Tina
subject: Protecting access to abortion here in Oregon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Abortion access is on the line — which is why Tina has teamed up with 20 governors around the country. |
#
---
Peter, Tina recently joined 20 other governors to form the Reproductive Freedom Alliance — a historic, nonpartisan coalition committed to protecting and expanding reproductive freedom across the nation. In the months since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , our country has seen an unprecedented attack on abortion rights from conservative judges, legislatures, and activist groups. Oregonians have fought hard to have some of the strongest protections for reproductive rights in the country — but we now know that even the rights we consider most fundamental are always at risk. The governors who make up this alliance represent over 170 million Americans collectively who can breathe easier knowing **their elected officials have their back. ** A federal judge in Texas just ruled in favor of removing FDA approval from mifepristone, one step of the two-pill medication abortion method — **the most common form of abortion in the United States. ** Tina believes this is a shameful, dangerous ruling that will prevent patients nationwide from accessing safe and effective medication. The Governor wants Oregonians to know that **abortion is still accessible and legal in our state.** Tina believes in reproductive freedom and will continue to be a fierce advocate for that right. Her administration will work with the Oregon Health Authority, the Oregon Department of Justice, and the Biden Administration to evaluate the ruling and fight for patients across Oregon and the United States. But the consequences of this ruling could be far-reaching. This ruling shows just how important it is for governors around the country to work together in the effort to protect abortion. Everything is on the line, and we can accomplish more when we fight together. [_**Can you add your name to stand with Tina against this dangerous ruling and show your support for reproductive freedom in Oregon and across our country?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61493361/400266678/-1999826374?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20230408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2YyNGIyZS0yNmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-NaWw-tapig8MPChazJO-DlrcgCqbR61DrSlJU_2jU=&emci=f3564b1b-a4d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a7f24b2e-26d6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61493362/400266679/-1999826374?contactdata=1jPqFD0DAS7K98PV1UfV7nyBgXv+4rrQhWVTxws8ipIevG+DoGhA+FdN4LisANi7dwBPepeuaPVY+V6GupmgU9YrwOsvfMu82KUI03RRcByBvV3M4+hhK4mt/8U2/2RfkihSUSl/Yk5k6oY44WgFq1QJmm8lQNohml6mAsfKuVI=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20230408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2YyNGIyZS0yNmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-NaWw-tapig8MPChazJO-DlrcgCqbR61DrSlJU_2jU=&emci=f3564b1b-a4d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a7f24b2e-26d6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: sorry to miss you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I reached out yesterday because we needed 32 folks to chip in to help get our fundraising on track.
| | |
---
Hello,

I reached out yesterday because we needed 32 folks to chip in $3 or so to help get our fundraising on track.

In the last few weeks of our 2022 campaign, polls got really tight, and pundits doubted whether we’d win. Taking on the debt was the right thing to do, but we’re still paying down the bills we owe. The bad news is, fundraising has really slowed down. THAT is why I was hoping you’d be on the list of donors yesterday.

In the last few weeks of our 2022 campaign, polls got really tight, and pundits doubted whether we’d win. Taking on the debt was the right thing to do, but we’re still paying down the bills we owe. The bad news is, fundraising has really slowed down. subject: Happy Easter From The State Freedom Caucus Network
body:
It was another successful week for State Freedom Caucuses.
| |
---|---|---
| | | [Open in app](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/happy-easter-from-the-state-freedom?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store) or [online](https://substack..IJG9nWt4PQITJcPFrR_e_n6mZvwgx89eayFcWYVWkMM?)

# [Happy Easter From The State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=113345558&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTEzMzQ1NTU4LCJpYXQiOjE2ODA5Njk4NzYsImV4cCI6MTY4MzU2MTg3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fjwVZKxzugtzPsD8Vd5vo1uoN_w9Um4YwwJgxB8_3qU)
### It was another successful week for State Freedom Caucuses.
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/1f8e86fb-5fe7-42bd-b759-e4d36ed255d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Apr 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1f8e86fb-5fe7-42bd-b759-e4d36ed255d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
|
| | [Save](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=113345558&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&action=save&triggerSave=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTEzMzQ1NTU4LCJpYXQiOjE2ODA5Njk4NzYsImV4cCI6MTY4MzU2MTg3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJzYXZlLXBvc3QifQ.ECm81_GttqpPIpWx1MYuZxonEPELEEXV-jjdt82FdAc)
---
| | [▷ Listen](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/happy-easter-from-the-state-freedom?utm_source=email-ufi&play_audio=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTEzMzQ1NTU4LCJpYXQiOjE2ODA5Njk4NzYsImV4cCI6MTY4MzU2MTg3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fjwVZKxzugtzPsD8Vd5vo1uoN_w9Um4YwwJgxB8_3qU)
---
Friends,
We hope you are having a very blessed Holy Week with your families. As we mentioned in our email on Wednesday, we were proud to launch our 11th Freedom Caucus this week in Louisiana. Our network is growing every single day and we are taking the fight to swampy state capitols all over America.
Our work is also starting to get noticed more by big name players in conservative media. After announcing the launch of the LAFC, myself and our communications director, Greg Price, made an appearance on War Room with Steve Bannon to talk about our plans to bring Freedom Caucuses everywhere.
[Watch the full segment.](https://substack.com/redirect/771bc1c6-ae9e-4d16-9837-90d193284ea5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Grace Chong 🇺🇸 @gc22gc.@andyroth: "There's no 365 day out of the year conservative apparatus operating to keep Govt small. We're going to take part time lawmakers & turn them into a full time Freedom Caucus that constantly fights the establishment." Bannon: "This has been needed for a long time..." ](https://substack.com/redirect/95dec4d1-d78e-49c0-a095-d9dc5e0ad933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[1:18 AM ∙ Apr 6, 2023
* * *
54Likes27Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/95dec4d1-d78e-49c0-a095-d9dc5e0ad933?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**South Carolina:**
If you ever needed a better contrast between establishment Republicans vs. the Freedom Caucus, look no further than dueling events that occurred in South Carolina this past week. The SCFC held a forum with former Senator and conservative heavyweight Jim DeMint in Greenville.
The event drew a standing room only crowd of over 400 people.
[South Carolina Freedom Caucus @SCFreedomCaucusFreedom is on the move! Last night we had standing room only at our Upstate Freedom Caucus Forum with conservative champions @JimDeMint @andyroth @RepAdamMorgan @TaraServatius and @CharlieOnAir We're only getting started 💪 ](https://substack.com/redirect/83ee2953-b4f0-4f58-b24a-e6f488cf2c06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[5:57 PM ∙ Apr 4, 2023
* * *
68Likes10Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/83ee2953-b4f0-4f58-b24a-e6f488cf2c06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Meanwhile, Republican leadership on the same night was having an event of their own with former Florida governor and failed presidential candidate Jeb Bush. It [featured](https://substack.com/redirect/36b303a6-5329-4880-a0e0-568f388c760c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the SC House GOP leaders giving him a standing ovation.
To that we say, "Choose your fighters, South Carolina."
**Wyoming:**
Remember last week how we [mentioned](https://substack.com/redirect/8d7f961b-1735-4c37-9186-4929de052b31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the tweet posted by Arizona Gov. Katie Hobbs' now former press secretary in which she called for shooting people who oppose the Democratic Party's disgusting support of child sex changes? Well, we had another call for violence from a prominent Democrat this week in Wyoming.
Democrat WY House Rep. and Minority Leader Karlee Provenza sent out this disgusting post on her Facebook page in which "Auntie Fa" says to "protect trans folks against fascists & bigots" along with a picture of a woman pointing a rifle.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/954e4222-d81c-4228-9981-ba1aeb8c68ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This led to immediate [condemnations](https://substack.com/redirect/4d3f3c6c-f881-4e80-be60-3a314cb2a495?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the WYFC and [calls](https://substack.com/redirect/19e59b49-2dbe-46e9-b944-f0ffc8cd52f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to strip Provenza of her committee positions. Even in Wyoming, Democrats are calling for violence against people who disagree with their agenda of sexualizing kids.
**Montana:**
MTFC member Rep. Jed Hinkle introduced a very exciting bill in the Montana legislature this week. HB 450 is being called the "Fight Back" bill and would provide legal protections for children being bullied in schools to use reasonable force to fight back against their attackers.
Rep. Hinkle spoke to [Fox News](https://substack.com/redirect/f932cb12-2c41-40a9-8de2-61861768be10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the bill and the Helena resident, whose 16-year-old son had been relentlessly bullied since 3rd grade, who inspired it.
"It's an inherent right that we all have to defend ourselves. And that should not be stripped away just because a student is in school versus outside of the school," Hinkle said.
**Illinois:**
Illinois may be a deep blue state but that doesn't stop the ILFC from fighting for accountable government in Springfield. This week, the caucus filed an ethics complaint after they discovered several Democratic members of the legislature were voting on bills while **being completely absent** from the Capitol.
"We need a more ethical, transparent and accountable government, which is why we are exploring an ethics complaint with the Legislative Inspector General. The abuse of power must come to an end," their statement on the complaint read.
[Illinois Freedom Caucus 🇺🇸 @ILFreedomCaucusWe will not allow the House Majority to violate public trust without consequence! #twill ](https://substack.com/redirect/4d43c8fd-522c-4249-9044-54d8bec33931?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[3:58 PM ∙ Apr 4, 2023
* * *
4Likes1Retweet](https://substack.com/redirect/4d43c8fd-522c-4249-9044-54d8bec33931?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Pennsylvania:**
The Greater Johnstown Area School District in PA was exposed this week in a bombshell [report](https://substack.com/redirect/2255427d-72e6-4d6b-91b4-2511d1a0a243?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the district enacted a new policy in which parents would deliberately be kept in the dark about their children declaring themselves to be a "gender" other than the one assigned at birth.
Liberal school districts have now made it a policy to confuse children about their gender and declare that they know what's best for them rather than their parents.
The PAFC will not stand for this and immediately [took action](https://substack.com/redirect/2760e035-54c9-4c27-a965-1fb3a4fd768f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to condemn the actions of the Johnstown School District with Chairwoman Rep. Dawn Keefer saying "we need to shine a light on this so parents understand what's coming."
**Happy Easter and Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/33bd40bb-4b0a-4990-8719-4429729a109c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/33312ecb-8ebb-4114-b7a8-b941c9d52d95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
State Freedom Caucus Network is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell State Freedom Caucus Network that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments.
[Pledge your support](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0IiwicCI6MTEzMzQ1NTU4LCJzIjoxNDI0NjAyLCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNjgwOTY5ODc2LCJleHAiOjE2ODM1NjE4NzYsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.YDqlzJv0eLnz2Lx2OgQEKTGQ31lA0F3C_Plr2U3W3LI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
---
|
Read State Freedom Caucus Network in the app
Listen to posts, join subscriber chats, and never miss an update from Andy Roth.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b3f0b2bc-9888-4e05-a130-f2bf2ef1e204?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack.com/redirect/333fb122-affc-4077-8d10-e849edcb1353?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

300 Independence Ave SE, Washington, DC 20003

name: Team Ilhan
subject: It's not great
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=58%2E791427%2EKrCEaa)
We know it's the weekend, but there are two quick things we want to share with you this morning:
✅ **GOOD NEWS:** Thanks to the incredible grassroots support of people like you, we were able to hit our goals for both contributions and dollars raised last quarter. We're still finalizing the numbers, but we do know that once we file our FEC report, our right-wing opponents aren't going to like what they see.
❌ **BAD NEWS:** The clock doesn't stop ticking, and April is already well-underway. Right now we're pacing behind on fundraising, and our average donation has plummeted to about $11/each this week. That's almost $6 a contribution lower than what we normally plan for.
We know it doesn't seem like a huge difference, but over the course of a month, a quarter, or an entire campaign... it adds up to a lot. _Especially_ when you run a campaign like we do, relying almost entirely on small-dollar, grassroots donations to keep us going.
Long story short — it's not great. But it's not the end of the world. Especially when we have a movement like ours behind us that knows how to step up when it matters most.
We still have time to get back on track for April, so we're asking:
**[If you can, can you make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with Ilhan and our people-powered campaign today?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230408-1-t2&t=2&akid=58%2E791427%2EKrCEaa)**

Team Ilhan

name: Team Fetterman
subject: John’s record on reproductive freedoms »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Don’t mess with abortion access
#
Hey, Team Fetterman here, Derek.
This week, voters in Wisconsin gave us a BRAND NEW majority on the state Supreme Court — and protected abortion rights in their state in the process.
Wisconsin voters let Republicans know: **don’t mess with abortion access.**
Now it’s more important than ever to keep up the fight to protect abortion nationwide, too.
John has *always* fought for reproductive freedom as a sacred right, and said that abortion is a choice between women + their doctors — NOT politicians.
**[Chip in today to power John’s fight to protect abortion rights for EVERYONE.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230408-1?refcode=em20230408-1-8325&refcode2=8325_434096_xxx75P&akid=8325%2E434096%2Exxx75P)**

body:

I just got word that the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee has already begun attacking Rep. Derrick Van Orden in the press and online. **If the attacks have started already, you can be sure the money will follow. **

Speaker Kevin McCarthy

I can't believe how fast I became public enemy #1 of the Radical Democrats.

Joe Biden's Treasury Department is **STONEWALLING** our oversight investigations... Hunter Biden **LAWYERED UP** when I mentioned the word "subpoena"... name: Lateefah for Congress
subject: To Do List: Build Team Lateefah
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Let's grow the Lateefah for Congress team.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=11%2E1163%2Ea0T8fA)
It's been just over a month since we launched this historic campaign to get Lateefah to Washington – and we aren't taking a single vote for granted.
That means that we have to grow the Lateefah for Congress team. Hiring a Campaign Manager, Political Director, community organizers and others is a critical step towards building a campaign that will get out the vote in every community _and towards winning._
**[We rely on grassroots investors to power our campaign, so we're coming to you to ask: Can you make a contribution today in order to ensure we can maintain Team Lateefah's momentum?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230408-1&refcode=em20230408-1?refcode2=11_1163_a0T8fA&akid=11%2E1163%2Ea0T8fA)**
Grassroots contributions really matter, and they add up. They're how we're going to be able to do everything on our to-do list:
📣 Hire the best organizers and campaign staff to drive this movement
📝 Buy supplies and print materials so everyone can hear about Lateefah's campaign
📺 Run ads online + on the airwaves
📅 Host gatherings in our community so folks can hear from Lateefah
🚪Get out in our community and start knocking on doors in every neighborhood in our District
🗳️ Get out the vote and win!
Your support will be key to accomplishing all of this. **[Will you make a contribution today? Every dollar makes a difference when it comes to building our movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230408-1&refcode=em20230408-1?refcode2=11_1163_a0T8fA&akid=11%2E1163%2Ea0T8fA)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230408-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230408-1&refcode2=11_1163_a0T8fA&akid=11%2E1163%2Ea0T8fA)**
You'll be hearing a lot more from us soon -- thanks for all that you do!
Together,
Team Lateefah for Congress

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=11%2E1163%2Ea0T8fA)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=11%2E1163%2Ea0T8fA)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)

name: Lizzie Boyle, Team Schrier
subject: There is only one week left to apply to be a 2023 Democracy Summer Scholar, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
📅 Apply to be a Team Schrier Scholar by April 14th! There is only **one week** left to apply to be a 2023 Democracy Summer Scholar, Peter!

Democracy Summer has been the heart and soul of Congressman Jamie Raskin’s campaigns since he first entered politics. Now, Team Schrier is thrilled to be a part of this program’s expansion as one of nearly 60 partner campaigns throughout the country.

Scholars will participate in state-of-the-art educational sessions with extraordinary seminars hosted by top scholars, organizers, and leaders from across the country!

**So if you or someone you know is ready to embark on a summer of political organizing and learning and making new lifelong friends along the way,[click the link below to apply by the April 14th deadline!](https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=xxxxx&typeform-source=www.google.com?ms=em23_230408_demsum_enask_gq_act___LBTS_ettx&refcode=em23_230408_demsum_enask_gq_act___LBTS_ettx&source=em23_230408_demsum_enask_gq_act___LBTS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230408_demsum_enask_gq_act___LBTS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=o0ozinXdx6/i5mG5xd4rpl0HyJB2x589ZNbNQC8Y4AYUi1mC43YbBeonhSXTVkQVqjUbZ/3EjuWz2CHAjqIoHN+H21AAr9r/vD0pi/vx+t0EritLbDYHEpVpUmQxlOxRVjwg/CCHdI99t80CiXMeI+VVV8lbu4e9hbeSfN/Ddio=&refcode2=52b5b5ca-2ed6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dr. Kim Schrier <info@drkimschrier.com>
Date: Mon, Apr 3, 2023
Subject: 2023 National Democracy Summer School Dear team:

I am proud to announce that my campaign will once again be participating as a partner in the 2023 National Democracy Summer School! This one-of-a-kind Democratic program was founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in an historic partnership with the DCCC. Democracy Summer School is dedicated to training and educating the next generation of political activists and visionary leaders.

**As part of this initiative, I will be nominating dedicated high school and college students to join me as Team Schrier Scholars!** As a fellow, you will be trained as organizers and activists with my re-election campaign in Washington's 8th District, and will also have access to an online curriculum.

This virtual six-week program will take place from Monday, June 26, 2023 - Monday, August 7, 2023 and requires a commitment of about 4 hours per week. We’ll host live educational sessions with political leaders and facilitate in-depth discussions and activities over Zoom.

Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, the late Rep. John Lewis, and other distinguished speakers and experts in their field.

In 2018, grassroots activism helped us flip Washington's 8th District blue for the first time ever, and it helped us keep it blue in 2020 and 2022. As organizers and volunteer activists with our campaign, you'll host at least one voter registration or voter education event in collaboration with other participants. You'll also have the opportunity to attend a meeting with me and my entire campaign staff!

[**If you would like more information or are looking to apply to be a Democracy Summer fellow, click here.**](https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=xxxxx&typeform-source=www.google.com?ms=em23_230408_demsum_enask_gq_act___LBTS_ettx&refcode=em23_230408_demsum_enask_gq_act___LBTS_ettx&source=em23_230408_demsum_enask_gq_act___LBTS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230408_demsum_enask_gq_act___LBTS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=o0ozinXdx6/i5mG5xd4rpl0HyJB2x589ZNbNQC8Y4AYUi1mC43YbBeonhSXTVkQVqjUbZ/3EjuWz2CHAjqIoHN+H21AAr9r/vD0pi/vx+t0EritLbDYHEpVpUmQxlOxRVjwg/CCHdI99t80CiXMeI+VVV8lbu4e9hbeSfN/Ddio=&refcode2=52b5b5ca-2ed6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73) The deadline to apply is Friday, April 14th. Please forward this email to any students you know who might be interested in this opportunity!

Not a student but still want to support the next generation of political leaders? [**Donate to our campaign to support our participation in the Democracy Summer program.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61496208/400277479/-1888718630?refcode=em23_230407_demsum_enask_gq_act_2_LBTS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230407_demsum_enask_gq_act_2_LBTS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=52b5b5ca-2ed6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmI1YjVjYS0yZWQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ac54KofMOUXsEsthCvOx6hyKMxBq75oZN9CC0qK9bXQ=)

Thank you for your support,

Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61496209/400277483/-1888718630?refcode=em23_230407_demsum_enask_gq_act_2_LBTS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230407_demsum_enask_gq_act_2_LBTS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=52b5b5ca-2ed6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmI1YjVjYS0yZWQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ac54KofMOUXsEsthCvOx6hyKMxBq75oZN9CC0qK9bXQ=)

clean_body: 📅 Apply to be a Team Schrier Scholar by April 14th! There is only one week left to apply to be a 2023 Democracy Summer Scholar, Peter! Democracy Summer has been the heart and soul of Congressman Jamie Raskin’s campaigns since he first entered politics. Now, Team Schrier is thrilled to be a part of this program’s expansion as one of nearly 60 partner campaigns throughout the country. Scholars will participate in state-of-the-art educational sessions with extraordinary seminars hosted by top scholars, organizers, and leaders from across the country! So if you or someone you know is ready to embark on a summer of political organizing and learning and making new lifelong friends along the way, \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Dr. Kim Schrier <info@drkimschrier.com> Date: Mon, Apr 3, 2023 Subject: 2023 National Democracy Summer School Dear team: I am proud to announce that my campaign will once again be participating as a partner in the 2023 National Democracy Summer School! This one-of-a-kind Democratic program was founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in an historic partnership with the DCCC. Democracy Summer School is dedicated to training and educating the next generation of political activists and visionary leaders. As part of this initiative, I will be nominating dedicated high school and college students to join me as Team Schrier Scholars! As a fellow, you will be trained as organizers and activists with my re-election campaign in Washington's 8th District, and will also have access to an online curriculum. This virtual six-week program will take place from Monday, June 26, 2023 - Monday, August 7, 2023 and requires a commitment of about 4 hours per week. We’ll host live educational sessions with political leaders and facilitate in-depth discussions and activities over Zoom. Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, the late Rep. John Lewis, and other distinguished speakers and experts in their field. In 2018, grassroots activism helped us flip Washington's 8th District blue for the first time ever, and it helped us keep it blue in 2020 and 2022. As organizers and volunteer activists with our campaign, you'll host at least one voter registration or voter education event in collaboration with other participants. You'll also have the opportunity to attend a meeting with me and my entire campaign staff! The deadline to apply is Friday, April 14th. Please forward this email to any students you know who might be interested in this opportunity! Not a student but still want to support the next generation of political leaders? = Thank you for your support, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

Here are the three most important things to know right now:
1. OH-01 has already been deemed a __pure toss up race__ by multiple non-partisan election forecasters.

2. Extremist Washington Republicans have already named Greg as one of their key targets for the 2024 cycle. We know they’ll stop at nothing to impose their radical far-right agenda here at home.

3. Our campaign doesn’t take any corporate PAC money, meaning **our entire campaign operation is fueled by folks like you** chipping in what you can, when you can.

name: Liz
subject: I’m so proud.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Help All On The Line continue fighting to strengthen our democracy.
|
---

Team -- we did it!
**Judge Janet Protasiewicz won a seat on Wisconsin’s Supreme Court!** I am proud to share news about All On The Line’s grassroots work in Wisconsin over the past month. We mobilized volunteers to send over 241,000 texts for voter turnout during a crucial election for the future of our democracy.
[**The stakes were high.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61508312/400300981/1036066395?refcode=20230408_AOTL_F_WIWin_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5MGExYjUyLTUwZDYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2a7OqASYKMhoUtiIzCOKaN1wj7RZNdNTD_syuKX9WLw=) _The New York Times_ warned the election could determine the fate of abortion rights, gerrymandered maps, and influence the state's 2024 presidential election -- but the people of Wisconsin were determined to not be silenced and proved that organizing and staying engaged is the key to creating meaningful change.
Our ability to reach thousands of voters couldn't have been possible without supporters like you. name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: This is a critical victory for our democracy, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
When people are able to participate in the democratic process, they have the power to deliver real change.
|
---

Team, earlier this week Wisconsin held the most important election of 2023. Voters were given a choice between fairness or extremism – between the protection of reproductive rights and voting rights or the destruction of both.

**Our fellow citizens made their voices heard loud and clear by electing Judge Janet Protasiewicz. This is a critical victory for our democracy – and I couldn’t be more proud that our grassroots movement helped make it happen.** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61499852/400282295/394769393?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230408_FR_4P_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmMDc2MGUxLTMwZDYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zQXcI1dbk4GjY5K8gQnVFanJZZuV0v6AxDscofZt5UY=)
---
[Donate to the NDRC’s nationwide democracy saving work](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61499853/400282296/394769393?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230408_FR_4P_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmMDc2MGUxLTMwZDYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zQXcI1dbk4GjY5K8gQnVFanJZZuV0v6AxDscofZt5UY=)
---
For more than a decade, Wisconsin Republicans put in place multiple structural barriers to fair representation – including a gerrymandered legislature, voter suppression laws, and a conservative court majority that was wildly out of step with the public. But we never gave up on democracy in Wisconsin. Instead, we went to work to mobilize communities to elect Democracy Defenders, protect voting rights, advocate for fair redistricting, and more.

**Our efforts have paid off. Together, we proved once again that there is no fight we cannot win when voters are engaged.**

That’s how our grassroots movement helped bring Wisconsin closer to equal representation this week, and it’s how we’ll continue to win in the ongoing fight to protect democracy all across the country.

[**_Victories like this would not be possible without grassroots supporters like you, team. Will you pitch in today to help the NDRC continue fighting for a stronger democracy all across the country?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61499854/400282297/394769393?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230408_FR_4P_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmMDc2MGUxLTMwZDYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zQXcI1dbk4GjY5K8gQnVFanJZZuV0v6AxDscofZt5UY=)

Thank you for being part of this movement. We go on from here.

Eric H. Holder, Jr.
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61499855/400282298/394769393?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230408_FR_4P_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmMDc2MGUxLTMwZDYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zQXcI1dbk4GjY5K8gQnVFanJZZuV0v6AxDscofZt5UY=)

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18927?t=1001&akid=3129%2E346206%2ERHLVeJ ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230408-3129-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3129_346206_RHLVeJ&akid=3129%2E346206%2ERHLVeJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3129%2E346206%2ERHLVeJ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: “8 secret court battles”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J

What is happening to our country?

Friend,
First off, if you’re doing poorly right now, you can just ignore this request.
Take care of yourself and your family – _especially this Easter weekend!_
Some things always come _FIRST._
But if you can chip in, I have to call your attention to the fact that my arrest was only the tip of the iceberg...
**_As Trump-hating CNN has reported:_**
**“Special counsel is locked in at least 8 secret court battles in Trump investigations”**
_**We are living through a dark time in our country when “secret court battles” can decide the fate of America’s elections.**_
The Left will continue to throw witch hunt after witch hunt at us to try and break our movement.
**But with your support, we will prevail in 2024 and SAVE America before it becomes a Marxist Third World country that criminalizes dissent and imprisons its opposition.**

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester HQ
subject: BREAKING: Abortion Access Gutted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apr2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230408_m_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apr2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230408_m_logo] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apri?refcode=EM_FR_20230408_m_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apri?refcode=EM_FR_20230408_m_logo]Team —
All of us on Team Lisa are livid.
Last night, as folks were signing off for the weekend, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas ruled to overturn FDA approval of a common and safe pill used for medication abortions and to treat miscarriages.
Let us reiterate this: Mifepristone is safe and effective. In fact, it’s the most common form of abortion in our country and has been in use for over two decades.
Look, it’s clear that extreme Republicans are doing everything possible to strip women of their bodily autonomy. This is a five-alarm fire. Please rush an emergency donation — $10 or as much as you can — to elect Democrats like Lisa who will always stand up for abortion rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apr2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230408_m]
With McConnell threatening a nationwide abortion ban and Roe overturned last summer, the writing is on the wall. If we give even a millimeter of ground to Republicans on the issue of reproductive rights, they’ll fully gut lifesaving reproductive care once and for all.
We’ve set an emergency rapid response goal of 50 donations TODAY to protect abortion rights. Your gift will be put to work immediately to elect Democrats like Lisa who will never back down in the fight to restore abortion access. We need you to chip in as much as you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apr2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230408_m]
We won’t sugarcoat it. This fight won’t be easy. In fact, it’ll be really hard. But it’s critical, and we need to be in this together.
Team Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apr2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230408_m_bio&refcode2=biobox&recurring=1]

name: Katie Porter
subject: Cutting the BS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
A donation is an investment in our future.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=20822%2E3422442%2EKv0WmM)
Derek, when you donate to our campaign, it's like making an investment in our country. Here's why I think it's a smart one:
* Recent statewide polls have us just two points behind the frontrunner, but they show us leading by nine points in the area I currently represent in Congress. This shows that when I'm able to introduce myself to voters, we gain a clear advantage. Your donations help us do that.
* There are only 25 women serving in the U.S. Senate, and with two women retiring at the end of their terms, your support will help women keep a seat at the table and send the first single-mom of school aged kids to the Senate.
* My top priorities in the Senate will be standing up to special interests and corruption, taking bold action to address climate change, and lowering the cost of housing—these are the battles of tomorrow and I'm ready to get to work.

I don't take a cent from federal lobbyists or corporate PACs, so I truly count on your support to run our campaign. [**Can you join our team today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230408-1?refcode=%7B%7Bhtml_custom_fields.refcode|urlencode}&refcode2=20822_3422442_Kv0WmM&akid=20822%2E3422442%2EKv0WmM)

name: Team Cori
subject: Tell President Biden: Don’t reinstate family detention (add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We’re sounding the alarm.
#
Peter, we’re sounding the alarm:
According to a recent report by the New York Times, the Biden administration is “ _considering reviving the practice of detaining migrant families.”_
[__](https://act.coribush.org/go/1130?t=1&akid=2481%2E1082990%2Eb-c5sJ)
President Biden ran on ending Trump’s xenophobic, white nationalist immigration policies. Our communities didn’t organize and turn out in record numbers for Biden for him to reverse course.
It would be a huge betrayal to us all for his administration to backtrack and reinstate the horrifying, traumatic, and unjust policy of imprisoning migrant parents with their children — including babies.
**Families don’t belong in detention centers, Peter.**
[**If you agree, will you add your name to tell President Biden: Don’t Reinstate Family Detention? We need as many signatures as possible to share with the Biden Administration.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/1130?t=2&akid=2481%2E1082990%2Eb-c5sJ)
**[Add your name](https://act.coribush.org/go/1130?t=3&akid=2481%2E1082990%2Eb-c5sJ)**
Thank you for taking action today, Peter. Together, we’ll continue the work to create a just immigration system rooted in dignity and humanity.
In solidarity,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230408?refcode=em20230408-2481-footer&t=4&refcode2=2481_1082990_b-c5sJ&akid=2481%2E1082990%2Eb-c5sJ) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

clean_body: If we let this call go unanswered, we might face a fate similar to 2016. | = | Peter, I’m sure you’ve seen the headlines. This week, Donald Trump became the FIRST former president in American history to be arrested and face criminal charges. But Trump has used his arrest to incite violence and amass millions of dollars in fundraising for his 2024 electoral campaign. If we let this call go unanswered, we might face a fate similar to 2016. Peter, the last thing we need is another term by an NRA-backed MAGA Republican. Stop Gun Violence PAC is committed to electing gun violence prevention champions at all levels of government. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans are trying to cheat Jon Tester out of the Senate. They’ll stop at nothing. Don’t let them win.
body:
They’ll stop at nothing
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted67251c-344e-46a0-a55e-9834194b874b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **One of the things that's so exhausting about Republican lawmakers is they'll cheat any chance they get. Often, they don't even try to hide it. ** **Take Democratic Senator John Tester. _Though he represents a red state, he's stood with Democrats on every major vote. He's from a farming family, fits Montana perfectly. So, unable to defeat him three times now, Republicans are cheating._** _From a Montana Public Radio story on a state-senate bill:_ **_Smaller parties often win some of the anti-incumbent vote, splitting it up._ **_**So the state senate passed a bill creating a top-two primary regardless of party.** _**_Yet, they only applied this change to one person--John Tester. They specifically targeted the only Democrat elected statewide. _****_In other words: Cheating._** **_We can't let them get away with this or we'll lose a great Senator and control of the U.S. Senate. Will you join us in donating to John Tester right now to ensure he runs and wins no matter how much Republicans try to cheat their way to victory?_** _Thank you for not letting them cheat their way to victory._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Team Swalwell
subject: BREAKING: Abortion Pill Banned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Without Roe v. Wade, these partisan attacks on abortion care will only continue. We must pass federal abortion protections to ensure equal access for all Americans, and we can only do that if we take back the House next year. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61506417/400288943/-246429796?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDc5Y2U4Ni0zYWQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oz5v0nAeXHvxHH-r5eQmvr19TSbRQnkst9J7dhFh3HY=)
**Team: Abortion access in every state just got more difficult. A Trump-appointed judge in Texas just ruled to halt the distribution of the abortion pill mifepristone.** Mifepristone is used in medical abortions and is a safe, effective way to end a pregnancy. This decision has sweeping national impacts, completely cutting off abortion access in states where in-clinic abortions are banned and increasing wait times in abortion sanctuary states. **Folks, we will not stand for this attack on reproductive rights.[Can you rush a contribution so we can continue fighting for our fundamental freedoms?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61506418/400288944/-1813554275?refcode=E20871-20230408-TXPillRuling-SL-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDc5Y2U4Ni0zYWQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oz5v0nAeXHvxHH-r5eQmvr19TSbRQnkst9J7dhFh3HY=)** | [PROTECT ABORTION ACCESS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61506419/400288945/-1813554275?refcode=E20871-20230408-TXPillRuling-SB-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDc5Y2U4Ni0zYWQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oz5v0nAeXHvxHH-r5eQmvr19TSbRQnkst9J7dhFh3HY=)

body:
When you chip in, you’re showing support for our shared values. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61506879/400291227/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWM4YmI4YS0zZmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTh5MkA6CSXm3T1H3Ilwq0tikCgcWzPZa98csCst2Ho=&emci=59d0a93c-83d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=65c8bb8a-3fd6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

Today could be the start of something pretty extraordinary. It could be the day you make your first contribution to my campaign. I hope you’ll let me take a few moments to explain why your support matters so much: **When you chip in, you’re showing support for our shared values.** This campaign is rooted in New Mexico, the needs of workers and families, and the health of our planet. Your grassroots donation represents a future where clean energy helps power our homes and economy, every worker earns a fair wage, and our children and grandchildren enjoy the air, land, and water we helped preserve. Any amount you can give today will also help our campaign as we prepare to defend my seat in New Mexico and our Democratic Senate Majority. Each month, we set a budget so we have the resources to run a successful campaign, including the ability to hire staff, support volunteers, and get our message out to voters. **[So, if you’re able, can you make your first donation to my campaign to fuel our work to keep New Mexico values in the Senate and defend our majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61506880/400291228/1960715033?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWM4YmI4YS0zZmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTh5MkA6CSXm3T1H3Ilwq0tikCgcWzPZa98csCst2Ho=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61506881/400291229/1960715033?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWM4YmI4YS0zZmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTh5MkA6CSXm3T1H3Ilwq0tikCgcWzPZa98csCst2Ho=)

clean_body: When you chip in, you’re showing support for our shared values. Today could be the start of something pretty extraordinary. It could be the day you make your first contribution to my campaign. I hope you’ll let me take a few moments to explain why your support matters so much: When you chip in, you’re showing support for our shared values. This campaign is rooted in New Mexico, the needs of workers and families, and the health of our planet. Your grassroots donation represents a future where clean energy helps power our homes and economy, every worker earns a fair wage, and our children and grandchildren enjoy the air, land, and water we helped preserve. Any amount you can give today will also help our campaign as we prepare to defend my seat in New Mexico and our Democratic Senate Majority. Peter, Election Day may seem far off, but that doesn't mean we can spend these next few months sitting idly and twiddling our thumbs._**Republicans are certainly not.**_
Instead, far-right extremists are using these calmer months to ensure that _as many_ voter suppression laws as possible are in place by 2024. **And their efforts have not gone in vain: During last year's midterm elections, voter suppression laws blocked more than 4.6 million people from voting. **
Peter, this is only the beginning. Republicans know they can't win in 2024 unless they suppress the will of the people, and that's _exactly_ what they're trying to do.
We must fight back against these voter suppression attempts – and to do that as effectively as possible, we need to know how top Democrats like _you_ prefer to vote.
So please, we need 291 more responses before midnight to ensure statistically significant results.
**According to our records, we still do not know your voting preferences. That's why we're reaching out to you today with this URGENT request, Peter.**

name: Andy Kim
subject: What you need to know about the mifepristone ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61507374/400293260/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzk1MDgxMi00MmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M12N_O7VlHwnUh_pFBgTyglx_fWLauy1s8x5xD-2dZ0=&emci=ea05d53a-9cd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=fc950812-42d6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **On Friday night, an extremist federal judge issued a ruling overturning FDA approval of the abortion medication mifepristone.** This decision could affect the availability of this important medication in all 50 states. The judge also issued a stay, which holds the ruling for seven days to allow for appeals. By late Friday, the Biden administration had already filed an appeal, so the fight has already begun. Just an hour later, another federal judge issued a ruling in a different case that would preserve the status quo and keep mifepristone available in several states. Faced with these two contradictory rulings, we are engaged in yet another court battle over reproductive rights, one that will very likely end up at the Supreme Court. You'll see many headlines about this, and I want to make sure you know the facts. **At the moment, mifepristone is still available.** Mifepristone has been FDA-approved for more than 20 years. It is proven to be safe and effective. In fact, more than half of all abortions in the United States are medication abortions rather than surgical procedures. Mifepristone has been FDA-approved for more than 20 years. It is proven to be safe and effective. In fact, more than half of all abortions in the United States are medication abortions rather than surgical procedures. The same anti-choice group that helped overturn _Roe_ made baseless claims about the safety of mifepristone, and this judge heard the case. Today, his decision overturned the approval of the scientists and medical professionals at the FDA. **Abortion is still legal in pro-choice states like New Jersey** , though, if the ban holds, clinics may see longer wait times. Clinics near state borders are already seeing an influx of out-of-state patients, and the mifepristone ban is likely to increase the demand. **Medication abortions are still possible.** The typical medication abortion regimen includes mifepristone, then another medication, misoprostol. However, misoprostol-only abortions are also safe and effective. Many abortion providers have already committed to prescribing them to patients. But again, access will likely be affected by wait times and medication availability. **The fight is not over**. This ruling banning mifepristone is heartbreaking and would affect millions of women in all states, disproportionally women of color. But the truth is: the majority of Americans support increasing access to abortion. It will take time and effort, but I know that together we can win this fight. Please know that I will continue the fight to protect women's rights in Congress. While we knew this ruling was coming, it's still devastating to hear. Yet the fight continues. _Andy_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62536935:JblZsSGNL:m:1:3331421248:03ECB3B25F150CAFF0BE0F67C7D9146A:r)
---
Peter,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62536935:JblZsSGNL:m:1:3331421248:03ECB3B25F150CAFF0BE0F67C7D9146A:r)**

---
Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

name: Fair Fight
subject: This anti-voter group intimidated Georgia voters. Open to learn more →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Voter intimidation isn’t only wrong, it’s illegal. So, we’re taking True the Vote to court. |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61507433/400293738/1049798206?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230408_e_ttv1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI5MTZlMi00NGQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHAlS54hQVLnlmB9zsQeD1kjpm4orJZkwvjaJg7qx3c=&emci=7b16bcd9-44d6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=06b916e2-44d6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) When we see voter suppression in action, _we do something about it. _And that’s why we’re taking True the Vote to court. Our case challenges True the Vote’s targeting of more than 364,000 Georgians with tried and true voter suppression tactics during the 2021 U.S. Senate runoff election. Our allegations focus on True the Vote’s mass challenges to voter registrations, plans to recruit “citizen watchdogs” to surveil voters as they returned their ballots, and publicized millions of dollars in rewards to their supporters to find evidence of “illegal voting.” **But there’s nothing “true” about True the Vote’s conspiracy theories.** We couldn’t just sit back and let this extremist, anti-voter group carry out tactics that threaten to tear down our democracy, so we sprung into action. Voter intimidation isn’t only wrong, it’s illegal. Since filing litigation in December 2020, the Fair Fight team has been working hard to collect the accounts of voters harmed by mass challenge efforts like True the Vote’s tactics during the runoff election. And now, the court has issued an order confirming our case will go to trial — a long-anticipated opportunity to seek justice for voters and prevent anti-voter schemes from undermining future elections. | **We want to know whether we have your support in our fight for the freedom to vote. [_Add your name right away to say you support Fair Fight’s efforts to stop anti-voter extremists >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61507434/400293739/1049798206?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230408_e_ttv1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI5MTZlMi00NGQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHAlS54hQVLnlmB9zsQeD1kjpm4orJZkwvjaJg7qx3c=&emci=7b16bcd9-44d6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=06b916e2-44d6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)** | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61507435/400293740/1049798206?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230408_e_ttv1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI5MTZlMi00NGQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHAlS54hQVLnlmB9zsQeD1kjpm4orJZkwvjaJg7qx3c=&emci=7b16bcd9-44d6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=06b916e2-44d6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
---
Thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
The Fair Fight Team
|

clean_body: Voter intimidation isn’t only wrong, it’s illegal. So, we’re taking True the Vote to court. | | | When we see voter suppression in action, we do something about it. And that’s why we’re taking True the Vote to court. Our case challenges True the Vote’s targeting of more than 364,000 Georgians with tried and true voter suppression tactics during the 2021 U.S. Senate runoff election. Our allegations focus on True the Vote’s mass challenges to voter registrations, plans to recruit “citizen watchdogs” to surveil voters as they returned their ballots, and publicized millions of dollars in rewards to their supporters to find evidence of “illegal voting.” But there’s nothing “true” about True the Vote’s conspiracy theories. We couldn’t just sit back and let this extremist, anti-voter group carry out tactics that threaten to tear down our democracy, so we sprung into action. Voter intimidation isn’t only wrong, it’s illegal. Since filing litigation in December 2020, the Fair Fight team has been working hard to collect the accounts of voters harmed by mass challenge efforts like True the Vote’s tactics during the runoff election. And now, the court has issued an order confirming our case will go to trial — a long-anticipated opportunity to seek justice for voters and prevent anti-voter schemes from undermining future elections. | We want to know whether we have your support in our fight for the freedom to vote. | Thank you for your support. In solidarity, The Fair Fight Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. subject: Congress can – and must – protect reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289PO Box 92320, Pasadena, CA 91109Additional information is available at fec
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brysongillette/q1-thank-you-465489?e=1012843e9c)
---
[](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=2cb8acca90&e=1012843e9c)
This:
This is why we need solution-oriented leaders in Congress.
**For more than 50 years, while working Americans watched a parade of judges undermine our right to safe and legal abortion, Congress could have stepped in at any time and passed a law protecting those rights.**
Instead, too many of our elected officials have treated reproductive rights as just another talking point – an abstract idea to win over voters, rather than _a real issue that affects families’ health and safety every day._
As a result, anti-choice radicals on the Supreme Court were able to wipe out protections for those rights in June. And with his decision to overturn the FDA's approval of mifepristone yesterday, a single extremist judge in Texas has endangered access to medication abortions nationwide.
Now, the whole country’s watching as another judge seeks to stop that ruling from taking effect.
**It’s long past time to resolve the issue in the letter of the law.** That means we need to elect results-focused, pro-choice champions to Congress – folks who will be ready on Day One to pass a bold, unambiguous law protecting everyone’s right to make their own reproductive choices.
In the meantime, **remember that this ruling doesn’t take effect for at least seven days and even if it survives a challenge, other abortion medications are still available.**
But make no mistake: the ruling in Texas will make abortion care harder to access. If you can, [**please donate to Planned Parenthood Los Angeles to make sure others in our community can get the reproductive care they need.**](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=82f1e9c14c&e=1012843e9c)
This fight’s far from over, and our movement’s more fired up than ever. Let’s get to work.
Thank you and onward,
If you’d like to mail a check, please make it payable to:
Nick Melvoin for CongressPO Box 92320, Pasadena, CA 91109
|

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **HER Time Abortion Alert** <[team@her-time.com](mailto:team@her-time.com)>
Date: Sun, Mar 12, 2023
Subject: A new method of restricting abortion
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
Peter, the assault on abortion access across the country never ends.
Idaho is the latest state to try it, with a new method of restriction they’re calling “abortion trafficking” — disgusting.
A new bill that just passed the Idaho state House would make it a felony to help minors obtain abortion care without their parents’ knowledge.
Almost all abortions are already banned in Idaho, but this new bill would make it a crime to even assist a minor over the border to Washington or Oregon to obtain the procedure. Those found guilty could spend up to **five years** in jail.
This new bill means that Idaho children and teens, pregnant through rape or incest, would have no legal way to obtain an abortion without parental consent. They would be **trapped** in Idaho, forced to give birth if their parents say so. They would have absolutely no say over what happens to their own bodies.
It’s sickening to think about, but it’s likely to become reality in just a few weeks if anti-choice Idaho Governor Brad Little signs it into law.
We are working around the clock to protect reproductive freedom all across the country - but we’re fighting many battles in dozens of different states. [_**We need your support in this critical moment, Peter. Can you pitch in today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61507534/400294181/-253429511?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU2NGYzOGEtNDZkNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ooBGELwJFFLTjazgMd5nbRn7uRsCwMoueDs5a_TbmsY=)

#

Peter, **Last night, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas issued a decision that could severely restrict access to mifepristone — a safe, at-home abortion pill.** This decision is disastrous for millions of people who would lack access to one of the only remaining options for abortion care in states where Republicans banned abortion procedures following the Supreme Court’s _Dobbs_ decision overturning _Roe v. Wade._ The implications of this decision could be far worse. In fact, if this decision stands after appeal, it would lead to a ban on mifepristone _nationwide_ , including in states like New York where abortion rights are protected under state law. Given that mifepristone is used by more than 50% of people seeking abortion care nationwide, that would be devastating to so many women who simply want to control their own medical decisions. **This, unfortunately, comes as no surprise.** Anti-choice activists intentionally brought this case to Texas so that it could be decided by this judge, who was nominated by former President Trump in 2017 and who has a notable history of displaying hostility toward abortion rights. Now, he is single-handedly acting to strip away the fundamental rights of millions of women across the country. **[Peter, abortion access is a fundamental right, and my Democratic colleagues and I won’t stop fighting to defend reproductive freedom and ensure that anyone can access the care they need. But to codify abortion rights across the country, we must flip the House blue and send anti-choice Republicans packing. name: Sharice Davids
subject: Blocked
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I wanted you to hear this from me:

**Favoring purely political motivations over 20 years of scientific fact, a judge in Texas ruled to block access to the leading abortion medication.**

Mifepristone has been safely and effectively used by millions of women and was approved by the FDA decades ago—so this ruling sets a dangerous precedent not just for this drug but for the FDA’s ability to keep all sorts of medications available for folks who rely on them.

Last August, Kansans fought against and ultimately rejected extremist actions to limit abortion rights in our state. Now, we have to fight back again.

**[If you’re able, will you chip in $20 in the first days after this ruling to help take a stand for reproductive rights in Kansas?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61508091/400299755/1004362382?amount=20&contactdata=BPvs84MoFg+/umHaikllUq5/wrSLL2IESm7Mam8Keds1BZ3SNkglfuS+pHvrO4Cj6yFQlspLt24eUcUizv1L8hMO/AcmV9AG1nOnfVy1VZMWNNbTUS7eaS1l6mVfshJRBw5QhtWQuQxGuIp5GvLvIw==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230408_FR_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_mifepristonebanned&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI1Y2E5Yy00YmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f_3IAz6v-4LGqjshtmSKxpHkH46gtyV8HhXe6FkQr_k=)**

Mifepristone is still legal for now, but the unprecedented nature of this ruling means it can still put Kansans’ health at risk at a time when our state Supreme Court is debating whether to keep our abortion protections and our state legislature is passing more and more anti-choice bills with no chance of becoming law.

No one should be forced to let a politician or a judge make life-altering healthcare decisions for them. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

| | Peter, since Tim announced that he will seek re-election to the U.S. Senate next year, our team has been busy mapping out the foundation for a strong re-election campaign.

**Here are some of the reasons why we need to start right now:**

First, Virginia remains a battleground state, plain and simple. In fact, Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ called our race a “pickup opportunity” for Republicans. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61508115/400299866/417785495?refcode=20230408.2_TK_4P&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzQ5MDdiNC00YmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7HqOXAETPF2MP-9MQ_TQNSg0VuQXFXDYna5vsyifKY=)

clean_body: | | | Peter, since Tim announced that he will seek re-election to the U.S. Senate next year, our team has been busy mapping out the foundation for a strong re-election campaign. Here are some of the reasons why we need to start right now: First, Virginia remains a battleground state, plain and simple. In fact, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight called our race a “pickup opportunity” for Republicans. | = Second, Virginia has a Republican governor in power, and we know that the GOP and special interest groups will be setting their sights on growing their foothold in VA this cycle. And finally, Tim’s election coincides with the next presidential election, which means it’s even more important that we persuade and turn out as many Democrats as we possibly can. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Building up our resources in key moments like this allows Tim to make strategic decisions about his campaign, from opening offices to hiring organizers on the ground. We make these pushes because it’s critical to take a strong fundraising number to Tim -- and to prepare for our next big filing report. = Thank you so much -- we know that Tim is grateful to have your support. -Team Kaine | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Whether people responded to an email like this one, saw one of our Facebook ads, or even just visited our website — early, small-dollar support plays a critical role in setting Lucas + our campaign up for success. And this quarter, we’ve got to keep it going...

name: Sherrod B.
subject: the headline says it all
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
This is outrageous, friend. I just read a _Politico_ article, and well, the headline says it all: _"Republicans are looking for Senate candidates who are filthy rich."_
**Yep, you read that right. Not candidates who are dedicated to doing the right thing for workers and families. Not even qualified. "Filthy rich."**
Here's why this matters: the past few election cycles have shown the sheer strength of grassroots movements like ours, and the GOP has failed to keep up. Now, national Republicans are running scared – actively recruiting right-wing billionaires who can fund their own campaigns and help take back the Senate for Mitch McConnell.
Well, friend, unlike those filthy rich opponents, I am 100% committed to fighting for every worker’s right to fair wages, affordable health care, and economic opportunity.
This is one of the many reasons that this will be the toughest reelection campaign of my life – and experts say I'm a top GOP target for defeat. Even worse, analysts at _NBC News_ say this race could be "even nastier and more expensive" than last year's $120 million battle.

**The filthy rich shouldn't be able to buy our elections and I need grassroots supporters like you, friend, to make sure that doesn't happen.**
**[That's why I'm asking for your help before my midnight fundraising deadline. Please, will you rush $5 – or our average donation of just $26 – to help me win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61508780/400302908/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk91-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGVmMTgzNi01NWQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3J3UeSv2U98ASYPeOXKQvZg1tsB6yMtA5EL8xfGn_bo=)**

| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** All eyes were on the arrest of former President Trump this week in what is clearly a politically motivated act by the Manhattan District Attorney. clean_body: | | | | | April 10, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 7 | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) All eyes were on the arrest of former President Trump this week in what is clearly a politically motivated act by the Manhattan District Attorney. We have an obligation to elect leaders who will restore confidence in American politics. We need to let Americans be Americans. To create and innovate the way only Americans do so we continue being the beacon of hope for future generations. Help us fight back against the weaponization of our legal system! \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of | Hung Cao joins Fox and Friends FIRST to discuss new “unlimited” alliance between Russia and China Watch Hung Cao discuss his reaction as a survivor of communism to the arrest of President Trump and the abuse of law to target political enemies. Cao also reacted to Congressional leaders' visit to Taiwan and explained how important it is to show Taiwan that the United States stands with them. | The rise of woke ideology instead of meritocracy Cao writes in Townhall, “Our escape from Vietnam, life in Africa, and our eventual return to the U.S. spurred me on to a life of service. I deployed in combat to Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia, serving alongside Special Forces and SEAL Teams.
