body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1712901?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **_A baby sea turtle has just hatched on the shore and is about to reach the ocean for the first time!_** The excited little creature can’t wait to eat. But as soon as it attempts to swallow the translucent jellyfish-looking bite, **it begins hacking.** It wasn’t jellyfish but plastic that the baby turtle has eaten -- and it’s now **LODGED in the tiny throat of this innocent animal** who is just at the beginning of life. Attempts to cough up the plastic’s sharp edges are moot, and **__soon, the young sea turtle will CHOKE TO DEATH.__** This sad story happens all too often, Friend. The ocean is being consumed by plastic waste, and scientists think there will be **more plastic than fish in the sea by 2050** \-- making it even harder for animals like baby sea turtles to discern what is food and what is not. Efforts to reduce plastic waste haven’t been enough, so it’s time for _**BOLD action at the federal level**_ if we are going to protect our oceans, marine life, and the planet from the _**PLASTIC APOCALYPSE.**_ **[Tell the Biden administration to address the plastic crisis NOW before it’s too late>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1712902?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1712903?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Our planet is already suffering the devastating consequences of human-driven climate change, and the wasteful production of single-use plastics only makes this worse. Not only are 99% of plastics made from fossil fuels and release greenhouse gases during manufacture, they continue to pollute throughout their long existence! **_There’s still a chance to save the Earth from the plastic apocalypse, but it’s going to take meaningful and immediate solutions._**
Curbing plastic pollution is both within our control AND a clear way to combat the effects of the climate crisis -- but our leaders have _**_FAILED_**_ to take enough action, **instead siding with Big Plastic and the fossil fuel industry.**
_Meanwhile, plastic production is wreaking havoc on all life on earth_ \-- from sea turtles and marine life, to land animals, to humans. Even our air and water get bombarded with harmful emissions from plastic manufacturing, leaving low-wealth and BIPOC residents near these industrial facilities to face the health risks.
**_Plastic pollution is an environmental crisis, and it’s the government’s responsibility to step up and protect our planet._** **[But the Biden administration won’t act unless we show strong public support from activists like you, Friend -- so we urgently need you to take action today. Can we count on you to add your name now?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1712904?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1712903?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for your urgent action,
Friends of the Earth**

It wasn’t jellyfish but plastic that the baby turtle has eaten -- and it’s now LODGED in the tiny throat of this innocent animal who is just at the beginning of life. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: BREAKING: devastating news for abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Let’s be crystal clear: I will NEVER stop fighting for reproductive rights.
| | |
---
Hello,
I am so angry.
Last night, practically under the cover of darkness, a federal judge in Texas (appointed by Donald Trump) banned the most common abortion pill in the country for everyone, even those in pro-choice states.

### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **
**Do you have friends or family that would enjoy CaucusRoom? Forward this newsletter to them and ask them to join!**
### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* New rules on lightbulbs will **[leave you in the dark](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-y/)**.
* China lied about the **[weather balloon](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-j/)**.

* Stormy Daniels **[ordered to pay Trump](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-k/)**.
* Colorado school district **[deceiving parents](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-u/).**
* IRS releasing their budget**.[What will they spend the money on?](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-o/)**
* OPEC is **[cutting the production](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-x/) **of oil.
* North Carolina **[Dem switches parties](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* **[Creepy robot dogs](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-c/) **are patroling neighborhoods.
* Were Trump's **[rights violated](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-q/)**?

* EPA regulations will**[ban this popular vehicle](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-f/).**

### **Land Grab**
## JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon recently **[suggested that the federal government and large corporations ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-z/)[may have to seize private property](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-v/) **from U.S. citizens to advance climate initiatives.

### **Biden Supports Males Playing Girls Sports**
The Biden administration released**[new Title IX rules that bar schools that receive federal funding from enforcing policies that ban biological males from playing girl's sports](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-e/).** **Probing Biden's Finances** The House Oversight Committee**[issued subpoenas to banks asking for Biden family associates' financial records.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-s/)** [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-yd/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-yh/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quruuyd-trhiujldw-yu/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

name: State Dems HQ (via DLCC.org)
subject: When we win
body:
When we assemble a huge team that’s dedicated to fighting for state Democrats and affecting change at the local level, we can make a difference... | | |
---
| | Just last year, Michigan state Democrats were fighting tooth and nail against the GOP’s outrageous attacks on abortion access, voting rights, LGBTQ+ freedoms, and gun safety. But in November, we flipped _both_ chambers of the state legislature – giving Michigan a Democratic trifecta for the first time in almost 40 years. Now, they’re working with Gov. Gretchen Whitmer to fast-track their progressive agenda and deliver real solutions to the problems facing Michiganders. [ That’s what happens when Democrats hold power. Help us deliver more victories like this one to legislatures across the nation by donating to support state Democrats now >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OO-Jv2x4fm_JDOS58fZFcljqKdhOZr9wdNO52AonPdsd6C-UuP_83VUdscuDoeANB8E3jRf6_njfnN-KCPcxJ-Qo0Fu14bhw24e22crv97TZVDHREHd12AlTFGTP7iqdv7dtVajbXIgOFdjABt8o-f6aQoZH4Z8dh_B1AWfr0fuGcB7_eAP64eV7UNsymXP5cKKrz7s8z45JqPj13iYT3Cvx91oLCornu86DWk4mxo1qiTCkefGTYLABBnZUzROV0DeatbsErmK8CdXthMmdU9QRkK-VfTcvJYGQclCXoKkleY4aSqd8nVgLESm5oD7xDCiXpZ41yBMyenFbW8bGJsycYXusWI34TGAP-GCXP0OEnw9v4yOGEGPWpzGrYPaELQ/3v6/MY8WgZfuSMmmIzKWcrPo0g/h0/SmQfi8OopTjMrXU4EwEyw159tKlcYNz7WsPlBw74L1U) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

In the first two months of their legislative session, Democrats in Michigan quickly passed a bill repealing the state’s defunct abortion ban, enshrined civil rights protections for LGBTQ+ Michiganders, and enacted a sweeping new tax plan.
And they have so many more big plans they’re working to get done, like passing gun safety laws and protecting voting rights.
**That’s what happens when Democrats win. When we assemble a huge team that’s dedicated to fighting for state Democrats and affecting change at the local level, we can make a difference.**
[We have the chance to do that in even more states in 2024 – but to make that happen, we need to reassemble that team and get even more Democratic supporters on board. Join the team right now by contributing whatever you can >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OO-Jv2x4fm_JDOS58fZFcljqKdhOZr9wdNO52AonPdsd6C-UuP_83VUdscuDoeANB8E3jRf6_njfnN-KCPcxJ-Qo0Fu14bhw24e22crv97TZVDHREHd12AlTFGTP7iqdv7dtVajbXIgOFdjABt8o-f53dOydPFo-9mABA7iooMAN_d1dsbluW7-q3gsDx0E3IisVjpj1LDMQcztUCy5jo3MPePhdrB7y3O9b3XF-_VymBHC7qwU8RotrBdK7wRK4TZ5BHUaUIRdytyOnTVdaM7ZaRWRrEcq1O4KrPj89lF2B94QP4-Mq-iDtz2mAw3z7sq57fuLPYVArZx2Hu67IL-EyDhLWBSSjMF52inZBy6eEgwhoL6agXqnlQ4vHEhDM9Q/3v6/MY8WgZfuSMmmIzKWcrPo0g/h6/5-ScXIhGYaQrHQG85c7sabGTZEDCji4QolXt6LZ4uFw)

body:

Trump incited a full blown **INSURRECTION** on our Democracy.

Now, Alvin Bragg is **FINALLY** bringing Trump to justice for his many crimes!

**But MAGA Republicans like Rand Paul and Marjorie Taylor Greene are calling for Bragg's ARREST — and if Democrats can’t band together now, it could WORK.**

name: Court Decision Alert (via Democrats.org)
subject: We knew that MAGA Republicans would not stop at overturning Roe v.Wade…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
A Trump-appointed judge just ruled to restrict the reproductive freedom of Americans. This comes after the Supreme Court already overturned Roe v. Wade. This is an attack on our freedom, and we need to respond. | |
---
Yesterday, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas ruled that a prescription medication that has been available for _more than 22 years, approved by the FDA, and used safely and effectively by millions of women_ should no longer be approved in the United States. Despite voters overwhelmingly rejecting Republicans’ extreme anti-choice agenda, this is yet another proof point: _Republicans will continue their campaign against women’s reproductive freedom until they achieve their ultimate goal of**banning abortion nationwide.**_ **It is more clear now than ever: We must stop them by electing Democrats who will protect choice.** Electing Democrats to federal, state, and local office will not happen overnight, Derek. It will take continued commitment from grassroots supporters like you to elect Democrats in 2023 and 2024 who will defend Americans’ basic freedoms. clean_body: A Trump-appointed judge just ruled to restrict the reproductive freedom of Americans. This comes after the Supreme Court already overturned Roe v. Wade. This is an attack on our freedom, and we need to respond. | | Yesterday, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas ruled that a prescription medication that has been available for more than 22 years, approved by the FDA, and used safely and effectively by millions of women should no longer be approved in the United States. Despite voters overwhelmingly rejecting Republicans’ extreme anti-choice agenda, this is yet another proof point: Republicans will continue their campaign against women’s reproductive freedom until they achieve their ultimate goal ofbanning abortion nationwide. It is more clear now than ever: We must stop them by electing Democrats who will protect choice. Electing Democrats to federal, state, and local office will not happen overnight, Derek. It will take continued commitment from grassroots supporters like you to elect Democrats in 2023 and 2024 who will defend Americans’ basic freedoms. We know this for certain: These decisions should be made between a woman and her doctor and guided by science, not by conservative officials with an extreme partisan agenda. Derek, we know that you’re not the type of person to sit by while Americans’ basic freedoms are attacked. Thanks for being in this fight, The Democrats NOTE: While yesterday’s decision in Texas threatens access to one of the two medications used in medical abortions,the approval of the medication remains standing for now.
